"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 525,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Recipe Approval (DGDA) is regulated under the Drugs Act, 1940, the Drugs (Control) Ordinance, 1982, and the Drugs Rules, 1945, which govern the formulation, manufacture, and quality control of pharmaceutical products in Bangladesh. The approval ensures that the product composition, active ingredients, excipients, and manufacturing process comply with approved standards before production or market authorization. This approval is a mandatory prerequisite for product registration and manufacturing license compliance. Any deviation from the approved recipe is subject to regulatory action, including suspension or cancellation of approval.",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},

{
"id": 30,
"attributes": {
"name": "VIP Lounge",
"description": "A dedicated, secure waiting and meeting area for VIP visitors (senior officials, investors, executives). Offers priority reception, private seating/meeting space, complimentary Wi‑Fi and refreshments, concierge support, and enhanced security. Access by prior arrangement or approval; time limits and ID/registration may apply",
"shortDescription": "VIP Lounge",
"applicationUrl": "https://bidaquickserv.org/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-02T06:20:34.167Z",

"order": 7,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Executive Lounge Access",
"Priority Service",
"Premium Service Access"
],
"ValidityTime": "According to the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA) OSS portal, the validity period for the service “VIP Lounge – New” is 30 days",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "According to the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA) OSS portal, the validity period for the service “VIP Lounge – New” is 30 days",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",

},

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 89,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "The service is for investors (foreign or domestic) who have a project that is registered with BIDA (or a branch/liaison/representative office) and who are travelling to/visiting Bangladesh.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 90,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The approval for the BIDA VIP Lounge service is granted to facilitate smooth and efficient service delivery for foreign investors, business delegates, and officials. This service ensures that visitors receive necessary assistance at airports, including immigration support, protocol arrangements, and transport coordination, as part of BIDA’s investor-friendly initiatives. The approval reflects BIDA’s commitment to enhancing investor experience and promoting a positive business environment in Bangladesh.\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"id": 20,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{
"id": 489,
"order": 1,
"name": "Copy of the registration of industrial project with BIDA / Office Permission / Incorporation Certificate.\t",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 490,
"order": 2,
"name": "Copy of Air Ticket\t",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 491,
"order": 3,
"name": "Copy of passport (whole used part)\t",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 492,
"order": 4,
"name": "Audited financial statement\t",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 494,
"order": 5,

"description": null
},
{
"id": 493,
"order": 6,
"name": "Additional information with proper documents (if any)",
"description": null
}
]

"id": 1420,
"attributes": {
"name": "Temporary Account Opening (Prime Bank)",
"description": "Temporary Account Opening Service provides the facility to open a personal temporary account with the bank. The applicant has to submit the required documents including filled AOF, photograph, NID/Passport, address and income proof. "serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1471,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Temporary Account Opening Service is a fast process provided by the bank, which allows opening of temporary bank accounts for individual customers. It is generally used for short-term financial transactions, project-based work or emergency needs and can be converted into permanent ones later.\nThe required documents include a completed Account Opening Form (AOF), a recent passport size photograph of the applicant, a copy of National Identity Card/Valid Passport/Birth Certificate, proof of address, proof of income and a copy of the latest PSR, if applicable. Photo ID (attested by the applicant) with the photograph of the nominee is required to be submitted. The branch may ask for other appropriate documents as required.\nThere is no specific application fee for this service; only the initial deposit as per the schedule of charges has to be made, which can be done through cash, cheque, pay order or online transfer. The entire process is completed within 0-4 days, depending on the verification and approval of the documents. This facility helps the customers in availing banking services quickly.",
"title": "About the approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

}

{
"id": 250,
"attributes": {
"name": "Local Purchase Permit",
"description": "A Local Purchase Permit (LPP) is mandatory for enterprises operating in Bangladesh Economic Zones that hold a valid Bonded Warehouse (Bond) License and wish to purchase goods or raw materials from the domestic market.",
"shortDescription": "A Local Purchase Permit (LPP) is mandatory for enterprises operating in Bangladesh Economic Zones that hold a valid Bonded Warehouse (Bond) License",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T09:58:58.401Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-17T08:21:37.536Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T09:58:59.226Z",
"order": 7,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Local Purchase Permission",
"Permit for Local Procurement",
"Authorization for Local Purchase",
"Approval for Local Procurement"
],
"ValidityTime": "One time per consignment \n",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "One time per consignmen",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "500 BDT + 15% VAT",
"slaText": "One (01) working day, provided that all required documents and information are correctly submitted and no shortfalls are identified.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "500 BDT + 15% VAT",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 2979,
"minTime": "0",
"maxTime": "1",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 91,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 91,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "\"1. Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010)\n2. Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the “One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018” read with Section 11 of the “One Stop Service Act, 2018”\"",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 230,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The objective of this process is to facilitate the smooth and compliant related to import and export of goods for unit investors operating within Bangladesh Economic Zones",
"title": "About this approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 231,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Enterprises operating in Bangladesh Economic Zones that hold a valid Bonded Warehouse (Bond) License and wish to purchase goods or raw materials from the domestic market.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"requiredDocumnetLIst": [
{
"id": 1705,
"order": 1,
"name": "The applicant company must obtain Investment Clearance and a Trade License from the BEZA-OSSC.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1706,
"order": 2,
"name": "The company must obtain a Business Identification Number (BIN) and complete registration in the BSW system prior to applying for an Import Permit and simultaneously update BIN information in BEZA-OSS Portal.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1707,
"order": 3,
"name": "The company is required to provide periodic updates on investment and employment data through the BEZA-OSS portal. Failure to provide such data will result in ineligibility to apply for both Import Permits and Export Permits.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1708,
"order": 4,

},

},

"description": null
}
]
}

{
"id": 190,
"attributes": {
"name": "Attestation and Certification of Import Documents for Investor Company",
"description": "Once having Investment Project Registration at BHTPA OSS Portal, an Investor Company can apply for Attestation of Import Documents and Certification against import of Goods/Materials from BHTPA  for availing the incentive of exemption of import duties, regulatory duties, supplementary duties and value added  tax according to the  S.R.O. No. 212-Law//2015/49/Customs, Date: 01 July, 2015 of the government,    each time prior to release of the imported Goods/Materials from the Customs authority of the port of entry. \n",
"shortDescription": "Attestation and Certification of Import Documents for Investor Company",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:53:35.772Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:07:15.812Z",
"publishedAt": null,
"order": 7,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Import Document Verification (Investor)",
"Trade Document Attestation"
],
"ValidityTime": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration\n",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Validity",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Application Fee",
"slaText": null,

},

"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 61,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "One Stop Service Act, 2018 and One Stop Service (Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority) Regulations,  2019\n",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 172,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 173,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "\"After obtaining Investment Project Registration through the BHTPA OSS Portal, an Investor Company can apply for Attestation of Import Documents and Certification from BHTPA.\n\nThis approval confirms that the imported goods or materials are eligible for exemption from import duties, regulatory duties, supplementary duties, and VAT under S.R.O. No. 212-Law//2015/49/Customs, Date: 01 July 2015.\n\nThe attestation must be obtained each time before the release of imported goods from the customs authority at the port of entry.\"\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

},

{
"id": 247,
"attributes": {
"name": "Import Permit - Sample Import",
"description": "This service allows a unit investor within a BEZA‑declared Economic Zone to obtain a permit to import sample goods (in limited quantity) without duty/tax against their bond licence for testing, marketing or demonstration purposes.",
"shortDescription": "Import Permit - Sample Import",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T09:53:56.682Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-17T05:12:58.970Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T09:53:57.447Z",
"order": 5,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Sample Import License",
"Product Sample Clearance",
"Trial Import Permit",
"Sample Goods Authorization"
],
"ValidityTime": "One (01) working day, provided that all required documents and information are correctly submitted and no shortfalls are identified.",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "One (01) working day, provided that all required documents and information are correctly submitted and no shortfalls are identified.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "BDT 500 (Application Fee) + 15% VAT   Bank Charge+ 15% VAT on Bank Charge",
"slaText": "One (01) working day, provided that all required documents and information are correctly submitted and no shortfalls are identified.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "ip",
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "BDT 500 (Application Fee) + 15% VAT   Bank Charge+ 15% VAT on Bank Charge",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 2902,
"minTime": "0",
"maxTime": "1",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 81,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 81,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "1. Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010)\n  2. Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the “One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018” read with Section 11 of the “One Stop Service Act, 2018”",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 209,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The permit certifies that BEZA has authorised the import of the sample goods under the exemptions applicable to economic zone units, thereby enabling the unit to bring in the goods legally for sampling/testing/demonstration without regular import duties.\n",
"title": "About this approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 562,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Pre-Conditions for Applicants:\n  - The applicant company must obtain Investment Clearance and a Trade License from the BEZA-OSS portal.\n  - The company must obtain a Business Identification Number (BIN) and complete registration in the BSW system prior to applying for an Import Permit and simultaneously update BIN information in BEZA-OSS Portal. \n  - The company is required to provide periodic updates on investment and employment data through the BEZA-OSS portal. Failure to provide such data will result in ineligibility to apply for both Import Permits and Export Permits.\n  - For importing construction materials, Finish schedule and specific quantity of the materials required to be assessed and subsequently approved by the Building Construction and Occupancy Committee, BEZA.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 84,
"title": "Documents required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"requiredDocumnetLIst": [
{
"id": 1643,
"order": 1,
"name": "Invoice/pro‑forma invoice of the sample goods",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1644,
"order": 2,
"name": "Certificate of origin",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1645,
"order": 3,
"name": "Packing list, bill of lading/air‑way bill",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1646,
"order": 4,
"name": "Unit’s bond licence",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1647,
"order": 5,
"name": "Relevant zone unit details",
"description": null
}
]
}
}

{
"id": 257,
"attributes": {
"name": "Export Permit - Export of Goods and items",
"description": "EZ unit investors need an Export Permit from BEZA when they ship goods or finished products from the Economic Zone to overseas markets. This permit is a legal requirement for customs clearance via the Bangladesh Single Window (BSW) and ensures compliance with BEZA regulations for international exports.",
"shortDescription": "EZ unit investors need an Export Permit from BEZA when they ship goods or finished products from the Economic Zone to overseas markets.",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T10:10:38.800Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-17T13:09:39.463Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T10:10:39.570Z",
"order": 16,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Export Permit for Goods",
"Permit for Exporting Items",
"Authorization for Goods Export",
"Export Approval for Products and Items"
],
"ValidityTime": "30 days from the issue date till utilization.",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "30 days from the issue date till utilization.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "BDT 500+VAT 15%+Bank charge+VAT 15% on Bank charge",
"slaText": "1 working day (If there is no shortfall of documents or information)",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "ep",
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "BDT 500+VAT 15%+Bank charge+VAT 15% on Bank charge",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 3303,
"minTime": "0",
"maxTime": "1",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 31,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 31,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "1. Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010)\n  2. Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the “One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018” read with Section 11 of the “One Stop Service Act, 2018”",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 115,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Pre-Conditions for Applicants:\n  - The applicant company must obtain Investment Clearance and a Trade License from the BEZA-OSS portal.\n  - The company must obtain a Business Identification Number (BIN) and complete registration in the BSW system prior to applying for an Import Permit and simultaneously update BIN information in BEZA-OSS Portal.\n  - The company is required to provide periodic updates on investment and employment data through the BEZA-OSS portal. Failure to provide such data will result in ineligibility to apply for both Import Permits and Export Permits.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 116,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "STEP-1: Application Submission\n  Applicant submits application online through Bangladesh Single Window (BSW) at bswnbr.gov.bd along with required documents.\n  \n  STEP-2: Automated Scrutiny\n  BSW Risk Management System (RMS) performs automated checks and Application and documents are forwarded to BEZA One Stop Service (OSS) Portal.\n  \n  STEP-3: Decision & Issuance\n  BEZA-OSS reviews documents and information\n  ✅ If in order → Export Permit issued.\n  ❌ If discrepancies (HS code mismatch, quantity, missing docs) → Shortfall notice sent for correction.\n  \n  STEP-4: Forward to Customs\n  Upon approval, BEZA-OSS portal automatically forwards the permit to the BSW system for customs clearance processing.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 34,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{

"order": 1,

"description": null
},
{

{

},
{

"id": 6,
"attributes": {
"name": "Investment Clearance",
"description": "This service enables an investor in an economic zone (or proposed unit within a zone) to apply for an “Investment Clearance Certificate” from BEZA, confirming their project proposal and allowing the commencement of business operations in the zone.\n",

"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",

{
"id": 1182,
"attributes": {
"name": "Medical Device Registration",
"description": "Medical Device Registration is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) and verifies the safety, efficacy, and quality of medical devices. It grants legal permission for their import, manufacture, and marketing in Bangladesh. This registration is essential for patient safety and the protection of public health.",
"shortDescription": "Medical Device Registration is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA",
"applicationUrl": "https://dgdagov.info/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-21T11:41:37.916Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-23T20:22:33.647Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-21T12:41:04.530Z",
"order": 7,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Medical Device Approval",
"Device Registration Certificate",
"Regulatory Device Clearance",
"Medical Equipment Marketing Authorization"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "5,000/- per thousand for registration recipe evaluation fee for import of medicines/medical devices",
"slaText": "Processing Time: 90 working days from the receipt of complete application.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "5,000/- per thousand for registration recipe evaluation fee for import of medicines/medical devices",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 6025,
"minTime": "80",
"maxTime": "90",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 494,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 498,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Medical Device Registration in Bangladesh is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) under the Drugs Act, 1940, the Drugs (Control) Ordinance, 1982, and the Drugs Rules, 1945. The process ensures that all medical devices meet safety, efficacy, and quality standards before import, manufacture, or marketing. DGDA guidelines follow WHO standards and require proper documentation, testing, and classification of devices. Non-compliance may result in suspension, cancellation, or legal action.",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1024,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Medical Device Registration is administered by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) and is a mandatory approval for the import, manufacture, or marketing of medical devices in Bangladesh, such as surgical instruments, diagnostic kits, implants, and others. Without this registration, it is legally prohibited to market any medical device. The process includes a detailed assessment of the device’s risk classification (Class A, B, C, D), technical documentation, clinical data, manufacturing standards (ISO 13485), and safety and performance evaluation.\nRequired documents include the prescribed application form, the device’s technical file (specifications, design, labeling), manufacturer’s ISO/GMP certificate, Free Sale Certificate (CPP), clinical evaluation report (for high-risk devices), risk analysis, sterility/biocompatibility test reports (where applicable), and the importer’s trade license. Applications can be submitted online through the ADLRS portal.\nUpon receipt of a complete application, the processing time is approximately 90 working days. The registration evaluation fee is BDT 5,000 (based on every thousand taka of device price) plus 15% VAT (Code: 1-1133-0015-0311), to be paid via treasury challan with the original copy submitted. This registration prevents substandard or high-risk devices and supports patient safety and the improvement of healthcare quality.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1025,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content coming soon ",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

},

{
"id": 392,
"attributes": {
"name": "Environmental Clearance Certificate",
"description": "Environmental Clearance Certificate (ECC) is an official approval issued by the Department of Environment for the establishment and operation of industrial projects or institutions. The certificate is granted based on an evaluation of the project’s potential environmental impacts, with the objective of ensuring environmental protection and compliance with applicable laws and regulations.\n\nFor projects located within designated special areas—such as Export Processing Zones (EPZ), Economic Zones (EZ), and Bangladesh Small and Cottage Industries Corporation (BSCIC) industrial estates—separate local authority clearance is not required. Applicants are required to submit the prescribed application along with all relevant supporting documents to the Department of Environment for obtaining the Environmental Clearance Certificate.",
"shortDescription": "Environmental Clearance Certificate (ECC) is an official approval issued by the Department of Environment.",
"applicationUrl": "https://doe.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T09:45:37.763Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-24T04:34:59.788Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-28T09:45:39.004Z",
"order": 3,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Environmental Approval Certificate",
"Environmental Compliance Certificate",
"Environmental Authorization Certificate",
"Environmental Clearance Approval"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": null,
"slaText": null,
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save For Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "ecc",
"serviceType": "ec",
"fee": null,
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5020,
"minTime": null,
"maxTime": null,
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 426,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 429,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Acts",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Content Coming Soon",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 888,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The issuance of an Environmental Clearance Certificate is a mandatory regulatory service for industrial projects or establishments in accordance with the Environment Conservation Act, 1995 and the Environment Conservation Rules, 1997. This clearance ensures the assessment of potential environmental impacts of a project, with the objective of controlling pollution and safeguarding the environment. The certificate is issued by the Department of Environment (DoE), and implementation of any project without obtaining this clearance is legally prohibited.\n\nThe principal documents required for application include the entrepreneur’s National Identity Card, investment breakdown of the industrial establishment or project, and registration certificates issued by relevant authorities such as Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA), Bangladesh Small and Cottage Industries Corporation (BSCIC), or the Department of Textiles, where applicable, along with other necessary information. For projects proposed within government or private Export Processing Zones (EPZ), Economic Zones (EZ), or BSCIC industrial estates, separate approval from local authorities is not required; however, a detailed description of waste management arrangements must be submitted.\n\nThe Environmental Clearance Certificate is generally processed based on the project’s classification category (Green, Orange-A, Orange-B, or Red). Upon issuance of the clearance, project implementation may commence. As the certificate is valid for a specified period, it must be renewed upon expiry. This regulatory process plays a vital role in ensuring environmentally sustainable development.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 889,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"id": 408,
"title": "Required Document",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{
"id": 3681,
"order": 1,
"name": "For industrial establishments or projects located in private Export Processing Zones (EPZ), Economic Zones (EZ), or Bangladesh Small and Cottage Industries Corporation (BSCIC) industrial estates, approval from the local authority is not required.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3680,
"order": 2,
"name": "National Identity Card of the entrepreneur",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3679,
"order": 3,
"name": "Investment breakdown of the industrial establishment or project / registration certificate issued by Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA), BSCIC, or the Department of Textiles, as applicable",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3678,
"order": 4,
"name": "Where applicable, additional information must be submitted, including a brief description of the waste management system for projects proposed in EPZs, EZs, or BSCIC industrial estates.",
"description": null
}
]
}

{
"id": 1413,
"attributes": {
"name": "Temporary account opening (BRAC Bank)",
"description": "Temporary Account Opening (Company/Entity Account) service provides facility to open temporary accounts for business entities in the bank. The applicant has to submit the filled-in form, trade license, NID/passport of signatory and directors, photograph, board resolution, MOA, AOA, incorporation certificate and other detailed documents to the branch. Fees are as per the schedule.",
"shortDescription": null,
"applicationUrl": null,
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-26T04:16:59.926Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-26T09:24:56.219Z",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1459,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval",
"description": "Temporary Account Opening Service is a process provided by the bank, which allows opening of temporary bank accounts for companies or business entities. It is generally used for emergency banking facilities before starting a new business, project-based transactions or opening a permanent account. The required documents include duly filled account opening form, signature card of signatories, copy of valid trade license, valid ID (NID/Passport) of all signatories, at least five directors (including nominees) and beneficial owners holding 20% ​​or more ownership, photograph and individual information form. In addition, NTT FATCA form, board resolution with instructions for opening and operating the account, photocopy of RJSC certified MOA and AOA, Incorporation Certificate, latest Form XII and X (where applicable), Commencement of Business Certificate for Public Limited Companies, E-TIN (if any) and approval of the concerned authorities if required. Applications are accepted directly at the branch.",
"title": "About the approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}

{
"id": 1431,
"attributes": {
"name": "Temporary account opening (City Bank)",
"description": "City Bank PLC's Temporary Account Opening service primarily facilitates the opening of foreign currency accounts (such as Global FC Account, RFCD, etc.), suitable for non-residents, expatriate Bangladeshis, and exporters. These accounts allow holding foreign earnings, receiving remittances, and easy utilization. Customers can apply at branches, agent outlets, or via courier/email. The process is quick and compliant with Bangladesh Bank guidelines, encouraging remittance inflows from expatriates.",

{
"id": 1114,
"attributes": {
"name": "Fire safety floor plan",
"description": "A fire safety plan is a detailed written plan to protect life and property in the event of a fire, which ensures the safety of a building or workplace through fire prevention, emergency exits (evacuation), fire extinguishers, alarm systems, and regular drills, the main purpose of which is to prevent a fire from breaking out and to control the situation quickly and safely if it does break out.",
"shortDescription": "A fire safety plan is a detailed written plan to protect life and property in the event of a fire,",
"applicationUrl": "https://fireservice.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-19T06:20:25.896Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-26T06:03:26.566Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-19T06:22:02.664Z",
"order": 3,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Fire Protection Floor Plan",
"Building Fire Safety Layout",
"Fire Safety Blueprint",
"Fire Prevention Plan"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Year",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "1 Year",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "0.30 tk for every square foot incase of residential building. 0.50 tk for every square foot incase of commercial building.",
"slaText": "60 working days mostly. But timeline may differ if manpower is engaged elswhere.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "0.30 tk for every square foot incase of residential building. 0.50 tk for every square foot incase of commercial building.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 6300,
"minTime": "50",
"maxTime": "60",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 397,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 400,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "BNBC 2020, Fire Prevention Act 2025",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 834,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Fire Safety Floor Plan approval is a critical service provided by the Bangladesh Fire Service and Civil Defence (FSCD) to ensure buildings and workplaces comply with national fire safety standards. A fire safety plan is a comprehensive written document designed to safeguard lives and property during fire emergencies. It includes strategies for fire prevention, installation and maintenance of protection systems like extinguishers and alarms, clear evacuation routes, emergency response procedures, and mandatory fire drills. The primary goal is to minimize the risk of fire outbreaks and enable rapid, organized control and evacuation if a fire occurs.\nThis approval is often required for new constructions, high-rise buildings, commercial establishments, factories, and residential complexes before proceeding with further permits or occupancy. Applicants submit detailed floor plans incorporating fire safety features, along with supporting documents such as architectural drawings.\nThe standard processing timeline is approximately 60 working days, though delays may occur if departmental manpower is deployed elsewhere, such as in emergency responses. Fees are calculated based on the building's floor area: 0.30 Taka per square foot for residential structures and 0.50 Taka per square foot for commercial ones, making it scalable according to the project's size.\nObtaining this approval demonstrates commitment to safety compliance under the Fire Prevention and Extinguishing Act, 2003, and Bangladesh National Building Code (BNBC). It is a prerequisite for subsequent steps like fire license issuance and helps reduce insurance risks while protecting occupants. Applicants are encouraged to engage qualified professionals for plan preparation to expedite the review process.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 835,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"id": 380,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {

},

}
}

{
"id": 376,
"attributes": {
"name": "Providing Electricity/Water/CETP/Other connections",
"description": "This service facilitates the provision of electricity, water, Central Effluent Treatment Plant (CETP), and other utility connections within Bangladesh Economic Zones. Consumers are required to submit the necessary documents as specified in the prescribed connection application form. The entire process is handled digitally through the One Stop Service platform, ensuring approval and connection arrangements within 03 working days.",
"shortDescription": "Providing Electricity/Water/CETP/Other connections",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T09:27:26.071Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T10:31:50.549Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-28T09:27:27.308Z",
"order": 34,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Utility Connections",
"Infrastructure Services",
"Power & Water Supply",
"CETP Connection"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 300/-",
"slaText": null,
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Tk. 300/-",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 6290,
"minTime": "2",
"maxTime": "3",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 343,
"title": "Acts And Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts And Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{

]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 294,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The service for providing electricity, water, CETP, and other utility connections is a key facility offered by the Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA) to investors and industries operating in economic zones. It ensures seamless access to essential infrastructure, supporting smooth business operations and compliance with environmental standards through CETP connections.\nThe approval process is fully governed under the Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010) and Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the “One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018” read with Section 11 of the “One Stop Service Act, 2018”. Applicants must complete the prescribed connection form and attach all required documents as mentioned by the consumer/utility provider.\nOnce submitted via the OSS platform, BEZA coordinates with relevant utility authorities for swift processing. The service is completed within 03 working days, promoting efficiency and ease of doing business. Physical consultation is encouraged for complex requirements or clarifications. This digital-first approach minimizes delays, enabling industries to commence operations promptly while adhering to national utility and environmental regulations.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 731,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": null,
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

"order": 1,
"name": "Required Documents Provided by Consumer Mentioning in the prescribed connection form.",
"description": null
}
]
}
}

{
"id": 1105,
"attributes": {
"name": "Digital Business ID (DBID)",
"description": "Digital Business Identity (DBID) is a unique digital identification issued to business entities in Bangladesh, which can be used for government services, banking, and other transactions. It is provided free of charge by the Registrar of Joint Stock Companies and Firms (RJSC). Applications must be submitted entirely online (via www.dbid.gov.bd\n or www.roc.gov.bd\n), and the DBID is generally issued within 60 days.",
"shortDescription": "Digital Business Identity (DBID) is a unique digital identification issued to business entities in Bangladesh,",
"applicationUrl": "https://roc.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-18T12:52:45.697Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-20T05:13:30.536Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-18T13:17:58.563Z",
"order": 4,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Digital Business Identification",
"Online Business ID",
"DBID Registration",
"Digital Enterprise Identifier"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Free of Cost",
"slaText": "According to DBID guidelines, 60 days.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Free of Cost",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5065,
"minTime": "50",
"maxTime": "60",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 377,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 380,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Content Coming Soon",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 795,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Government of Bangladesh’s Digital Bangladesh initiative. It is issued by the Registrar of Joint Stock Companies and Firms (RJSC) and enables easy verification of a business entity’s legal existence, ownership, and other relevant information. Without a DBID, accessing many government services—such as obtaining a Tax Identification Number (TIN), opening a bank account, or acquiring licenses—can be difficult.\n\nApplications must be submitted entirely online via www.dbid.gov.bd\n or www.roc.gov.bd\n. The main documents required include: applicant’s photograph and signature, recommendation from the local Chairman/Ward Commissioner or a respected person, a copy of the trade license, national ID numbers of the company’s Chairman and Directors (if applicable), a copy of the lease agreement with the property owner in case of a rented office, and the property owner’s national ID number.\n\nThis service is provided completely free of charge. Upon verification of the application according to DBID guidelines, the Digital Business Identity is generally issued within 60 days. The DBID facilitates smoother, transparent, and fully digital business operations.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 798,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 50,
"attributes": {
"name": "Large & special project permit",
"description": "The Special Project Clearance service is provided by the Chattogram Development Authority (CDA) to grant approval for the establishment of large or special projects (such as high-rise buildings, industrial, or commercial complexes) within the Chattogram metropolitan area. Applications must be submitted using Form 201 along with the required documents. Key documents include the ownership deed, khatian (land record), Land Use Clearance (LUC), eleven (11) copies of the original design, and certificates of the architect and engineer, among others. The processing time is 45 days. Fees: Form fee Tk. 2,000; application fee Tk. 10,000 + 15% VAT; and Welfare Fund Tk. 20, all of which must be paid online.",
"shortDescription": "The Special Project Clearance service is provided by the Chattogram Development Authority (CDA)",
"applicationUrl": "https://cda.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-02T06:45:25.870Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-21T18:36:55.244Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-02T06:45:27.414Z",
"order": 4,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Major and Special Project Permit",
"Large-Scale Project Authorization",
"Special Project Approval Permit",
"Permit for Major Projects"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Form fee: Tk. 2,000 Application fee: Tk. 10,000 + VAT (15%) Welfare Fund: Tk. 20 All fees must be paid online. [Details for online fee submission should be provided.]",
"slaText": "The application will be processed within 45 (forty-five) days of submission.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Form fee: Tk. 2,000 Application fee: Tk. 10,000 + VAT (15%) Welfare Fund: Tk. 20 All fees must be paid online. [Details for online fee submission should be provided.]",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5495,
"minTime": "40",
"maxTime": "45",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 514,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 518,

},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1062,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Special Project Clearance service is administered under the Chattogram Development Authority (CDA). This clearance is mandatory for the implementation of large-scale or special projects (such as high-rise buildings, industrial establishments, or commercial complexes) within the regulated areas of Chattogram Metropolitan Area. It ensures compliance with urban planning, zoning regulations, and safety standards.\n\nTo obtain approval, the applicant must submit the completed Form 201 with all required signatures along with the necessary documents, including nationality certificate/passport, TIN certificate and latest tax return, registered land deed, khatian (land record), succession certificate (if applicable), Land Use Clearance (LUC) with eleven approved copies of the design, registration certificates of the architect and engineer, and eleven copies of the original design as per Rule 08. Proof of fee payment (via Pubali Bank) must also be attached.\n\nThe clearance is issued within 45 days of submitting a complete application. Fees: Form fee Tk. 2,000; application fee Tk. 10,000 + 15% VAT; and Welfare Fund Tk. 20. All fees must be paid through online payment.\n\nImplementation of any special project without this clearance is not legally permitted, and it is mandatory for obtaining subsequent building construction approval.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 495,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"requiredDocumnetLIst": [
{
"id": 3856,
"order": 1,
"name": "Completed application form (Form 201) with all required signatures – 01 copy.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3859,
"order": 2,
"name": "Fee payment receipt including VAT (via Pubali Bank, CDA Corporate Branch) – 01 copy.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3858,
"order": 3,
"name": "Attested copy of nationality certificate (for expatriate applicants, attested copy of passport) – 01 copy.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3860,
"order": 4,
"name": "Attested copy of TIN (Taxpayer Identification Number) certificate – 01 copy (including a copy of the latest year’s income tax return).",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3857,
"order": 5,
"name": "Information certified by a First-Class Officer regarding ownership rights and land ownership: colored copy and soft copy.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3861,
"order": 6,
"name": "Copy of the registered deed.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3862,
"order": 7,
"name": "Copy of registered power of attorney (if applicable).",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3863,
"order": 8,
"name": "BS and RS khatian (land records).",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3864,
"order": 9,
"name": "Copy of registered partition deed (if applicable).",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3865,
"order": 10,
"name": "Succession certificate in the case of ancestral property.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3866,
"order": 11,
"name": "Land Use Clearance (LUC) and approved LUC with provided designs: copies – 11 (if applicable).",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3867,
"order": 12,
"name": "Copy of the architect’s registration certificate as proof of experience – 01 copy (provided by the architect).",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3868,
"order": 13,
"name": "Copy of the engineer’s registration certificate as proof of experience – 01 copy (provided by the engineer).",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3869,
"order": 14,
"name": "Original design – 11 copies [as detailed in Rule 08(3), (4), (5)].",
"description": null
}
]
}
}
},

{
"id": 164,
"attributes": {
"name": "NOC for WTP Establishment",
"description": "Wastewater treatment plant is an important initiative which has to be taken more seriously for the betterment of the society and our future. Wastewater treatment is a process, wherein the contaminants are removed from wastewater as well as household sewage, to produce waste stream or solid waste suitable for discharge or reuse. Wastewater treatment methods are categorized into three sub-divisions, physical, chemical and biological. Once having Investment Project Registration at BHTPA OSS Portal, a Park Developer or an unit investor can apply for having a No objection Certificate (NoC) from BHTPA for establishing a WTP, which is deemed necessary for the environment. Before establishing a WTP the Park Developer or unit investor needs to consider, whether it is feasible or justified in terms of technical and physical point of view. \n \n However, an Investor can apply for No objection Certificate (NoC) for establishing a WTP through the BHTPA OSS Portal once it is registered in the Portal and have been allocated a piece of Land.",
"shortDescription": "NOC for WTP Establishment",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:32:48.184Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:10:59.604Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:32:49.029Z",
"order": 34,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Water Treatment Plant NOC",
"Water Supply Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 1627,
"minTime": "1",
"maxTime": "2",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 37,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 37,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "One Stop Service Act, 2018 and One Stop Service (Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority) Regulations, 2019",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 127,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 128,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The approval of the No Objection Certificate (NoC) for establishing a Wastewater Treatment Plant (WTP) ensures environmental compliance and alignment with BHTPA’s technical and safety standards.\n After obtaining Project Registration and Land Allotment, a Park Developer or Unit Investor may apply for the NoC through the BHTPA OSS Portal.\n BHTPA evaluates the technical feasibility, environmental impact, and justification of the proposed WTP before granting final approval.\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"id": 40,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {

},

"description": null
}
]
}
}

{
"id": 1336,
"attributes": {
"name": "Madrasa Registration",
"description": "Service for Obtaining Initial Permission to Establish a Dakhil Madrasa\nThis service provides initial approval from the Madrasa Education Board for establishing a new Dakhil Madrasa. It ensures legal and regulatory compliance, taking into account local demand, population, and distance requirements.",
"shortDescription": "Service for Obtaining Initial Permission to Establish a Dakhil Madrasa",
"applicationUrl": "https://bmeb.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-23T10:13:28.757Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-23T10:19:02.355Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-23T10:14:31.558Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Madrasa Registration",
"Islamic Educational Institution Registration",
"Madrasa Registration Certificate",
"Religious Education Institute Registration"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Determined by the Board",
"slaText": "10 working days after receiving the inspection report and distance certificate",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Determined by the Board",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5851,
"minTime": "8",
"maxTime": "10",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 661,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 665,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Acts",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1352,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Permission for Establishing a Dakhil Madrasa\n\nPermission to establish a Dakhil Madrasa is granted by the Bangladesh Madrasa Education Board. It provides the initial approval required to set up a new Dakhil-level madrasa. This process follows the 1997 Madrasa Establishment Guidelines to ensure that the proposed madrasa meets local demand and maintains the required distance from other educational institutions.\n\nRequired documents for application:\n(a) Application from the founder submitted between 1 January and 30 April (with email ID)\n(b) Consent certificate from the local community\n(c) Distance certificate issued by the Upazila Executive Officer\n(d) Population certificate issued by the Upazila Statistics Officer\n(e) Affidavit on non-judicial stamp as per the 1997 guidelines\n\nAfter receiving the inspection report and distance certificate, permission is typically granted within 10 working days. The fee is determined by the Board.\n\nThis permission ensures orderly and regulated expansion of madrasa education.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1353,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 616,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{

}
]

"description": "City Bank PLC's Foreign Exchange Compliance service ensures compliance with GFET guidelines for outward remittances, cash foreign currency purchase/sale, and other forex transactions. {
"id": 369,
"attributes": {
"name": "Recommendation letter for issuance and extension of different types of Visa",
"description": "This service provides a recommendation letter from BEZA for the issuance or extension of various types of visas (such as E Visa). Applicants must submit a forwarding letter, photocopy of passport, invitation letter, and other required documents. The service is fully digital and completed within 02 working days.",
"shortDescription": "Recommendation letter for issuance and extension of different types of Visa",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T09:21:28.503Z",

"Visa Support Letter",

],

},
"metadata": null,

"title": "Acts and Rules",

"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 293,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "The recommendation letter issued by the Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA) is essential for foreign investors, executives, or employees seeking issuance or extension of various visas, particularly Employment (E) Visas. It serves as an official endorsement submitted to the Ministry of Home Affairs or immigration authorities to facilitate the visa processing.\nThe approval process is conducted entirely through the One Stop Service platform, governed by the Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010, and the One Stop Service Act, 2018. Upon submission of the application with required documents—including a forwarding letter, photocopy of the work permit (for E Visa extension), passport photocopy, invitation letter, and flight details for landing permits—the application is reviewed digitally.\nBEZA ensures timely processing within 02 working days, promoting ease of doing business in economic zones. Physical consultation is also encouraged if applicants need clarification. This streamlined digital service reduces bureaucratic delays and supports efficient entry and stay of foreign personnel in Bangladesh's economic zones.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 724,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": null,
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{
"id": 421,
"attributes": {
"name": "Extension of validity of Export Permit",
"description": "Extension of validity of Export Permit is a service provided by BEPZA to allow investors or companies to prolong the validity of their existing export permits when additional time is required for completing export activities. Applicants must submit a formal application explaining the reasons for requesting an extension along with a copy of the original export permit. BEPZA reviews the submission to ensure that the request is valid and compliant with regulatory requirements. Upon approval, the export permit’s validity is extended for the specified period, enabling the investor to continue export operations legally. This service ensures regulatory compliance, proper documentation, and continuity of trade activities within Export Processing Zones (EPZs).",
"shortDescription": "Extension of Sample Permit-Export\n",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T10:18:43.312Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T09:53:46.364Z",
"publishedAt": null,
"order": 15,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Export Sample Extension",
"Sample Export Renewal",
"Trial Export Extension",
"Prototype Shipment Renewal"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": null,
"slaText": null,
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 684,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "The Extension of Validity of Export Permit is a formal approval process managed by BEPZA that allows investors or companies within EPZs to extend the validity of their previously issued export permits. To apply, investors must submit a detailed application explaining the reasons for the extension and provide a copy of the original export permit. BEPZA evaluates the request to confirm that it complies with all regulatory guidelines and that no obligations are pending against the permit. Upon successful review, the export permit is officially extended, enabling the investor to continue export activities legally for the specified period. This approval ensures uninterrupted trade, maintains accurate permit records, and upholds compliance with EPZ regulations. Typically, the extension process is completed within two working days, providing a prompt and efficient service for businesses involved in export operations.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 685,
"order": 2,

}
}

},

{
"id": 418,
"attributes": {
"name": "Issuance of Import Sample Permit including extension, amendment & cancellation (If required)",
"description": "Issuance of Import Sample Permit is a service provided by BEPZA to allow companies within EPZs to import sample goods for testing, production, or quality verification purposes. This service also covers the extension, amendment, or cancellation of existing import sample permits if required. Companies must submit an application along with dues clearance certificates, IR clearance, NOC from customs and banks, and necessary court approvals in case of corporate restructuring. BEPZA reviews all documents to ensure regulatory compliance and proper documentation. Upon approval, the permit is issued or modified as requested, facilitating smooth import of sample goods while maintaining adherence to legal and procedural standards within Export Processing Zones.",
"shortDescription": "Issuance of Import Sample Permit including extension, amendment & cancellation (If required)\n",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T10:17:40.998Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T09:59:01.305Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-28T10:17:42.279Z",
"order": 16,
"locale": "en",

"Import Sample Permit Processing",
"Import Sample Approval Administration"
],

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 286,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "The Issuance of Import Sample Permit, including its extension, amendment, or cancellation, is a formal approval process administered by BEPZA for companies operating within EPZs. To obtain this permit, companies must submit a complete application along with dues clearance certificates from the concerned zone, IR clearance from the IR department, NOCs from customs and banks, and court approval documents if applicable, especially in cases of amalgamation or restructuring. BEPZA reviews all submitted documents to verify compliance with legal and regulatory requirements, ensuring the legitimacy of the import activities. Once the review is complete, the permit is either issued, extended, amended, or cancelled according to the request. This service ensures proper documentation, transparency, and adherence to EPZ regulations, supporting efficient import management of sample goods. Typically, the approval process is completed within five working days, providing investors and companies with timely and lawful facilitation for import-related operations.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

{
"id": 191,
"attributes": {
"name": "Recommendation for Exemption of Income Tax of Investor Company",
"description": "Once having Investment Project Registration at BHTPA OSS Portal, an Investor Company can apply for the Recommendations for Exemption of Income Tax from BHTPA for availing the incentive of exemption of income tax according to the S.R.O. No. 352/Law/Income Tax//2018, Date: 29 November, 2018 of the government. The government has exempted Income tax of investor companies from the date the company starts gaining income at Hi-Tech Parks as per the following:\n Rates: \n For the 1st to 7th years : 100%, \n For 8th to 10th years : 70%;\n Conditions:\n (1) The company shall seek Tax-payers Identification Number (TIN);\n (2) The company shall record account as per section 35 and submit income tax return in time under section 75 before the income tax authority.",
"shortDescription": "Recommendation for Exemption of Income Tax of Investor Company",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:54:49.222Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:08:12.881Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:54:50.752Z",
"order": 29,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Tax Exemption Approval (Investor)",
"Income Tax Waiver"
],
"ValidityTime": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration\n",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],

"id": 2223,

},

]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 174,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 175,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "After obtaining Investment Project Registration through the BHTPA OSS Portal, an Investor Company can apply for Recommendation for Income Tax Exemption from BHTPA. BHTPA reviews the application to ensure compliance and issues the recommendation to facilitate the exemption.\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}

{
"id": 258,
"attributes": {
"name": "Export Permit - Sample Export",
"description": "EZ unit investors must obtain a Sample Permit (Export) from BEZA-OSSC prior sending non-commercial product samples to overseas; for example- for testing, quality verification, demonstrations, or buyer evaluation. This permit is required for customs clearance and shipment through the Bangladesh Single Window (BSW) and ASYCUDA systems, even though the exported samples carry no commercial value.",
"shortDescription": "EZ unit investors must obtain a Sample Permit (Export) from BEZA-OSSC prior sending non-commercial product samples to overseas; ",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T10:11:05.807Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-17T14:27:07.059Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T10:11:06.604Z",
"order": 17,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Sample Export Permit",
"Permit for Exporting Samples",
"Authorization for Sample Export",
"Export Approval for Product Samples"
],
"ValidityTime": "30 days from the issue date till utilization.",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "30 days from the issue date till utilization.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "BDT 500+VAT 15%+Bank charge+VAT 15% on Bank charge",
"slaText": "1 working day (If there is no shortfall of documents or information)",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "ep",
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "BDT 500+VAT 15%+Bank charge+VAT 15% on Bank charge",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 3329,
"minTime": "0",
"maxTime": "1",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 32,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 32,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "\"1. Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010)\n 2. Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the “One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018” read with Section 11 of the “One Stop Service Act, 2018”\"\n",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 117,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Pre-Conditions for Applicants:\n  - The applicant company must obtain Investment Clearance and a Trade License from the BEZA-OSS portal.\n  - The company must obtain a Business Identification Number (BIN) and complete registration in the BSW system prior to applying for an Import Permit and simultaneously update BIN information in BEZA-OSS Portal.\n  - The company is required to provide periodic updates on investment and employment data through the BEZA-OSS portal. Failure to provide such data will result in ineligibility to apply for both Import Permits and Export Permits.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 118,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "STEP-1: Application Submission\n  Applicant submits application online through Bangladesh Single Window (BSW) at bswnbr.gov.bd along with required documents.\n  \n  STEP-2: Automated Scrutiny\n  BSW Risk Management System (RMS) performs automated checks and Application and documents are forwarded to BEZA One Stop Service (OSS) Portal.\n  \n  STEP-3: Decision and Issuance\n  BEZA-OSS reviews documents and information\n  ✅ If in order → Sample Permit (Export) issued.\n  ❌ If discrepancies (HS code mismatch, quantity, missing docs) → Shortfall Notice sent for correction.\n  \n  STEP-4: Forward to Customs\n  Upon approval, BEZA-OSS portal automatically forwards the permit to the BSW system for customs clearance processing",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 35,
"title": "Service Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"requiredDocumnetLIst": [
{
"id": 615,
"order": 1,
"name": "Commercial Invoice-Mandatory",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 616,
"order": 2,
"name": "Packing List-Mandatory",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 617,
"order": 3,
"name": "Consumption Statement (Declaration letter by the unit investor)-Mandatory",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 618,
"order": 4,
"name": " Forwarding letter-Optional",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 619,
"order": 5,
"name": "EXP form certified by Authorized Dealers (ADs)-Mandatory",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 620,
"order": 6,
"name": "Import Letter of Credit (L/C)/Purchase Order/Export Order etc.-Mandatory",
"description": null
}
]
}
}
},
{
"id": 179,
"attributes": {
"name": "Security Clearance",
"description": "Security Clearance in BHTPA refers to a mandatory verification process conducted by the Security Services Division (SSD) under the Ministry of Home Affairs of Bangladesh.\n \n It is required for foreign nationals who wish to work, invest, or stay in any Hi-Tech Park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA). The purpose of this clearance is to ensure national security and verify the background, nationality, and purpose of stay of the applicant.",
"shortDescription": "Security Clearance",

"description": "The e-TIN (Electronic Taxpayer Identification Number) for Companies is a unique identification number issued by the National Board of Revenue (NBR) to companies operating in Bangladesh. "description": "The New Trade License service under the Chattogram City Corporation (CCC) allows individuals and business entities to obtain official authorization to conduct business activities within the city limits of Chattogram. {
"id": 131,
"attributes": {
"name": "Land Use Plan",
"description": "Once having Investment Project Registration at BHTPA OSS Portal, a unit investor can apply for Land Allotment in accordance to the proposed plan within 15 (Fifteen) days of issuance of the Project Registration Certificate. However, actual allotted Land may not match with the area requested in the Project Registration application. After having the Land Allotment Letter, the unit investor shall at first submit the Land Use Plan (Showing position of Building(s), Access & Internal Road, Green Area, Setback line, Gate & Gate House etc.) along with Utility Connection Plan (Electricity, Water, Sewage, Rainwater, Fence etc.) to BHTPA for clearance within 3 (Three) months.",
"shortDescription": "Land Use Plan",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:06:26.847Z",
"updatedAt": "2025-12-02T08:59:27.941Z",

{
"id": 148,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 149,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "\"The approval of the Land Use Plan by BHTPA ensures that the investor’s proposed site layout and utility setup comply with park guidelines.\nAfter receiving the Land Allotment Letter, the investor must submit the Land Use Plan and Utility Connection Plan within 3 months for review.\nBHTPA evaluates the design, safety, and environmental aspects before granting final approval for project development.\"\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 180,
"attributes": {
"name": "Noc of Generator Establishment",
"description": "Once having Investment Project Registration at the BHTPA OSS Portal, a Park Developer or Unit Investor can apply for a No Objection Certificate (NoC) from Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) to establish a Generator, which is necessary for ensuring uninterrupted power supply within the park area.\n \n Before establishing a generator, the applicant must ensure that the setup is technically feasible, environmentally compliant, and meets all safety and regulatory standards.\n \n However, an investor can apply for a No Objection Certificate (NoC) for establishing a Generator through the BHTPA OSS Portal once it is registered in the portal and has been allocated land.",
"shortDescription": "Noc of Generator Establishment",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:45:57.528Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-16T06:24:43.205Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:45:58.381Z",
"order": 3,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Generator Installation NOC",
"Power Backup Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": "as per as approval authority\n",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "as per as approval authority",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "as per as approval authority",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],

"id": 1995,

"maxTime": "2",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,

}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 160,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 161,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval",
"description": "\"The approval of a No Objection Certificate (NoC) for establishing a generator in a BHTPA park ensures that the proposed installation meets technical, safety, and environmental standards set by the Authority.\nAfter the investor submits the application through the BHTPA OSS Portal, BHTPA reviews the feasibility, location, and compliance of the generator setup.\nOnce satisfied, BHTPA issues the NoC, allowing the investor to legally install and operate the generator within the park.\"\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 39,
"attributes": {
"name": "Fire eNOC Proposed",
"description": "A Bangladesh Fire Service & Civil Defense (FSCD) NOC Proposed Building is a building design that has been submitted to the FSCD for approval to ensure it meets fire safety regulations. The No Objection Certificate (NOC) is a certification that confirms the building's design complies with fire safety standards like the Bangladesh National Building Code (BNBC) and NFPA. It is a mandatory requirement for construction and includes details on fire detection, suppression, and evacuation systems. ",
"shortDescription": "Fire NOC Proposed is a building design that has been submitted to the FSCD for approval to ensure it meets fire safety regulations.",
"applicationUrl": "/forms/fire_enoc_proposed",

{
"id": 38,
"attributes": {
"name": "NOC Proposed Building",
"description": "A Bangladesh Fire Service & Civil Defence (FSCD) NOC Proposed Building is a building design that has been submitted to the FSCD for approval to ensure it meets fire safety regulations. The No Objection Certificate (NOC) is a certification that confirms the building's design complies with fire safety standards like the Bangladesh National Building Code (BNBC) and NFPA. It is a mandatory requirement for construction and includes details on fire detection, suppression, and evacuation systems. ",
"shortDescription": "NOC Proposed Building is a mandatory requirement for construction and includes details on fire detection, suppression, and evacuation systems. ",
"applicationUrl": "https://bidaquickserv.org/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-02T06:30:01.538Z",
"updatedAt": "2025-12-15T09:00:33.312Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-02T06:30:03.080Z",

"Fire Clearance Certificate"
],

},

{
"id": 1012,
"attributes": {
"name": "NOC Exiting Building",
"description": "The No Objection Certificate (NOC) for Existing Buildings, issued by the Bangladesh Fire Service & Civil Defence (FSCD), certifies that a building complies with national fire safety regulations. This NOC is mandatory for operating commercial, residential, or industrial buildings to ensure the safety of occupants and property.",
"shortDescription": "This NOC is mandatory for operating commercial, residential, or industrial buildings to ensure the safety of occupants and property.",

"id": 4,
"attributes": {
"name": "Investment Registration",
"description": "This service allows an investor to register their business / project within a BEZA‐declared Economic Zone via the BEZA OSS portal, thereby securing official registration of the investment as an industrial unit in an SEZ.",
"shortDescription": "Investment Registration",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-07-24T19:48:59.308Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-22T11:45:47.198Z",

"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"BIDA Registration",
"Investor Enrollment",
"Company Registration with BIDA",
"Investment Certificate"
],
"ValidityTime": "Once but can be amended on contexts of changes of Capital machineries, employment investment etc.",

"validityText": "Once but can be amended on contexts of changes of Capital machineries, employment investment etc.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "USD 500 + 15% VAT + Bank Charge (based on payment method)",

"fee": "USD 500 + 15% VAT + Bank Charge (based on payment method)",

"id": 207,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Investment Registration certifies that BEZA accepts the investor’s details (company, project, land allocation, investment commitment) and authorises their project to operate (subject to further clearances) within a BEZA economic zone. Its purpose is to formalise the investor’s status and allow them to proceed with operations and incentives under BEZA regulation.",
"title": "About the approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

"description": "As per OSS Act 2018 & OSS Rules 2018 the companies which fall under category A B C",

"data": null
}
}

{
"id": 1036,
"attributes": {
"name": "Electricity Generation License",
"description": "Electricity Generation License is an authorization issued by the Bangladesh Energy Regulatory Commission (BERC) that permits private sector entities to generate electricity on a commercial basis. The license is granted in accordance with the BERC Act and the Power Generation Tariff Regulations. Possession of this license is mandatory for selling electricity to the national grid.",
"shortDescription": "Electricity Generation License is an authorization issued by the Bangladesh Energy Regulatory Commission (BERC)",
