{
"id": 176,
"attributes": {
"name": "Visa Category Change with Visa Extension Recommendation",
"description": "A Unit Investor can apply for Visa Category Change with Visa Extension Recommendation in favor of a foreign national working with them. BHTPA is not the authority to change the Visa category and extension of Visa. BHTPA can only review and forward a Visa Category Change with Visa Extension Recommendation Letter to the Security Services Division (SSD), of Ministry of Home Affairs. Security Services Division (SSD) has the sole authority to approve or reject an application for visa category change. However, the draft “Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (Visa & Work Permit Guidelines-2024’’, may be followed, which is in the approval process. ",
"shortDescription": "Visa Category Change with Visa Extension Recommendation",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:43:30.945Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-16T04:49:42.838Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:43:31.760Z",
"order": 13,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Visa Upgrade and Extension",
"Visa Type Conversion Approval"
],
"ValidityTime": "as per as approval authority\n",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "as per as approval authority",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "as per as approval authority",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 1909,
"minTime": "5",
"maxTime": "7",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 52,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 52,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "One Stop Service Act, 2018 and One Stop Service (Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority) Regulations, 2019",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 155,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 473,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval ",
"description": "The approval authority for Visa Category Change with Visa Extension is the Security Services Division (SSD) under the Ministry of Home Affairs.\n \n The Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) is not the approving authority but acts as a recommending and forwarding agency. BHTPA reviews the application submitted by the unit investor and issues a recommendation letter to SSD for further action.\n \n The final approval or rejection of the Visa Category Change and Extension rests solely with the Security Services Division (SSD).",
"title": "About the Approval ",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"id": 55,
"title": "Required Documents",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{
"id": 1417,
"order": 1,
"name": "Copy of Passport ",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1418,
"order": 2,
"name": "\tCopy of Existing Visa",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1419,
"order": 3,
"name": "Photo of the Incumbent (JPG/JPEG/PNG; 300X300 Pixel Less than 500KB);",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1420,
"order": 4,
"name": " Signature of the Incumbent (JPG/JPEG/PNG; 80X300 Pixels, Less than 200KB);",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1421,
"order": 5,
"name": "Copy of Memorandum of Articles (in case of PI Visa);",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1422,
"order": 6,
"name": "Appointment Letter (in case of E-Visa for Employee);",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1423,
"order": 7,
"name": "Work Permit (if any)",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1424,
"order": 8,
"name": "TIN/eTIN",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1425,
"order": 9,
"name": "Security clearance issued by the Security Services Division, Ministry of Home Affairs in favor of the incumbent (if previously employed in Banglades",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1426,
"order": 10,
"name": "Documents supporting valid Reason for change request for visa category change with Visa Extension",
"description": null
}
]
}

{
"id": 195,
"attributes": {
"name": "Work Permit Amendment",
"description": "A Unit Investor may apply for making any changes of information in the work permit except the date of expiry. Work permit Amendment will allow to edit other information on the original application as deemed necessary and to have its approval from BHTPA. In case of extension of Work Permit another application entitled ‘Work Permit Extension’ may be executed. However, the Work Permit issue and management will be executed as per the draft “Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (Visa & Work Permit Guidelines-2021’’, which is in the approval process.\n",
"shortDescription": "Work Permit Amendment",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,

"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:14:27.145Z",

"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [

"Change in Employment Details"
],

{
"id": 182,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval",
"description": "A Unit Investor operating under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) may apply for an Amendment of a Work Permit to make changes to the information contained in the original work permit application — except the date of expiry.\n \n The Work Permit Amendment process allows the investor or company to edit or update details (such as designation, job role, passport information, or other relevant particulars) and obtain approval from BHTPA for those changes.\n \n If the purpose is to extend the duration of the work permit beyond its current expiry date, a separate application titled “Work Permit Extension” must be submitted through the BHTPA OSS Portal.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 182,
"attributes": {
"name": "Noc of Obtaining Foreign Loan",
"description": "An Industrial Enterprises/Investor Company at Hi-Tech Park may obtain credit facilities from abroad (including from parents, associates or shareholders), other associates in Bangladesh, other banks in Bangladesh (both long and short term, as the case may be) by following the instructions mentioned in chapter 16, section-II of GFET and its subsequent circulars. However, for obtaining medium and long term debt from abroad/OBUs of scheduled banks in Bangladesh by the enterprises of HTPs, applications for borrowing approvals shall have to be submitted to Bangladesh Bank through BHTPA following the procedures as mentioned in Paragraph 7, Chapter 15 of GFET. Refer to Foreign Exchange Transactions by the Enterprises of Hi-Tech Parks (HTPs) in Bangladesh (FE Circular No. 21, Date: May 16, 2019).\n Before obtaining a Foreign Loan, an Investor Company at Hi-Tech Parks needs to have a No objection Certificate (NoC) from BHTPA prior to apply for a Foreign Loan. An Industrial Enterprise/Investor Company can apply for No objection Certificate (NoC) through the BHTPA OSS Portal once it is registered in the Portal.",
"shortDescription": "Noc of Obtaining Foreign Loan",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:47:04.726Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-19T10:48:13.501Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:47:05.649Z",

}

{
"id": 165,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "Before applying for a foreign loan, an Industrial Enterprise or Investor Company at a Hi-Tech Park must obtain a No Objection Certificate (NoC) from BHTPA.\n BHTPA reviews the application to ensure the project is legally registered, compliant with park regulations, and eligible to borrow under the Foreign Exchange Transactions (GFET) guidelines.\n Once satisfied, BHTPA issues the NoC, enabling the investor to apply to Bangladesh Bank or authorized financial institutions for medium- or long-term foreign credit facilities.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 17,
"attributes": {
"name": "IRC Recommendation Third Adhoc",
"description": "\"The IRC Recommendation (Third Adhoc) approval is issued by BIDA for industrial organizations that have not imported at least 70% of their total half-yearly entitlement of raw materials or spare parts as per previous recommendations. This approval allows such companies to utilize the remaining unutilized portion of their entitlement within the approved limit for the same period. The Third Adhoc recommendation ensures that eligible investors can continue importing essential raw materials required for their ongoing production activities without disruption.\n\nBIDA grants this approval after verifying the company’s import performance, consumption report, and justification for non-utilization of the earlier entitlement. The process ensures that the remaining entitlement is used properly in line with the company’s approved project, production line, and BIDA’s investment regulations. This recommendation supports investors by providing flexibility in import management, enabling them to maintain steady production and achieve operational efficiency while staying compliant with the established import policy framework.\"\n",
"shortDescription": "IRC Recommendation Third Adhoc",
"applicationUrl": "https://bidaquickserv.org/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-07-29T07:27:13.911Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-12T12:49:36.036Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-07-29T07:27:16.050Z",
"order": 16,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"IRC Third Temporary",
"Final Adhoc IRC",
"Tertiary Import Certificate"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Year",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "1 Year",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Application Fee 250 Tk",
"slaText": "10 days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Application Fee 250 Tk",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],

"id": 845,

"type": "Days"
},

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 103,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Industrial enterprises that are already registered with BIDA and have previously obtained IRC Recommendations (Initial, First Adhoc, and Second Adhoc) are eligible to apply for the Third Adhoc IRC Recommendation. This recommendation is specifically for companies that have not imported at least 70% of their total half-yearly entitlement of raw materials, spare parts, or components.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 104,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "This approval is issued by BIDA to authorize the Third Adhoc IRC Recommendation for industrial organizations that have not imported at least 70% of their total half-yearly entitlement of raw materials or spare parts under previous recommendations. It allows such companies to utilize their remaining unutilized entitlement within the approved limit for the same period. The approval is granted after verifying the company’s import records, production and consumption data, and ensuring compliance with BIDA’s investment regulations. This measure helps genuine investors continue their import operations smoothly and supports uninterrupted industrial production. The approval confirms that the applicant organization has met the necessary conditions and is permitted to import the remaining portion of materials as per BIDA’s policy guidelines and approved project scope.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 1306,
"attributes": {
"name": "Insurance Company License",
"description": "The Insurer Registration (Insurance Company License) service is provided by the Insurance Development and Regulatory Authority (IDRA). Through this service, a company is issued a Registration Certificate (Primary License) to conduct life and non-life insurance business.\n\nApplications must be submitted in accordance with Sections 8 and 9 of the Insurance Act, 2010 and the Insurer Registration Regulations, 2013, along with the required documents and applicable fees. The processing fee is BDT 500,000, and BDT 100,000 is payable for each insurance class/sub-class, to be paid in favor of IDRA through pay order or bank draft.\n\nThe processing time is 20 working days. In case of rejection, the decision is communicated within 45 days. Further details are available at www.idra.org.bd",
"shortDescription": "The Insurer Registration (Insurance Company License) service is provided by the Insurance Development and Regulatory Authority (IDRA)",
"applicationUrl": "https://idra.org.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-23T04:36:39.082Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-23T04:59:12.691Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-23T04:45:26.289Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Insurance Company License",
"Insurance Business License",
"Insurance Operation Permit",
"Insurance Service Provider License"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "For issuance of the Registration Certificate, a non-refundable fee of BDT 500,000 is payable. In addition, a registration fee of BDT 100,000 is required for each insurance business class or sub-class. Applicable VAT and other taxes, if any, must be paid.",
"slaText": "20 working days; however, in the event of rejection, the applicant is notified within 45 working days.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "For issuance of the Registration Certificate, a non-refundable fee of BDT 500,000 is payable. In addition, a registration fee of BDT 100,000 is required for each insurance business class or sub-class. Applicable VAT and other taxes, if any, must be paid.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5761,
"minTime": "15",
"maxTime": "20",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 619,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{

},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1268,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Insurance Company License, also known as Insurer Registration, is one of the core institutional services provided by the Insurance Development and Regulatory Authority (IDRA). Without this Registration Certificate, no entity is permitted to conduct life or non-life insurance business in Bangladesh. The license is issued in accordance with Sections 8 and 9 of the Insurance Act, 2010, the Insurer Registration Regulations, 2013, and the Insurance Business Registration Fee Regulations, 2012.\n\nUnder the approval process, the applicant company must submit an application to IDRA in the prescribed form, along with all required supporting documents, including the company’s Memorandum and Articles of Association, particulars of directors, proof of paid-up capital, business plan, and other relevant information. Detailed laws, regulations, and application checklists are available for download from www.idra.org.bd\n\nFees:\nThe application processing fee is BDT 500,000, and the registration fee is BDT 100,000 for each insurance class or sub-class. Applicable VAT and other taxes, where required, must be paid in addition. All fees are to be deposited in favor of the Insurance Development and Regulatory Authority through bank draft or pay order.\n\nUpon submission of a complete and accurate application, a decision is generally issued within 20 working days. In the event of rejection, the applicant is informed of the reasons within 45 working days.\n\nThis registration framework ensures the regulated development of the insurance sector, protection of policyholders’ interests, and overall financial stability.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1269,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}

"id": 1039,
"attributes": {
"name": "Patent Registration",
"description": "The service of filing a patent application for the protection of a new invention is handled by the Department of Patents, Designs, and Trademarks (DPDT). It ensures legal protection of the inventor’s intellectual property and serves as the first step in the patent examination process.",
"shortDescription": "The service of filing a patent application for the protection of a new invention is handled by DPDT.",
"applicationUrl": "https://dpdt.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-02T08:05:52.916Z",

],

"id": 5863,
"minTime": "0",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1359,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The service of filing a patent application for the protection of a new invention is provided by the Department of Patents, Designs, and Trademarks (DPDT). It initiates the process of granting the inventor exclusive rights over their new invention. Filing the application establishes the invention’s filing date and opens the way for subsequent patent examination and approval.\n\nThe application must be submitted using the prescribed Form-1 (for general inventions) or Form-1A. Required documents include two copies of the Complete Specification with claims of the invention and, where applicable, drawings. Application forms, guidelines, and detailed information are available on the DPDT website.\n\nThe processing time for filing the application is only 1 working day. The fee is Tk. 2,000 (covering up to 10 claims and 25 pages), payable via pay order to the Registrar, DPDT, Dhaka. This process protects the invention commercially and encourages research and development.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 620,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{

"name": "Two copies of the Complete Specification with claims of the invention.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 4094,
"order": 3,
"name": "Drawings, where applicable.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 4096,
"order": 4,
"name": "Application forms, guidelines, and necessary information are available on the DPDT website.",
"description": null
}
]
}
}
},
{
"id": 1016,
"attributes": {
"name": "Company Registration",
"description": "Company Registration (under Section 23 of the Companies Act 1994) is the legal registration granted by the Directorate of Joint Stock Companies and Firms (RJSC) for the establishment of a limited company in Bangladesh. The application can be made through a completely online process, and the Certificate of Incorporation is usually issued within 30 days. The fee is automatically determined online.",
"shortDescription": "Company Registration (under Section 23 of the Companies Act 1994) is the legal registration granted. ",
"applicationUrl": "https://roc.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-11-13T10:29:30.895Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-20T05:09:41.015Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-11-13T10:35:03.578Z",
"order": 2,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Business Registration",
"Company Incorporation",
"Corporate Registration",
"Legal Entity Registration"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "As per the fee mentioned in Section-2 of the Companies Act (online automatic money receipt, bank deposit, and debit/credit/Visa card)",
"slaText": "30 days (as per Companies Act 1994)",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": "cr",
"serviceType": "cr",
"fee": "As per the fee mentioned in Section-2 of the Companies Act (online automatic money receipt, bank deposit, and debit/credit/Visa card)",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,

},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 757,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Company registration is a mandatory legal process for setting up a private or public limited company in Bangladesh as per Section 23 of the Companies Act, 1994. Without this registration, the company cannot legally conduct business. Registration is done by the Registrar of Joint Stock Companies and Firms (RJSC), and after successful registration, a Certificate of Incorporation is issued.The application is to be made completely online (roc.gov.bd). The main documents include the Memorandum and Articles of Association, detailed information of shareholders and directors (name, parents' names, address, nationality, NID/passport number, TIN, date of birth, mobile number, and passport-size photograph), scanned copies of signatures of the promoters and witnesses, Declaration (Form-1), Director's Consent (Form-9), and Encashment Certificate of Bangladesh Bank in case of non-resident shareholders.The registration fee is automatically determined as per Schedule 2 of the Companies Act and can be deposited in the bank or paid with an online money receipt or debit/credit card. Registration is usually completed within 30 days after verification of documents. Through this registration, the company gains a legal entity, and it is possible to open a bank account, obtain a trade license, etc.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 758,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"data": null
},
"requiredDocumnetLIst": [
{
"id": 3495,
"order": 1,
"name": "The online registration form must be completed and submitted along with the Memorandum and Articles of Association, ",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3496,
"order": 2,
"name": "The names of the shareholders, their father’s and mother’s names, addresses, nationality, voter ID number, TIN number (10 or 17 digits), or passport number. ",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3497,
"order": 3,
"name": "If a national ID is not available, the passport number of Bangladesh must be provided along with a scanned copy of the first page of the passport.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3498,
"order": 4,
"name": "Additionally, the date of birth, permanent address, present address, mobile number, number of shares, a passport-sized color photograph, and signatures of the promoters must be submitted. ",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3499,
"order": 5,
"name": "The names, NID numbers, mobile numbers, dates of birth, and signature pages of two witnesses must also be scanned and uploaded online.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3501,
"order": 6,
"name": "A scanned copy of the Declaration of Company Registration (Form 1) must be submitted online.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3507,
"order": 7,
"name": "Director's Consent (Form 9) and, for non-resident shareholders, a scanned Encashment Certificate issued by a bank as per Bangladesh Bank guidelines must be submitted online.",
"description": null
}
]
}
}
},
{
"id": 1088,
"attributes": {
"name": "Trade License - Renewal",
"description": "i. For entities located within Economic Zones, the Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA) is the competent authority to issue Trade License. Both EZ Unit Investors and EZ Developers shall apply for:\n  - Trade License,\n  - Renewal of an existing Trade License, and\n  - Amendment of a Trade License or Renewal of existing Tarde License Certificate (if required).\n  ii. Applications must be submitted online through the BEZA One Stop Service (OSS) Portal, accompanied by the prescribed documents and applicable fees.\n  iii. An application for a Trade License may be submitted after obtaining the Certificate of Incorporation from the Registrar of Joint Stock Companies and Firms (RJSC), or simultaneously while applying for Investment Clearance, and subsequently for other services.\n  v. The validity of a Trade License and its renewal is aligned with the Bangladesh fiscal year (July–June), commencing from the date of issue.\n  vi. Both EZ Unit Investors and EZ Developers shall be required to apply for renewal of the Trade License at least three (03) working days prior to the expiry date of the existing Trade License or its renewal certificate.",
"shortDescription": "For entities located within Economic Zones, the Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA) is the competent authority to issue Trade License.",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-17T14:07:41.061Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-22T04:43:50.621Z",
"publishedAt": null,
"order": 22,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Renewal of Trade License",
"Trade License Certificate Renewal",
"Extension of Trade License Validity",
"Trade License Reissue"
],
"ValidityTime": "× A Trade License shall be renewed annually, following the Bangladesh fiscal year (July–June).\n  × Applications for renewal of Trade License must be submitted and completed at least three (03) working days prior to the expiry date of the existing TL/RTL.",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "× A Trade License shall be renewed annually, following the Bangladesh fiscal year (July–June).\n  × Applications for renewal of Trade License must be submitted and completed at least three (03) working days prior to the expiry date of the existing TL/RTL.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "× 15% VAT on the fee",
"slaText": "The issuance or renewal of the Trade License shall be issued within three (03) working days, subject to submission of a complete application with all required information and documents.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": "tlr",
"fee": "× 15% VAT on the fee",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 3445,
"minTime": "1",
"maxTime": "3",
"type": "Days"
},

"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 282,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010):\n  Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018, read together with Section 11 of the One Stop Service Act, 2018",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 624,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Both EZ Unit Investors and EZ Developers",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 625,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The process of issuance and renewal of Trade Licenses shall be carried out in accordance with the following steps:\n  i. The applicant shall apply online through the BEZA-OSS Portal, submitting the duly filled Application Form (FORM-TL-01) along with the prescribed documents and applicable fees.\n  ii. The BEZA One Stop Service Center (OSSC) shall scrutinize, verify, and review the submitted documents and information.\n  iii. If all documents and information are found to be complete and accurate, the Trade License (TL) or Renewal of Trade License (RTL) shall be issued by BEZA OSSC.\n  a. In case of deficiencies or incomplete information, BEZA OSSC shall notify the applicant for submission of additional documents or corrections.\n  b. Upon compliance by the applicant, BEZA OSSC shall issue the TL/RTL Certificate.\n  iv. The applicant shall obtain the digitally signed TL/RTL Certificate by downloading it directly from the BEZA-OSS Portal.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"description": "Before starting the construction, investor requires to submit some initial drawing & design to BEZA for approval. {
"id": 194,
"attributes": {
"name": "Project Clearance Amendment",
"description": "To invest in BHTPA, obtaining a Project Registration is a must. The Project Registration is the process of accepting the proposed project as an investment under Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA). The Company shall submit monthly reports to the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority on the progress of implementation of the project until the Project Clearance Certificate is Issued. The Company shall have to obtain Project Clearance Certificate before commencing production. For obtaining the Project Clearance Certificate, the Company has to provide all permits, licenses, NOCs, clearances and certifications necessary to operate the business specified, to BHTPA. However, the Investor/the company also allowed to apply for the Amendment of the Project Clearance Certificate once submitted to upgrade with appropriate information and documents.\n",
"shortDescription": "Project Clearance Amendment",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:59:49.767Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:13:54.647Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:59:51.057Z",
"order": 40,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Update Project Approval",
"Modify Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,

"serviceType": "pcc",
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",

"type": "Days"
},

"actAndRulesDetails": "One Stop Service Act, 2018 and One Stop Service (Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority) Regulations, 2019",

]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 179,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 180,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval",
"description": "To invest under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA), obtaining a Project Registration is mandatory. This registration confirms that the proposed project has been officially accepted as an investment under BHTPA.\n \n After obtaining Project Registration, the company must regularly report its project progress:\n \n Monthly Progress Reports must be submitted to BHTPA until the Project Clearance Certificate (PCC) is issued.\n \n Before starting commercial production or operations, the company is required to obtain the Project Clearance Certificate (PCC) from BHTPA.\n \n To receive the PCC, the company must submit to BHTPA all relevant permits, licenses, NOCs, clearances, and certifications required to legally operate the business.\n \n Furthermore, the Investor or Company may apply for an Amendment of the Project Clearance Certificate at any time after submission, in order to update or upgrade information and attach relevant new documents.\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 68,
"title": "Required Documents",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"requiredDocumnetLIst": [
{
"id": 1491,
"order": 1,
"name": "Application Online through BHTPA OSS Portal in prescribed Form;Online through BHTPA OSS Portal in prescribed Form",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1492,
"order": 2,
"name": "Supporting document from the company in favor of the requested amendment;",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1494,
"order": 3,
"name": "Resolution of the board meeting (in case of change shareholder); ",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1493,
"order": 4,
"name": "Scanned copy of the lease agreement, if needed",
"description": null
}
]
}
}
},
{
"id": 196,
"attributes": {
"name": "Work Permit Extension",
"description": "Work Permit can be issued initially for 1 year. After that, Work Permit can be extended for a maximum of 4 years or less, leading to a maximum period of 05 (Five) years. Prior approval from BHTPA is required for submitting application for work permit extension beyond 5 years period in case of PI Visa. Extension Fee will be applicable at the rate of USD 100 per person per year. Any fraction of a year will be considered as full year and fees will be charged accordingly. The passport of the applicant must be valid for at least 1 (one) year with minimum 3 (three) months validity of the Visa. However, the Work Permit Extension will be executed as per the draft “Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (Visa & Work Permit Guidelines-2021’’, which is in the approval process.",
"shortDescription": "Work Permit Extension",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T09:03:05.063Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:14:55.678Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T09:03:06.600Z",
"order": 42,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Renewal of Work Permit",
"Employment Tenure Extension"
],

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 183,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 184,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval",
"description": "A Work Permit issued under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) is initially valid for 1 (one) year. It can then be extended for up to 4 additional years, allowing a maximum validity period of 5 (five) years in total.\n \n If an investor or company seeks to extend the work permit beyond 5 years, prior approval from BHTPA must be obtained — applicable particularly in the case of PI (Project Investor) Visas.\n \n The extension fee is set at USD 100 per person per year, and any part of a year is treated as a full year for fee calculation purposes.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

},

"name": "Copy of Passport must be valid for at least 1 (one) year with minimum 3 (three) months validity of the Visa.",
"description": null
},
{

{
"id": 210,
"attributes": {
"name": "Land Allotment Cancellation by Investor",
"description": "Once having Investment Project Registration at BHTPA OSS Portal, a unit investor can apply for Land Allotment in accordance to the proposed plan within 15 (Fifteen) days of issuance of the Project Registration Certificate. However, actual allotted Land may not match with the area requested in the Project Registration application. After issuing a Land Allotment Certificate, BHTPA can cancel the Land Allotment Certificate at any time if BHTPA is convinced to do the same without showing any reason. A unit investor can also request for cancellation of the Land allotted to the investor. Settlement of the issue may be resolved as per the terms and conditions as stated in the lease agreement (if any). However, cancellation of the allotted Land must be with the recommendation of Land/Space Allotment/Cancellation Committee of BHTPA. Before Cancellation process the business entity/Company needs to fulfill the following prerequisites:\n \n Prerequisites: \n § Shall have to pay all rents, fees, taxes and duties until the effective date of the application for Land Allotment Cancellation and have to obtain NOC and clearances from all relevant authorities, including NBR, SSD and Bangladesh Bank.\n § Shall have to pay demurrage (if any) as assessed by the Authority etc.",
"shortDescription": "Land Allotment Cancellation by Investor",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T09:12:21.933Z",

"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T09:12:22.782Z",

],

{
"id": 1024,
"attributes": {
"name": "Site clearance renewal",
"description": "The Location Clearance Certificate (LCC) Renewal is the process of renewing the location clearance for an industrial establishment after the expiry of the original certificate. This service is provided by the Department of Environment (DoE) to ensure that the industrial site continues to comply with environmental and regulatory standards.\n\nThe renewal process is generally completed within 30 working days upon submission of the application, along with the prescribed renewal fee and applicable VAT. This service ensures uninterrupted legal compliance for the operation of industrial facilities in Bangladesh.",
"shortDescription": "The Location Clearance Certificate (LCC) Renewal is the process of renewing the location clearance for an industrial establishment ",
"applicationUrl": "https://doe.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-12-15T05:19:06.558Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-20T05:49:21.929Z",

"order": 2,
"locale": "en",

"Site Clearance Extension",
"Reissuance of Site Clearance"
],

"applicationFeeText": "The fee must be deposited to the government treasury via Treasury Challan, Bank Draft, Pay Order, or other electronic payment methods.",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 884,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Location Clearance Certificate (LCC) Renewal is an essential service for industrial establishments under the Environment Conservation Act, 1995, and the Environment Conservation Rules, 1997. The LCC ensures that the site of the establishment is environmentally suitable and is generally valid for one year. Failure to renew after expiry renders the operation of the establishment legally non-compliant. This renewal is issued by the Department of Environment (DoE).\n\nRequired documents for renewal include a duly completed application form, proof of payment of the prescribed renewal fee and VAT (via treasury challan, bank draft, pay order, or electronic payment), compliance monitoring report (if applicable), and a copy of the previously issued LCC or renewal certificate.\n\nThe fee must be submitted to the government treasury through the prescribed channels. After document verification, the renewal certificate is typically issued within 30 working days. Without timely renewal, obtaining the Environmental Clearance Certificate (ECC) or other licenses may be delayed, and the establishment may face penalties.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 885,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"description": null
}

{
"id": 185,
"attributes": {
"name": "Local Purchase Permit",
"description": "All Hi-Tech Parks will be considered and treated as Warehousing Station as per the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Warehousing Station Rules-2015. Business/Industrial Enterprises may enjoy the Bonded warehouse facilities in the following manner. \n The government has exempted all import duties, regulatory duties, supplementary duties and value added tax of the industrial enterprises upon import of capital instruments and construction materials, subject to the following conditions:\n (1) The industrial Enterprises shall be registered under VAT;\n (2) During the import of goods, the information containing name, description, quantity of the goods might be approved and certified by the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority under this Circular (S.R.O. No. 212-Law//2015/49/Customs, Date: 01 July 2015).\n Provided that, such exemption shall not be applicable in importing the construction materials available in Bangladesh, i.e. MS Rod/Bar, Cement, Pre-fabricated building, Iron/Still sheet; \n (3) The said exemption shall not be applicable in importing the goods not directly related with construction and development of Hi-Tech Parks i.e. office equipment, air-conditioner, refrigerator, house hold appliances, foods & beverage and any other similar in nature consumable items.\n Industrial Unit of Hi-Tech Parks can enjoy the Bonded facilities and can import Capital Machineries and Spare Parts under Bonded facilities of Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Warehousing Station Rules-2015. Once an Industrial Unit is declared as Bonded Industry, it is allowed to Purchase the Capital Machineries and Spare Parts from any other bonded industry and from any non-bonded Industry under certain terms and conditions as stated in the Office Order No. 023/2021/Customs/, Nothi No.-08.01.0000.56.01.001.2020/238(4), Dated 22-09-2021 of NBR. \n In such cases the Business/Industrial Enterprises shall apply to the Authority in a prescribed Form (as attached at the end of the document) through BHTPA OSS Portal for seeking permission for the Local Purchase Permit.\n",
"shortDescription": "Local Purchase Permit",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:49:28.256Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:04:01.404Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:49:29.185Z",
"order": 26,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Domestic Purchase Authorization",
"Local Procurement Permit"
],
"ValidityTime": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration\n",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "lpp",
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 2094,
"minTime": "1",
"maxTime": "2",
"type": "Days"
},

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 168,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 169,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval",
"description": "An Industrial Unit in a Hi-Tech Park can apply through the BHTPA OSS Portal for a Local Purchase Permit to import or procure capital machinery and spare parts under the Bonded Facilities framework.\n \n BHTPA reviews the application to ensure compliance with the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Warehousing Station Rules-2015, related Customs/NBR regulations, and that the items are eligible for duty and VAT exemptions.\n \n Upon satisfaction, BHTPA issues the approval, allowing the unit to legally import or purchase capital machinery and spare parts from bonded or non-bonded industries under prescribed conditions.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 1203,
"attributes": {
"name": "ISP License",
"description": "The ISP License service, provided by the Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulatory Commission (BTRC), grants approval or amendments to Internet Service Provider licenses. Required documents include a copy of the license, details of network cabling, and the address of the NOC. This service is completed within just 10 days and is provided completely free of charge",
"shortDescription": "The ISP License service, provided by the Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulatory Commission (BTRC)",
"applicationUrl": "https://btrc.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1081,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The ISP License Approval service is a key administrative process of the Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulatory Commission (BTRC), which provides amendments, address changes, or other approvals for existing Internet Service Providers’ licenses. Through this service, license holders can update their network infrastructure and operational information, helping maintain regulatory compliance and quality standards in the telecom sector.\n\nRequired documents include a copy of the license (serving as proof of the existing license), detailed network cabling information (network diagram or topology), and the correct address of the Network Operation Center (NOC). After verification, BTRC ensures that the licensee is providing services in compliance with the regulations.\n\nThe service timeline is only 10 working days, providing applicants with a quick resolution without disrupting business operations. An attractive aspect of this service is that it is provided completely free of charge, reflecting accessibility and transparency in government services. The process has been further simplified through BTRC’s online portal or LIMS system, where everything from application submission to approval is completed digitally. This enables ISP operators to easily keep their licenses updated and contributes to improving the quality of internet services in the country.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1082,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 230,
"attributes": {
"name": "Trade License Renewal",
"description": "\"i. For entities located within Economic Zones, the Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA) is the competent authority to issue Trade License. Both EZ Unit Investors and EZ Developers shall apply for:\n - Trade License,\n - Renewal of an existing Trade License, and\n - Amendment of a Trade License or Renewal of existing Tarde License Certificate (if required).\n ii. Applications must be submitted online through the BEZA One Stop Service (OSS) Portal, accompanied by the prescribed documents and applicable fees.\n iii. An application for a Trade License may be submitted after obtaining the Certificate of Incorporation from the Registrar of Joint Stock Companies and Firms (RJSC), or simultaneously while applying for Investment Clearance, and subsequently for other services.\n v. The validity of a Trade License and its renewal is aligned with the Bangladesh fiscal year (July–June), commencing from the date of issue.\n vi. Both EZ Unit Investors and EZ Developers shall be required to apply for renewal of the Trade License at least three (03) working days prior to the expiry date of the existing Trade License or its renewal certificate.\"\n",
"shortDescription": "Trade License Renewal",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T09:38:36.078Z",
"updatedAt": "2025-12-29T03:59:39.518Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T09:38:36.894Z",
"order": 5,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Business License Renewal",
"Commercial License Extension",
"Trading Permit Renewal",
"License Renewal"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Years",

{
"id": 34,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "\"Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010):\n Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018, read together with Section 11 of the One Stop Service Act, 2018\"",
"actAndRulesFile": {

}

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 121,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Both EZ Unit Investors and EZ Developers\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 122,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "\"The process of issuance and renewal of Trade Licenses shall be carried out in accordance with the following steps:\n i. The applicant shall apply online through the BEZA-OSS Portal, submitting the duly filled Application Form (FORM-TL-01) along with the prescribed documents and applicable fees.\n ii. The BEZA One Stop Service Center (OSSC) shall scrutinize, verify, and review the submitted documents and information.\n iii. If all documents and information are found to be complete and accurate, the Trade License (TL) or Renewal of Trade License (RTL) shall be issued by BEZA OSSC.\n a. In case of deficiencies or incomplete information, BEZA OSSC shall notify the applicant for submission of additional documents or corrections.\n b. Upon compliance by the applicant, BEZA OSSC shall issue the TL/RTL Certificate.\n iv. The applicant shall obtain the digitally signed TL/RTL Certificate by downloading it directly from the BEZA-OSS Portal.\"\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 408,
"attributes": {
"name": "Extension of validity of Export Permit",
"description": "Extension of validity of Export Permit is a service provided by BEPZA to allow investors or companies to prolong the validity of their existing export permits when additional time is required for completing export activities. Applicants must submit a formal application explaining the reasons for requesting an extension along with a copy of the original export permit. BEPZA reviews the submission to ensure that the request is valid and compliant with regulatory requirements. Upon approval, the export permit’s validity is extended for the specified period, enabling the investor to continue export operations legally. This service ensures regulatory compliance, proper documentation, and continuity of trade activities within Export Processing Zones (EPZs).",
"shortDescription": "Extension of validity of Export Permit\n",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T10:11:42.914Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T09:57:27.074Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-28T10:11:44.100Z",
"order": 14,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Export Permit Extension",
"Export License Renewal",
"Export Authorization Extension"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": null,
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": null,
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": null,
"slaText": null,

},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": null,
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 284,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval",
"description": "The Extension of Validity of Export Permit is a formal approval process managed by BEPZA that allows investors or companies within EPZs to extend the validity of their previously issued export permits. To apply, investors must submit a detailed application explaining the reasons for the extension and provide a copy of the original export permit. BEPZA evaluates the request to confirm that it complies with all regulatory guidelines and that no obligations are pending against the permit. Upon successful review, the export permit is officially extended, enabling the investor to continue export activities legally for the specified period. This approval ensures uninterrupted trade, maintains accurate permit records, and upholds compliance with EPZ regulations. Typically, the extension process is completed within two working days, providing a prompt and efficient service for businesses involved in export operations.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

{
"id": 177,
"attributes": {
"name": "VISA On Arrival Assistance",
"description": "A foreign national willing to explore investment opportunity under Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority can apply for visa on arrival assistance directly from BHTPA, where there is no office of the Bangladesh Consulate in that country or in case where there is no sufficient time to have Visa prior visiting Bangladesh. The incumbent foreign national has to submit the visa on arrival assistance request by herself/himself to BHTPA through the BHTPA OSS Portal. Upon receiving the visa on arrival recommendation from BHTPA, the foreign national (Incumbent) can submit it along with other necessary papers at the Visa On Arrival Counter of the expected Port of Entry. It is to be noted that a visa recommendation from BHTPA does not guarantee issuing of visa. Issuing of visa is the sole prerogative of the concerned Bangladesh Mission.",
"shortDescription": "VISA On Arrival Assistance",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:44:07.359Z",

{
"id": 157,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Upon receiving a Visa on Arrival assistance request through the BHTPA OSS Portal, the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) reviews the application and issues a Visa on Arrival Recommendation Letter in favor of the foreign national. However, issuing the visa remains the sole authority of the concerned Immigration Authority at the Port of Entry in Bangladesh. BHTPA’s recommendation does not guarantee visa issuance, as the final decision rests with the Immigration Authority.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 491,
"attributes": {
"name": "Extension of Visa Period",
"description": "The Extension of Visa Period is a service provided by BEPZA that allows foreign employees working in Export Processing Zones (EPZs) to legally extend their visa validity. Applicants must submit an application along with a copy of their passport, including visa pages, and, if applicable, a copy of their work permit. The concerned zone office reviews the submitted documents to ensure compliance with legal and regulatory requirements. Once approved, the visa period is extended, allowing the foreign employee to continue working without interruption. This service ensures smooth operations for companies while maintaining proper legal documentation and regulatory compliance for foreign personnel in EPZs.",
"shortDescription": "Extension of Visa Period\n",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T11:00:42.280Z",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 290,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Extension of Visa Period service is administered by BEPZA to facilitate legal extension of visas for foreign personnel employed in Export Processing Zones. To obtain this extension, applicants must submit a formal application, a copy of their passport with relevant visa pages, and, where applicable, a copy of their work permit. The concerned zone office reviews the submission to verify the authenticity of the documents, the validity of the current visa, and compliance with labor and immigration regulations. Upon successful verification, the visa period is officially extended, ensuring that foreign employees can continue their employment seamlessly. This process helps companies maintain uninterrupted operations, ensures proper legal status of foreign workers, and promotes regulatory compliance within the EPZs. The typical processing timeline for this service is one working day, ensuring quick and efficient handling of visa extensions.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

{
"id": 15,
"attributes": {
"name": "IRC Recommendation (Regular)",
"description": "The IRC Recommendation (Regular) service offered by the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA) allows BIDA-registered industrial organizations to obtain a formal recommendation for the import of raw materials, spare parts, or both on a regular or recurring basis. Unlike the “New” recommendation, which is typically for first-time requests, the Regular recommendation is intended for companies that require ongoing import approvals to support uninterrupted production and maintenance activities. By issuing this recommendation, BIDA verifies that the requested materials are essential for industrial operations and compliant with national trade and industrial policies. Applicants must submit relevant documents, including updated company registration, previous IRC recommendations (if applicable), import schedules, technical specifications, and justifications for recurring imports. The service is processed through BIDA’s One Stop Service (OSS) portal, ensuring a transparent, efficient, and streamlined approval process. Once approved, the IRC Recommendation (Regular) serves as a supporting document for customs clearance and other regulatory procedures, enabling industrial organizations to maintain continuous operations and timely availability of necessary raw materials or spare parts in compliance with Bangladesh’s industrial regulations.\n",
"shortDescription": "IRC Recommendation (Regular)",
"applicationUrl": "https://bidaquickserv.org/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-07-29T07:25:40.711Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-13T05:41:16.904Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-07-29T07:25:42.815Z",
"order": 9,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Standard IRC",
"Regular Import Certificate",
"Routine Import Registration"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Year",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "1 Year",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Application 250 TK",
"slaText": "10 Days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "ircr",
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Application 250 TK",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],

},

"actAndRulesDetails": "Bangladesh Investment Development Authority Act, 2016",
"actAndRulesFile": {

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 94,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Once the IRC Recommendation (Regular) application is submitted through the BIDA One Stop Service (OSS) portal, the concerned officer reviews all submitted documents, including the company’s BIDA registration certificate, previous IRC recommendations (if any), import schedules, technical specifications, and justifications for recurring imports. BIDA verifies that the requested raw materials, spare parts, or both are essential for the company’s ongoing industrial operations and comply with national trade and industrial regulations. Upon successful verification, BIDA issues the IRC Recommendation (Regular), confirming the organization’s eligibility to import the specified materials on a recurring basis. This approval serves as an official supporting document for customs clearance and other regulatory procedures. It is recorded in BIDA’s official system to ensure proper monitoring and compliance, helping industrial organizations maintain continuous production and timely availability of necessary materials while adhering to legal requirements",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{

"description": "To apply for a BIDA IRC Recommendation, you must be a BIDA-registered manufacturing industry (not a commercial trader) with a verified factory location and Alrady adhoc recommanded form BIDA",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}

{
"id": 1062,
"attributes": {
"name": "Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) Certificate ",
"description": "The Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) Certificate is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) and certifies that a pharmaceutical manufacturing facility complies with international standards of production processes, quality control, and safety requirements. This certification ensures the acceptability of medicines in both export and domestic markets.",
"shortDescription": "The Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) Certificate is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA)",
"applicationUrl": "https://dgdagov.info/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-02T09:45:17.834Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-24T07:55:01.558Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-02T09:45:44.297Z",
"order": 5,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"GMP Compliance Certificate",
"Good Manufacturing Practice Accreditation",
"Pharmaceutical GMP Certification",
"Manufacturing Quality Compliance Certificate"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Free of Cost",
"slaText": "Processing Time: 90 working days from the receipt of complete application.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": "gmpc",
"serviceType": "gmp",
"fee": "Free of Cost",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 6169,
"minTime": "80",
"maxTime": "90",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 485,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 489,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "The Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) Certificate in Bangladesh is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) under the authority of the Drugs Act, 1940, the Drugs (Control) Ordinance, 1982, and the Drugs Rules, 1945. GMP compliance is mandatory for pharmaceutical manufacturing facilities to ensure quality, safety, and regulatory conformity. The certification follows national GMP guidelines aligned with WHO GMP standards and is a prerequisite for drug manufacturing, export approval, and regulatory licensing. Non-compliance may result in suspension or cancellation of operational licenses under applicable laws.",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1004,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "The Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) Certificate is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) in accordance with WHO GMP guidelines, following verification of a pharmaceutical manufacturing facility’s production processes, quality control systems, sanitation, personnel training, and documentation standards. Without this certificate, especially for export-oriented pharmaceutical production and marketing, compliance becomes difficult. The certification ensures consumer safety and facilitates access to international markets.\nThe required documents include the prescribed application form, a copy of a valid Drug Manufacturing License, factory layout plan, GMP compliance self-assessment report, quality manual, Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), batch records, validation reports, employee training certificates, equipment calibration reports, and recent inspection reports (if available). Applications must be submitted online through the ADLRS portal or using the prescribed forms of the DGDA.\nUpon receipt of a complete application, the processing time is approximately 90 working days, including site inspection and detailed evaluation. This certificate is issued free of charge. The GMP Certificate plays a vital role in enhancing pharmaceutical quality standards, promoting exports, and protecting public health.",
"title": "About The Approval ",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1007,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming soon",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 211,
"attributes": {
"name": "Space Allotment Cancellation by Investor",
"description": "Once having Investment Project Registration at BHTPA OSS Portal, a unit investor can apply for Space Allotment in accordance to the proposed plan within 15 (Fifteen) days of issuance of the Project Registration Certificate. However, actual allotted Space may not match with the area requested in the Project Registration application. After issuing a Space Allotment Certificate, BHTPA can cancel the Space Allotment Certificate at any time if BHTPA is convinced to do the same without showing any reason. A unit investor can also request for cancellation of the Space allotted to the investor. Settlement of the issue may be resolved as per the terms and conditions as stated in the lease agreement (if any). However, cancellation of the allotted Space must be with the recommendation of Land/Space Allotment/Cancellation Committee of BHTPA. Before Cancellation process the business entity/Company needs to fulfill the following prerequisites:\n Prerequisites: \n § Shall have to pay all rents, fees, taxes and duties until the effective date of the application for Space Allotment Cancellation and have to obtain NOC and clearances from all relevant authorities, including NBR, SSD and Bangladesh Bank.\n § Shall have to pay demurrage (if any) as assessed by the Authority etc.",
"shortDescription": "Space Allotment Cancellation by Investor",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T09:13:03.460Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:22:50.638Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T09:13:04.234Z",

"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [

"Premises Return"
],

{
"id": 1092,
"attributes": {
"name": "Captive Power Plant License",
"description": "Captive Power Plant License (BERC)\n\nA Captive Power Plant license is a permit issued by the Bangladesh Energy Regulatory Commission (BERC). It gives an industrial or commercial facility legal permission to generate electricity for its own use. This license is granted under the Bangladesh Energy Regulatory Commission Act, 2003.\n\nBased on available regulatory notices, BERC requires operators of captive power and standby generators above certain capacity levels to obtain an operating license.\n\nThe Policy Guidelines for Power Purchase from Captive Power Plant, 2007 outline conditions for power sale and grid connection when surplus power is produced. These guidelines require compliance with laws and tariffs approved by BERC for power purchase agreements.",
"shortDescription": "A Captive Power Plant license is a permit issued by the Bangladesh Energy Regulatory Commission (BERC).",
"applicationUrl": "https://berc.org.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-18T06:52:04.734Z",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 689,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Approval Process for Captive Power Plant License (BERC)\n\n• BERC manages license applications through its E-Licensing portal (elicense.berc.org.bd). Applicants use the portal to submit license requests online and upload required documents. \n\n• You must complete the official application form and attach supporting documents. The portal supports new license applications, renewals, and amendments for power sector licenses. \n\n• BERC reviews each application on technical, financial and environmental criteria before issuing the license. The online system tracks review, evaluation and back-office approval steps. \n\n• If you plan to sell surplus electricity to the grid, BERC follows the Policy Guidelines for Power Purchase from Captive Power Plant for tariff and power purchase agreement approvals. \n\n• The process ensures compliance with grid connectivity standards, safety and regulatory requirements before you can begin operation. Specific guidelines and forms are available on the BERC website and the E-Licensing portal.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 690,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "• Industrial or commercial entity\n• Environmental clearance\n• Compliance with technical standards\n• Grid connectivity for surplus power sale",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 371,
"attributes": {
"name": "Issuance of Project Sanction Letter",
"description": "Issuance of Project Sanction Letter is a key service provided by BEPZA for investors intending to establish industrial projects within Export Processing Zones (EPZs). The process involves submission of a complete project proposal along with all required documents, verification by the concerned desk officer, and approval by the Executive Chairman. Upon approval, a formal Sanction Letter is issued by the Member (IP) and an Allotment Letter by the GM (IP), enabling the investor to proceed with project implementation. This service ensures transparency, regulatory compliance, and proper facilitation for both local and foreign investors seeking to invest in EPZs. The process typically takes 5 working days.",
"shortDescription": "Issuance of Project Sanction Letter",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T09:24:11.863Z",

{
"id": 458,
"attributes": {
"name": "Extension of the lease/tenancy period for Plot/ SFB/ Piece of Land/ office space",
"description": "Extension of the lease/tenancy period for Plot, Standard Factory Building (SFB), Piece of Land, or Office Space is an official approval required to continue the lawful use of allotted premises beyond the originally approved lease or tenancy period. This service allows eligible lessees or tenants to extend their occupancy without interruption, subject to compliance with applicable rules and conditions. Applicants are required to submit a formal application along with a dues clearance certificate issued by the concerned Zone to confirm that all financial and administrative obligations have been fulfilled. The approval process ensures proper record management and uninterrupted operational continuity. Upon approval within the stipulated timeline, the lease or tenancy period may be extended without any applicable fees.",
"shortDescription": "Extension of the lease/tenancy period for Plot/ SFB/ Piece of Land/ office space\n",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T10:42:36.431Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T10:17:21.677Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-28T10:42:38.537Z",

"locale": "en",

"Plot / Office Space Tenure Renewal",
"Extension of Land / SFB Lease",
"Tenancy Period Renewal"
],

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 303,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "Extension of the lease/tenancy period for Plot, Standard Factory Building (SFB), Piece of Land, or Office Space is a mandatory administrative process for entities seeking to continue occupying allotted premises after the expiry of the initial lease or tenancy term. This approval ensures that continued occupancy remains compliant with institutional policies and regulatory requirements.\nTo obtain this extension, applicants must submit a formal application along with a dues clearance certificate from the concerned Zone, verifying that there are no outstanding financial or administrative liabilities. The submitted documents are reviewed by the competent authority to assess eligibility and compliance status.\nThe standard processing time for this service is 04 days, and no fee is applicable. Once the extension is approved, the applicant may lawfully continue using the allotted plot, factory building, land, or office space under the revised lease or tenancy terms and conditions.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 768,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply ",
"description": null,

}

{
"id": 264,
"attributes": {
"name": "Work Permit - Extension",
"description": "The applicant—either the employer/company or the concerned expatriate—shall submit the Work Permit Extension application online through the BEZA One Stop Service (OSS) Portal (https://oss.beza.gov.bd). The application must be accompanied by all required supporting documents and submitted at least 90 (ninety) days prior to the expiry of the existing Work Permit.",
"shortDescription": "The applicant—either the employer/company or the concerned expatriate—shall submit the Work Permit Extension application online through the BEZA",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T10:14:58.641Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-17T19:50:49.123Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T10:14:59.509Z",
"order": 24,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Work Permit Renewal",
"Employment Permit Extension",
"Work Authorization Renewal",
"Permit Extension"
],
"ValidityTime": "Extension: 4 Year Max",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Extension: 4 Year Max",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "BDT 10,000 per year + 15% VAT",
"slaText": "Nine (09) working days, subject to submission of a complete application with all required documents",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": "WPE",
"fee": "BDT 10,000 per year + 15% VAT",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 3597,
"minTime": "7",
"maxTime": "9",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 99,
"title": "Act And Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Act And Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 98,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "1. Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010)\n 2. Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the “One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018” read with Section 11 of the “One Stop Service Act, 2018”",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 241,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Step-1: Submission of Application\n The applicant—either the employer/company or the concerned expatriate—shall submit the Work Permit Extension application online through the BEZA One Stop Service (OSS) Portal (https://oss.beza.gov.bd). The application must be accompanied by all required supporting documents and submitted at least 90 (ninety) days prior to the expiry of the existing Work Permit.\n \n Step-2: Preliminary Review by BEZA-OSS\n Upon receipt of the application, BEZA-OSS conducts an initial review to verify the completeness of the submission and ensure compliance with the prescribed requirements, rules, and regulations.\n \n Step-3: Forwarding to the Work Permit Standing Committee\n In the event that the application is deemed complete and compliant, BEZA-OSS forwards the case to the Work Permit Standing Committee for its formal examination and decision.\n \n Step-4: Approval and Issuance of the Renewed Permit\n Upon approval by the Work Permit Standing Committee, BEZA-OSS proceeds with the issuance of the renewed Work Permit Certificate, duly reflecting the extended validity period.\n \n Step-5: Delivery of the Renewed Certificate\n The renewed Work Permit Certificate shall be made available to the applicant through the following means:\n - Via registered email address of the applicant; and\n - Direct download from the BEZA-OSS Portal.",
"title": "About the approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 242,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Foreign nationals employed in companies established within the jurisdiction of the Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA) are required to hold a valid Work Permit issued by BEZA. To continue their employment beyond the validity period of the existing permit, expatriates must apply for an Extension of Work Permit through the BEZA One Stop Service (OSS) Portal.",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 505,
"attributes": {
"name": "Permission for Bond-to-Bond Transfer, Machine Loan, and Repairing Machine",
"description": "This service provides permission for Bond-to-Bond transfer of goods, machine loans, and repairing of machines within Export Processing Zones (EPZs) under BEPZA supervision. Applicants must submit an application, invoice, sales contract, related import documents with bill of entry, and prior permission from the BEPZA Executive Office (as applicable). The fully digital process through the One Stop Service platform ensures approval within 02 working days.",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 300,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "The Permission for Bond-to-Bond Transfer, Machine Loan, and Repairing Machine service, facilitated through the One Stop Service platform, allows enterprises in Export Processing Zones to efficiently manage bonded goods and machinery under customs regulations. This permission is vital for inter-zone transfers, temporary loans of equipment, or repairs without breaking bond conditions, ensuring compliance while minimizing operational disruptions.\nThe process aligns with relevant customs and EPZ regulations, coordinated by authorities such as BEPZA. Required documents include a formal application, commercial invoice, sales contract, import-related documents along with the bill of entry, and any prior permission from the BEPZA Executive Office where applicable.\nApplications are submitted digitally via the OSS platform for swift verification of authenticity and compliance. Upon review, approval is granted within 02 working days, enabling enterprises to proceed with transfers, loans, or repairs seamlessly. Physical consultation is encouraged for complex cases or document preparation guidance.\nThis efficient service supports smooth supply chain management, reduces downtime for machinery maintenance, and reinforces the bonded warehouse benefits that attract export-oriented investments, contributing to enhanced productivity and competitiveness in Bangladesh's EPZs.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 754,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": null,
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
