{
"id": 372,
"attributes": {
"name": "Execution of the Agreement for Plot/ SFB/ Piece of Land",
"description": "Execution of the Agreement for Plot, Single Factory Building (SFB), or a piece of land is a service provided by BEPZA to formalize the allotment of industrial space to investors within Export Processing Zones (EPZs). Upon allotment of a plot or SFB, investors must execute a legally binding agreement specifying the terms and conditions for utilizing the allocated land. Investors are required to submit an application along with detailed supporting documents, such as repairing invoices and packing lists when applicable. The process ensures legal clarity, protects investor rights, and confirms compliance with BEPZA regulations. The service is designed to be efficient, typically completed within 3 working days, enabling investors to proceed with project implementation without delay.",
"shortDescription": "Execution of the Agreement for Plot/ SFB/ Piece of Land",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T09:24:50.576Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T09:41:09.901Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-28T09:24:55.522Z",
"order": 3,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Agreement Execution for Plot / SFB / Land",
"Signing of Land / Plot / SFB Agreement",
"Contract Execution for Plot / Facility / Land",
"Formalization of Plot / Land Agreement"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": null,
"slaText": null,
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": null,
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 3769,
"minTime": "2",
"maxTime": "3",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,

"title": "Acts and Rules",

"data": null
},

"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 279,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "The Execution of the Agreement for a Plot, Single Factory Building (SFB), or a piece of land is a formal approval process conducted by BEPZA to legally bind investors to the terms and conditions of the allotted industrial space. After a plot or SFB is allotted, investors must submit an application for executing the agreement along with necessary supporting documents, including invoices and packing lists for machinery or materials if applicable, mentioning the required repair time and other relevant details. BEPZA reviews these submissions to ensure all conditions are met before formalizing the agreement. Once executed, the agreement provides investors with the legal authority to occupy and utilize the allocated land, ensuring adherence to EPZ rules and regulations. This process protects both the investor and BEPZA, facilitating a smooth transition from allotment to project implementation. The typical timeline for disposal of this service is 3 working days.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 640,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply ",
"description": null,
"title": "Who can apply ",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}

{
"id": 181,
"attributes": {
"name": "Noc of Obtaining Bank Loan",
"description": "An Industrial Enterprises/Investor Company at Hi-Tech Park may obtain credit facilities from abroad (including from parents, associates or shareholders), other associates in Bangladesh, other banks in Bangladesh (both long and short term, as the case may be) by following the instructions mentioned in chapter 16, section-II of GFET and its subsequent circulars. \n However, in both the cases for obtaining a Foreign Loan or a Local Bank Loan, an Investor Company at Hi-Tech Parks needs to have a No objection Certificate (NoC) from BHTPA prior to apply for a Bank Loan. An Industrial Enterprise/Investor Company can apply for No objection Certificate (NoC) through the BHTPA OSS Portal once it is registered in the Portal.",
"shortDescription": "Noc of Obtaining Bank Loan",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:46:29.308Z",

"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 533,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Packaging Approval (DGDA) is governed under the Drugs Act, 1940, the Drugs (Control) Ordinance, 1982, and the Drugs Rules, 1945, which regulate labeling, packing, and safety requirements of pharmaceutical products in Bangladesh. The approval ensures that packaging materials, labeling information, batch details, storage instructions, and safety warnings comply with approved standards and regulatory guidelines. Compliance with DGDA-approved packaging is mandatory for manufacturing, product registration, and market distribution. Any deviation from approved packaging specifications may result in regulatory action, including suspension or cancellation of approval.",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},

{
"id": 262,
"attributes": {
"name": "Repatriation of Royalty Fee - In case of exceeding 6% annual sales on income Tax return on previous year",
"description": "The Approval for Repatriation of Royalty is a regulatory facilitation service provided by BEZA to unit investors in Economic Zones, enabling them to legally and efficiently remit royalty fees exceeding the 6% threshold of annual sales to foreign licensors.\n  The objective of this service is to establish a clear, transparent, and compliant framework for unit investors situated in BEZA Economic Zones to remit royalty payments to foreign firms in cases where the remittance amount exceeds six percent (6%) of the Annual Sales reported in the Income Tax Return of the previous financial year.\n  This ensures that royalty payments, particularly those relating to the use of intellectual property, trademarks, patents, and similar rights, are properly documented, verified, and aligned with Bangladesh’s regulatory and taxation requirements while protecting the legitimate interests of investors and licensors.",
"shortDescription": "Repatriation of Royalty Fee - In case of exceeding 6% annual sales on income Tax return on previous year",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T10:13:38.260Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-17T14:25:58.441Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T10:13:39.083Z",
"order": 21,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Royalty Payment Transfer",
"Royalty Remittance",
"License Fee Repatriation",
"Brand Fee Transfer"
],
"ValidityTime": "× The Letter of Approval issued by BEZA shall remain valid for a period of forty-five (45) days from the date of issuance.\n  × In cases where the amount of remittance does not exceed six percent (6%) of the Annual Sales of the previous year, the Applicant shall not be required to obtain prior approval from BEZA.",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "× The Letter of Approval issued by BEZA shall remain valid for a period of forty-five (45) days from the date of issuance.\n  × In cases where the amount of remittance does not exceed six percent (6%) of the Annual Sales of the previous year, the Applicant shall not be required to obtain prior approval from BEZA.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Application Fee: BDT 500 (Five Hundred Taka only)   × 15% VAT on the fee   × Applicable bank charges for processing the payment   × Plus 15% VAT on those bank charges",
"slaText": "The entire process, from submission of a complete application to issuance of the Letter of Approval, shall be completed within seven (07) working days, provided all documents are submitted in proper form.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Application Fee: BDT 500 (Five Hundred Taka only)   × 15% VAT on the fee   × Applicable bank charges for processing the payment   × Plus 15% VAT on those bank charges",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 3419,
"minTime": "5",
"maxTime": "7",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 98,
"title": "Act And Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Act And Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 97,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "1. Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010)\n2. Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the “One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018” read with Section 11 of the “One Stop Service Act, 2018”\n3. GFET Guideline 2018",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 239,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "Step 1: Submission of Application\n  • The applicant enterprise shall complete and submit the prescribed Application Form (RR-01) through the BEZA-OSS Portal, accompanied by all required supporting documents.\n  Step 2: Scrutiny by BEZA\n  • Upon receipt, the BEZA-OSS Cell shall review and scrutinize the application for completeness, accuracy, and compliance with applicable regulatory requirements.\n  • In case of deficiencies or discrepancies, the applicant shall be notified electronically through the OSS Portal and requested to provide clarifications or submit additional documentation.\n  Step 3: Evaluation and Approval\n  • If the application and accompanying documents are found to be complete, accurate, and satisfactory, the designated BEZA officer shall process for approval.\n  • A Letter of Approval authorizing repatriation of royalty shall be issued by BEZA and transmitted to the applicant electronically through the BEZA-OSS Portal.",
"title": "About the approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 240,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Unit investors/Industrial Units in",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 99,
"title": "Service Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"requiredDocumnetLIst": [
{
"id": 1751,
"order": 1,
"name": "Duly filled-in prescribed Application Form (RR-01) as available on the BEZA-OSSC website.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1752,
"order": 2,
"name": "Copy of the Royalty Agreement (e.g., agreement relating to patent use, trademark, intellectual property, or similar rights) signed between the Applicant and the Foreign Firm.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1753,
"order": 3,
"name": "Copy of Income Tax Return Certificate indicating the Annual Sales of the previous financial year.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1754,
"order": 4,
"name": "Evidence of receipt of services under the Royalty Agreement, issued by the Applicant, such as a copy of the invoice of the Foreign Firm, duly signed, sealed, and approved by the Applicant",
"description": null
}
]
}
}

{
"id": 23,
"attributes": {
"name": "Office Permission Amendment",
"description": "The Office Permission Amendment approval is issued by BIDA to authorize modifications to an existing office, branch, or representative office permission previously granted. This amendment may be requested for changes such as office address, contact details, authorized personnel, or other operational information. The purpose of the amendment is to ensure that BIDA’s records accurately reflect the current status of the organization’s office operations in Bangladesh.\n\nThe approval process involves verifying the company’s compliance with existing regulations, reviewing submitted documents, and confirming that the proposed changes align with the purpose of the original permission. This process helps maintain transparency and ensures that all office operations continue to adhere to BIDA’s policies and guidelines. By granting the Office Permission Amendment, BIDA facilitates seamless administrative updates while allowing the organization to operate without interruption. The approval demonstrates BIDA’s commitment to supporting investors and organizations in maintaining an accurate and up-to-date presence in Bangladesh, ensuring smooth coordination with local authorities, clients, and stakeholders.\n",
"shortDescription": "Office Permission Amendment",
"applicationUrl": "https://bidaquickserv.org/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-02T05:51:49.342Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-12T11:43:13.291Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-02T05:56:01.155Z",
"order": 18,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Office Approval Modification",
"Office Details Update",
"Commercial Space Amendment"
],
"ValidityTime": "Depends on Office Permission Year",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",

"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Application Fee 250 Tk and Government Fee 3000+ 15% Vat",

"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",

"id": 107,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Any company, branch office, or representative office that has previously obtained BIDA Office Permission is eligible to apply for an amendment. The applicant must be legally registered and in good standing with BIDA. Amendments can be requested for changes such as office address, contact information, authorized personnel, or other operational details related to the office.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 108,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "This approval is issued by BIDA to officially authorize amendments to an existing office, branch, or representative office permission. It confirms that the proposed changes—such as office address, contact details, authorized personnel, or other operational information—have been reviewed and accepted in accordance with BIDA regulations. The approval ensures that the organization’s records are up-to-date and that its office operations continue to function legally and efficiently. By granting this amendment, BIDA supports accurate documentation, smooth administrative management, and uninterrupted coordination with local authorities, clients, and stakeholders.\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 32,
"attributes": {
"name": "Temporary Account Opening (Sonali Bank)",
"description": "Sonali Bank's Temporary Account Opening service facilitates the opening of both foreign currency (FC) accounts and BDT for non-residents and expatriates, Exporter's Retention Quota (ERQ) accounts. These accounts allow Bangladeshi nationals working abroad, foreign nationals, foreign firms and exporters to maintain and manage foreign earnings in currencies like USD, GBP, EUR, or JPY and other approved currencies by BB.\n\nThe service supports quick account setup for receiving inward remittances, travel allowances, or export proceeds retention and other bonafide expenses as approved by BB. Accounts can be opened at authorized dealer (AD) branches with minimal initial deposits in some cases or zero initial deposit. Digital options via API connection with BIDA portal and Sonali eSheba app enable remote account opening for certain types. The accounts are operated in line with Bangladesh Bank guidelines.",
"shortDescription": "Sonali Bank's Temporary Account Opening service facilitates the opening of both foreign currency (FC) accounts and BDT.",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.sonalibank.com.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-02T06:22:10.640Z",

],

{
"id": 19,
"attributes": {
"name": "Office Permission Extension",
"description": "\"The Office Permission Extension approval is issued by BIDA to authorize the continuation of previously granted permission for operating an office, branch, or representative setup in Bangladesh beyond the original validity period. This extension ensures that the organization can legally maintain its administrative, liaison, or operational presence without disruption. The approval process involves verifying the organization’s compliance with existing regulations, submission of required documentation, and confirmation that the office continues to serve the purposes outlined in the initial permission.\n\nThis extension is typically requested by companies whose projects, business operations, or investment activities require continued administrative support, coordination, or representation in Bangladesh. By granting the Office Permission Extension, BIDA ensures that investors and organizations can continue their engagement with local authorities, clients, and stakeholders seamlessly. The approval reflects BIDA’s commitment to providing a stable and investor-friendly environment, enabling organizations to operate efficiently while adhering to regulatory requirements. It also confirms that the organization remains in good standing with BIDA and is authorized to maintain its office operations legally during the extended period.\"\n",
"shortDescription": "Office Permission Extension",
"applicationUrl": "https://bidaquickserv.org/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-07-29T07:29:49.328Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-12T12:08:38.365Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-07-29T07:29:51.214Z",
"order": 17,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Office Approval Extension",
"Office License Renewal",
"Commercial Space Extension"
],
"ValidityTime": "Depends on Extension Request Year",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "Depends on Extension Request Year",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Application fee 250 tk and Goverment fee 10,000+15% Vat For 1/2 years",
"slaText": "15 Days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Application fee 250 tk and Goverment fee 10,000+15% Vat For 1/2 years",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 105,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Any company, branch office, or representative office that has previously obtained BIDA Office Permission and whose permission is nearing expiration is eligible to apply for an extension. The applicant organization must be legally registered and in good standing with BIDA, and the office must continue to serve the purpose outlined in the original approval.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 106,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "This approval is issued by BIDA to officially authorize the extension of an existing office permission for a company, branch, or representative office in Bangladesh. It confirms that the organization is allowed to continue its administrative, liaison, or operational activities beyond the original validity period. The approval is granted after reviewing the company’s compliance with BIDA regulations, verifying submitted documents, and ensuring that the office continues to serve the purposes outlined in the initial permission. This extension facilitates uninterrupted office operations, allowing the organization to maintain its local presence, coordinate effectively with stakeholders, and continue engagement with relevant authorities.\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 489,
"attributes": {
"name": "Approval of WWA Committee",
"description": "This service grants official approval to the elected Executive Committee of the Workers' Welfare Association (WWA) in Bangladesh Economic Zones. Applicants must submit the result sheet of the WWA election. The entire process is conducted digitally through the One Stop Service platform and is completed within 02 working days, ensuring the committee can legally function and represent workers.",
"shortDescription": "Approval of WWA Committee\n",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T10:59:32.262Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T10:08:47.182Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-28T10:59:33.527Z",
"order": 24,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Workers' Committee Approval",
"Labor Committee Recognition",
"Employee Organization Leadership"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",

},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 298,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "The Approval of WWA Committee service, offered by the Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA), formalizes the elected Executive Committee of the Workers' Welfare Association after internal elections. This approval is essential so that the committee can lawfully carry out its duties, such as negotiating worker welfare issues, organizing activities, and liaising with management on behalf of employees.\nThe process operates under the Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010) and the One Stop Service framework. The only required document is the official result sheet of the WWA Executive Committee election, which must clearly show the names of elected members and the voting outcome.\nApplications are submitted and reviewed entirely online via the OSS platform. BEZA verifies that the election was conducted fairly and in accordance with the approved WWA constitution. Once verified, approval is issued within 02 working days, allowing the committee to begin its official functions immediately.\nPhysical consultation is encouraged if applicants need help preparing the result sheet or understanding election guidelines. This quick and transparent service strengthens democratic worker representation, promotes fair industrial relations, and supports a stable and productive environment in Bangladesh’s economic zones by ensuring that only properly elected committees are recognized and empowered.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 751,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply ",
"description": null,
"title": "Who can Apply ",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}

{
"id": 16,
"attributes": {
"name": "IRC Recommendation Second Adhoc",
"description": "\"The IRC Recommendation (Second Adhoc) approval is issued by BIDA to support the import of  raw materials, spare parts, or accessories required for the continued operation of an industrial project. This recommendation is provided to organizations that have already received an initial IRC recommendation and require further import facilities due to increased production demand, expansion, or shortage of previously approved materials. The Second Adhoc recommendation allows the investor to import essential items within a specified limit to ensure uninterrupted production and timely delivery of goods.\n\nThe purpose of this approval is to maintain smooth industrial operations while verifying that the requested materials are consistent with the company’s approved production line and project scope. BIDA evaluates the necessity and justification of the additional import quantity before issuing the recommendation. This process ensures that imported items are used solely for the approved project and in accordance with BIDA’s investment and industrial policies. The recommendation reflects BIDA’s commitment to facilitating business growth and supporting industrial investors in achieving their production targets efficiently.\"\n",
"shortDescription": "IRC Recommendation Second Adhoc",
"applicationUrl": "https://bidaquickserv.org/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-07-29T07:26:25.911Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-12T13:17:17.270Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-07-29T07:26:34.153Z",
"order": 15,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"IRC Second Temporary",
"Adhoc IRC Extension",
"Secondary Import Certificate"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Years\n",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "1 Years",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Application Fee 250 TK",
"slaText": "10 Days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Application Fee 250 TK",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 876,
"minTime": "5",
"maxTime": "10",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": {
"id": 168,

"investorType": null,
"investmentStage": null
},
"actAndRules": {

"title": "Acts and Rules",

"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 161,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Bangladesh Investment Development Authority Act, 2016",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 101,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Industrial enterprises that are already registered with BIDA and have previously obtained an IRC Recommendation (First Adhoc) are eligible to apply for the Second Adhoc IRC Recommendation. The applicant organization must be engaged in active production and require  raw materials, spare parts, or components to maintain or increase production levels.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 102,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "This approval is issued by BIDA to authorize the recommendation for the Second Adhoc Import Registration Certificate (IRC). It allows the concerned industrial organization to import raw materials, spare parts, or accessories beyond the quantities approved in the initial recommendation. The approval is granted after verifying the company’s production status, consumption report, and justification for the requirement. It ensures that the imports are consistent with the approved production line, investment project, and industrial policies of BIDA. The Second Adhoc recommendation aims to support uninterrupted industrial operations, helping the investor meet increased production demands and maintain smooth business continuity under the approved BIDA project.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 3,
"attributes": {
"name": "BIDA Registration Amendment",
"description": "The BIDA Registration Amendment approval is issued for updating or modifying the information previously approved under the existing BIDA Registration. This amendment may include changes in company ownership, management structure, address, production capacity, project cost, capital investment, machinery specifications, or other essential project details. The purpose of the amendment is to ensure that all records maintained by BIDA accurately reflect the company’s current operational and organizational status. The amendment process supports transparency and compliance with the Investment Act and BIDA’s regulatory framework. It also facilitates investors in maintaining up-to-date documentation for import permissions, IRC recommendations, work permit applications, and other investment-related approvals. Through this amendment, the company reaffirms its commitment to operating in accordance with BIDA’s policies and maintaining a smooth relationship with the regulatory authorities. The approval signifies that the proposed changes have been duly reviewed and accepted by BIDA after necessary evaluation of supporting documents and relevant project information.",
"shortDescription": "BIDA Registration Amendment",
"applicationUrl": "https://bidaquickserv.org/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-07-24T19:45:49.403Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-13T03:48:52.296Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-07-24T19:47:42.912Z",
"order": 14,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"BIDA Modification",
"Investment Registration Update",
"BIDA Details Change"
],

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 99,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Any company or organization that has already obtained a valid BIDA Registration Certificate is eligible to apply for an amendment. The applicant must be a legally registered business entity operating in Bangladesh under industrial, service, or trading categories. Amendments may be requested when there are changes in project information, such as ownership structure, shareholding pattern, company name, office or factory address, machinery list, production capacity, project cost, or other approved details.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 100,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "This approval is issued by BIDA to officially acknowledge and authorize the amendments made to the existing BIDA Registration of the organization. It confirms that the proposed changes—such as ownership details, management information, address, production capacity, project cost, or machinery list—have been duly reviewed and found acceptable under BIDA’s rules and investment policies. The approval ensures that the company’s registration records are updated and aligned with its current business operations. It also enables the investor to continue availing BIDA’s services, including import permissions, work permits, and other investment-related facilities, based on the revised registration information.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"title": "Who can Apply",

}
},
{
"id": 98,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The approval certifies that a remitting transaction (outward remittance) complies with the foreign exchange regulations (including permissible remittance categories, documentary support, AD processing) and is thereby permitted either under automatic AD approval or prior Bangladesh Bank approval through the AD. The purpose is to ensure regulatory control over foreign exchange flows and compliance with the Foreign Exchange Regulation Act, 1947.",
"title": "About the Approval",

}
}

"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 527,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Contract Manufacturing Approval in Bangladesh is regulated under the Drugs Act, 1940, the Drugs (Control) Ordinance, 1982, and the Drugs Rules, 1945, as enforced by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA). The approval ensures that outsourced manufacturing arrangements comply with approved product formulation, GMP standards, quality control, and licensing conditions. Both the contract giver and contract manufacturer must hold valid manufacturing licenses and regulatory compliance. Any violation or deviation from approved conditions may result in suspension, cancellation, or legal action under applicable laws.",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},

{
"id": 1187,
"attributes": {
"name": "Trade license renew",
"description": "Through this service, trade licenses for conducting business in the Dhaka North City Corporation (DNCC) area are renewed.\n\nApplicants must submit a photocopy of their National ID, a recent photograph, a copy of the old license book, and the application form, which can be downloaded for free from dncc.gov.bd.\n\nThe prescribed fee is deposited at Sonali Bank, and the renewal process is completed within just three working days.\n",
"shortDescription": "Trade license renew",
"applicationUrl": "https://dncc.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-21T12:50:58.228Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-22T05:31:44.462Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-21T13:28:25.811Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Trade License Renewal",
"Business License Renewal",
"Renewal of Commercial License",
"Renewal of Shop & Establishment License"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Annual renewal is done by depositing the prescribed fee at the relevant branch of Sonali Bank.",
"slaText": "Three (3) working days.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": "tlr",
"fee": "Annual renewal is done by depositing the prescribed fee at the relevant branch of Sonali Bank.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5466,
"minTime": "2",
"maxTime": "3",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 502,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 506,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Acts",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Content Coming Soon",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1038,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Trade License Renewal Service provided by Dhaka North City Corporation (DNCC) is essential for businesses to continue their legal operations. It is regulated under the Local Government (City Corporation) Act and ensures the legitimacy of business establishments.\n\nRequired documents for renewal include:\n\n• Photocopy of the National ID\n• Recent photograph\n• Copy of the old trade license book\n• Application form, available for free download from the DNCC website (dncc.gov.bd)\n\nThe fee is determined according to the service fee schedule on the DNCC website and must be deposited annually at the relevant Sonali Bank branch. The renewal record is maintained in the license book attached to the license.\n\nOnce the application is submitted, the DNCC authorities review and verify the documents, and the renewal is completed within just three working days. This fast service prevents unnecessary inconvenience for business owners and helps maintain the continuity of business operations. Direct consultation is also available if needed.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1039,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

]

{
"id": 198,
"attributes": {
"name": "Land Allotment Amendment",
"description": "Once having Investment Project Registration at BHTPA OSS Portal, a unit investor can apply for Land Allotment in accordance to the proposed plan within 15 (Fifteen) days of issuance of the Project Registration Certificate. However, actual allotted Land may not match with the area requested in the Project Registration application. After having the Land Allotment Letter, the unit investor may apply for the Land Allotment Amendment at BHTPA requesting desired changes in the land allotment within the Park.\n",
"shortDescription": "Land Allotment Amendment",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T09:04:08.655Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:15:37.820Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T09:04:09.473Z",
"order": 44,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Update Land Allotment",
"Change Plot Details"
],
"ValidityTime": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 2529,
"minTime": "5",
"maxTime": "10",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 69,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 69,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "One Stop Service Act, 2018 and One Stop Service (Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority) Regulations, 2019",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 187,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 188,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval",
"description": "Once a Unit Investor obtains the Investment Project Registration Certificate through the BHTPA OSS Portal, they are eligible to apply for Land Allotment within the designated Hi-Tech Park.\n \n The application for land allotment must be submitted within 15 (fifteen) days of receiving the Project Registration Certificate. The Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) evaluates the request based on the project’s nature, investment scale, and land availability.\n \n It should be noted that the actual allotted land area may differ from the area requested in the Project Registration application due to planning, zoning, and infrastructure considerations.\n \n After receiving the Land Allotment Letter, the investor may apply for a Land Allotment Amendment through the BHTPA OSS Portal if any modification, relocation, or adjustment in land allocation is required.\n \n All Land Allotment and Amendment applications are subject to approval by BHTPA, ensuring alignment with the Park Master Plan, land use policy, and investment priorities.\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 72,
"title": "Required Documents",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"requiredDocumnetLIst": [
{
"id": 1505,
"order": 1,
"name": "Application Online through OSS Portal in prescribed Form;",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1506,
"order": 2,
"name": "Land Allotment Letter",
"description": null
}
]
}
}

{
"id": 29,
"attributes": {
"name": "Import Permission",
"description": "The Import Permission service provided by the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA) enables BIDA-registered industrial organizations to obtain official authorization to import machinery and equipment that has already been approved as part of their BIDA registration. This service ensures that only pre-approved machinery necessary for industrial operations is imported in compliance with national trade and industrial policies. By issuing Import Permission, BIDA confirms that the requested machinery aligns with the organization’s approved investment project, facilitating a smooth customs clearance process and ensuring legal compliance. Applicants must submit relevant documents, including the organization’s BIDA registration certificate, technical specifications of the machinery, and any supporting purchase or import documentation. The application is processed through BIDA’s One Stop Service (OSS) portal, providing a transparent, efficient, and streamlined approval process. Once verified, BIDA issues the Import Permission, which serves as an official endorsement for customs authorities, enabling timely and lawful importation of pre-approved machinery. This service supports industrial organizations in maintaining operational efficiency while adhering to regulatory requirements.",
"shortDescription": "Import Permission",
"applicationUrl": "https://bidaquickserv.org/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-02T06:19:29.128Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-13T12:11:42.612Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-02T06:19:30.880Z",
"order": 10,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Import Approval",
"Import Authorization",
"Foreign Purchase Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Year",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "1 Year",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Application Fee 250 TK",
"slaText": "3 Days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Application Fee 250 TK",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 1046,
"minTime": "2",
"maxTime": "3",
"type": "Days"
},

"id": 268,

"investorType": null,
"investmentStage": null
},
"actAndRules": {
"id": 168,
"title": "Acts and Rules",

"actAndRulesDetails": "Bangladesh Investment Development Authority Act, 2016",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}

]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 95,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Foreign & Joint Venture Projects: Only industrial projects registered with BIDA as 100% Foreign or Joint Venture (JV).\n\nValid BIDA Registration: The project must have a valid registration letter from BIDA (Foreign/JV category).\n\nCapital Machinery Only: The import must be strictly for Capital Machinery (factory equipment) and not raw materials or commercial items",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 96,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "After submission of the Import Permission application through the BIDA One Stop Service (OSS) portal, the concerned officer reviews all submitted documents, including the company’s BIDA registration certificate, technical specifications of the machinery, and supporting purchase or import documents. BIDA verifies that the requested machinery is already approved under the organization’s BIDA registration and is necessary for the company’s industrial operations. Upon successful verification, BIDA issues the Import Permission, officially authorizing the organization to import the specified machinery. This approval serves as a supporting document for customs clearance and ensures compliance with national trade and industrial regulations. The approval is recorded in BIDA’s official system to facilitate monitoring and ensure that industrial organizations maintain operational efficiency while adhering to legal requirements.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 23,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

},
{

"order": 2,
"name": "Commercial Invoice",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 523,
"order": 3,
"name": "Bill of Lading/Air way bill/Consignment note.\t",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 524,
"order": 4,
"name": "Packing List",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 525,
"order": 5,
"name": "Certificate of Origin.\t",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 526,
"order": 6,
"name": "Survey report in case of used / running machinery.\t",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 527,
"order": 7,
"name": "Attachment of Company's Comments as per BIDA Requirement\t",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 528,
"order": 8,
"name": "Others necessary documents (please attach if any)",
"description": null
}
]
}
}

{
"id": 263,
"attributes": {
"name": "Work Permit - New",
"description": "All expatriates intending to work in companies established within the jurisdiction of the Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA) must obtain a valid Work Permit through the BEZA-OSS Portal. The Work Permit is issued based on visa type and is mandatory for lawful employment in Economic Zones.",
"shortDescription": "All expatriates intending to work in companies established within the jurisdiction of the Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA)",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T10:14:14.356Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-26T09:39:18.152Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T10:14:15.239Z",
"order": 23,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"New Employment Permit",
"Foreign Worker License",
"Work Authorization",
"Employment Visa"
],
"ValidityTime": "New : One Year",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "New : One Year",
"requiredDocumentText": "Documents required",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "BDT 10,000 + 15% VAT",
"slaText": "Nine (09) working days, subject to submission of a complete application with all required documents",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": "wp",
"fee": "BDT 10,000 + 15% VAT",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 6334,
"minTime": "7",
"maxTime": "9",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 285,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 284,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "1. Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010)\n 2. Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the “One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018” read with Section 11 of the “One Stop Service Act, 2018”",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 628,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "All expatriates intending to work in companies established within the jurisdiction of the Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA) must obtain a valid Work Permit through the BEZA-OSS Portal. The Work Permit is issued based on visa type and is mandatory for lawful employment in Economic Zones",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 629,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "1. The applicant (or employer) shall submit the Work Permit application online through the BEZA-OSS Portal: https://oss.beza.gov.bd, attaching all required documents within 15 (fifteen) days from the date of arrival of the expatriate in Bangladesh.\n 2. BEZA-OSS will review the application, information, and documents for completeness.\n 3. In case of a complete application, BEZA-OSS will forward the case to the Work Permit Standing Committee.\n 4. The Work Permit Standing Committee will review and approve the application.\n 5. Upon approval, BEZA-OSS issues the Work Permit Certificate.\n 6. The applicant may obtain the approved Work Permit certificate both:\n × Via email; and\n × By downloading it directly from the BEZA-OSS portal.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 1124,
"attributes": {
"name": "eNOC Exiting Building",
"description": "The eNOC (electronic No Objection Certificate) for Existing Building, available via the Bangladesh Fire Service and Civil Defence (FSCD) portal (enoc.fireservice.gov.bd), is required for buildings that are already constructed or partially built and seeking fire safety clearance. This approval verifies that the current structure adheres to fire prevention and protection requirements under the Fire Prevention and Extinguishing Act, 2003, and Bangladesh National Building Code (BNBC-2020), paving the way for fire license issuance or occupancy.\nApplicants must submit extensive documentation, including ownership deeds (or power of attorney), layout/site plans, a Google map highlighting the plot, fire fighting floor plans in 4 bound sets, membership certificate of the preparing engineer/architect, front road width certification from city corporation/municipality, land use clearance (if applicable), an undertaking on 300 Taka stamp paper for compliance, firm certification letter, photocopies of authority-approved plans for the existing building, and land development tax receipts where relevant.\nThe usual processing time is 60 working days, subject to extension if FSCD personnel are occupied with other duties or emergencies. Fees are calculated per square foot: 0.30 Taka for residential buildings and 0.50 Taka for commercial ones.\nThis eNOC is essential for legal operation, especially for commercial or multi-storied buildings already in use, and often follows or complements RAJUK/other authority approvals. It ensures retroactive or current compliance with fire safety norms, reducing hazards and supporting insurance or business continuity. Engaging licensed professionals for documentation helps avoid rejections and speeds up the process.",
"shortDescription": "The eNOC (electronic No Objection Certificate) for Existing Building,",
"applicationUrl": "https://fireservice.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-19T08:52:49.908Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-20T05:41:41.927Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-19T08:57:13.954Z",
"order": 8,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Existing Structure eNOC",
"Retroactive NOC",
"Building Clearance NOC",
"Current Building Approval"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Year\n",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "1 Year\n",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "0.30 tk for every square foot incase of residential building. 0.50 tk for every square foot incase of commercial building.",
"slaText": "60 working days mostly. But timeline may differ if manpower is engaged elswhere.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "0.30 tk for every square foot incase of residential building. 0.50 tk for every square foot incase of commercial building.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5095,
"minTime": "50",
"maxTime": "60",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 410,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 413,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "BNBC 2020, Fire Prevention Act 2025",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 854,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The eNOC (electronic No Objection Certificate) for Existing Building, available via the Bangladesh Fire Service and Civil Defence (FSCD) portal (enoc.fireservice.gov.bd), is required for buildings that are already constructed or partially built and seeking fire safety clearance. This approval verifies that the current structure adheres to fire prevention and protection requirements under the Fire Prevention and Extinguishing Act, 2003, and Bangladesh National Building Code (BNBC-2020), paving the way for fire license issuance or occupancy.\nApplicants must submit extensive documentation, including ownership deeds (or power of attorney), layout/site plans, a Google map highlighting the plot, fire fighting floor plans in 4 bound sets, membership certificate of the preparing engineer/architect, front road width certification from city corporation/municipality, land use clearance (if applicable), an undertaking on 300 Taka stamp paper for compliance, firm certification letter, photocopies of authority-approved plans for the existing building, and land development tax receipts where relevant.\nThe usual processing time is 60 working days, subject to extension if FSCD personnel are occupied with other duties or emergencies. Fees are calculated per square foot: 0.30 Taka for residential buildings and 0.50 Taka for commercial ones.\nThis eNOC is essential for legal operation, especially for commercial or multi-storied buildings already in use, and often follows or complements RAJUK/other authority approvals. It ensures retroactive or current compliance with fire safety norms, reducing hazards and supporting insurance or business continuity. Engaging licensed professionals for documentation helps avoid rejections and speeds up the process.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 855,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Anyone",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

},

},
{

"order": 5,

"description": null
},
{
"id": 3585,
"order": 6,

"description": null
},
{
"id": 3584,
"order": 7,
"name": "Certification from the city corporation / municipal authority regarding the width of the front road of the proposed plot",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3588,
"order": 8,
"name": "Land use clearance from the city corporation / municipality / development authority (for the proposed building)",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3587,
"order": 9,
"name": "Undertaking on 300 Taka stamp paper stating that the building will be constructed in compliance with Bangladesh National Building Code (BNBC-2020) and the Fire Prevention and Fire Fighting Act, 2003",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3586,
"order": 10,
"name": "Certification letter from the firm must be attached",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3589,
"order": 11,
"name": "Photocopy of the approved plan for existing buildings from the approving authority",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3590,
"order": 12,
"name": "Copy of the paid land development tax receipt according to the category of the proposed building",
"description": null
}
]
}
}

{
"id": 170,
"attributes": {
"name": "Work Permit",
"description": "Work Permit is mandatory for every foreign national willing to work at any Park(s) in Bangladesh. Foreign Investor willing to work in her/his own company at any Park will require Work Permit. Foreign nationals only from the countries where there are Diplomatic and Commercial relationship with Bangladesh are eligible for employment and investment in the country. Employment of expatriate personnel will be considered only in industrial/commercial establishments which are registered by Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority. According to the existing Visa Policy BHTPA can issue Work Permit to the foreign Nationals who is bearing only E-Visa (Employee), PI-Visa (Capital Investor). Persons below 18 years of age are not eligible for employment. Employment of foreign nationals are normally considered for a job for where local experts/technicians are not available. For having a Work Permit security clearance must be obtained from the Ministry of Home Affairs. Work Permit can be issued initially for 1 year. After that, Work Permit can be extended for a maximum of 4 years. For work permit, any fraction of a year will be considered as full one year. The passport of the applicant must be valid for at least 3 months more than the period of work permit requested and the validity of the Visa should also cover the requested period. However, the Work Permit issue and management will be executed as per the draft “Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (Visa & Work Permit Guidelines-2021’’, which is in the approval process.",
"shortDescription": "Work Permit",
"applicationUrl": "/investor/create-application",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:38:54.020Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-22T14:28:23.744Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:38:55.558Z",
"order": 7,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Employment Authorization",
"Foreign Worker Approval",
"Investor Staff Permit"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Years",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "1 Year",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "1 Year",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "wpnbhtpa",
"serviceType": "wp",
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 4931,
"minTime": "5",
"maxTime": "9",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 42,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 42,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "One Stop Service Act, 2018 and One Stop Service (Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority) Regulations, 2019",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 137,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 138,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "The approval of a Work Permit by BHTPA authorizes a foreign national to work legally within any Hi-Tech Park in Bangladesh.\n BHTPA reviews the application to ensure compliance with the Visa & Work Permit Guidelines (2021), verifying eligibility, visa type (E or PI), and required security clearance from the Ministry of Home Affairs.\n Upon satisfactory review, BHTPA issues the Work Permit—initially valid for 1 year and extendable up to 4 years—allowing the foreign professional or investor to operate lawfully in the park.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 45,
"title": "Required Documents",

{
"id": 1085,
"attributes": {
"name": "Work Permit Cancellation by Investor",
"description": "Once a work permit is issued by the authority against a foreign national upon request by the Unit Investor, a Unit Investor that is the employer can submit an application to BHTPA through OSS Portal for the cancellation of the Work Permit issued against the incumbent within 7 (seven) days after the suspension or resignation of the individual foreign national. Upon receiving the application BHTPA shall process and issue a cancellation of work permit letter and that will be circulated to all concerned.",
"shortDescription": "Work Permit Cancellation by Investor",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",

{
"id": 111,
"attributes": {
"name": "Fire license",
"description": "This license is crucial for getting other relevant license for business. Purpose. It ensure that the business compund is safe and hazard free to operate. ",
"shortDescription": "This license is crucial for getting other relevant license for business. Purpose. ",
"applicationUrl": "/forms/e-service-bridge/FSCDELR",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-02T08:48:12.638Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-22T14:36:30.421Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-02T08:48:14.046Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Fire Safety License",
"Fire Service Clearance",
"Fire Safety Approval",
"Fire Protection Permit"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Year",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "1 Year",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Depends on business and structure type",
"slaText": "15 working days mostly. But timeline may differ if manpower is engaged elswhere.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "firel",
"serviceType": "fsl",
"fee": "Depends on business and structure type",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5081,
"minTime": "10",
"maxTime": "15",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 393,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 396,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "BNBC 2020, Fire Prevention Act 2025",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 826,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Fire License, officially known as the Fire Safety Certificate or License from the Bangladesh Fire Service and Civil Defence, is essential for operating any business, factory, commercial establishment, or high-rise building in Bangladesh. It ensures that the structure meets required fire safety norms, reducing risks of fire hazards and enabling safe evacuation during emergencies.\nTo obtain the license, applicants must submit several key documents, including a valid Trade License, an Approved Fire Safety Plan (mandatory for high-rise structures), Fire Safety NOC (for high-rise buildings), detailed structural drawings, Articles of Memorandum, Income Tax Certificate, and proof of ownership—either a Deed if the applicant owns the property or a Contract Agreement if it is rented or owned by another party.\nThe approval timeline is generally 15 working days, though it may extend if the department's manpower is engaged in other priorities or emergencies. Fees are not fixed and depend on factors such as the type of business (e.g., factory, shop, or warehouse) and the structure's size, height, and risk category.\nThis license is crucial for legal compliance and is often required for obtaining or renewing other permits, such as occupancy certificates or business operations licenses. Regular inspections may follow issuance to verify ongoing adherence to safety standards. Applicants are advised to ensure all fire safety installations (extinguishers, alarms, hydrants, etc.) are functional before applying to avoid delays or rejection.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 827,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Anyone",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 376,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"requiredDocumnetLIst": [
{
"id": 3535,
"order": 1,
"name": "Trade License",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3536,
"order": 2,
"name": "Approved Fire Safety Plan (for Highrise Structure)",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3537,
"order": 3,
"name": "Fire Safety NOC(for Highrise Structure)",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3538,
"order": 4,
"name": "Drawing of Structure",
"description": null
},
{

"description": null
},
{

"description": null
},
{

"description": null

{

{
"id": 1225,
"attributes": {
"name": "Trade license issuance",
"description": "Through the Trade License Issuance Service of Sylhet City Corporation, businesses are granted legal permission to operate.\n\nRequired Documents:\nTwo recent passport-sized color photographs of the applicant\nOne 4R-size photograph of the business premise\nCopy of ownership or rental agreement\nCopy of National ID card or birth certificate\n\nApplication: Applications can be submitted online via https://tradelicence.scc.gov.bd\n\nProcessing Time: The process is generally completed within 5 working days.\nFee Payment: Fees can be paid through bank, bKash, or online card payment.",
"shortDescription": "Through the Trade License Issuance Service of Sylhet City Corporation, businesses are granted legal permission to operate.",
"applicationUrl": "https://scc.portal.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-22T06:17:46.944Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-22T06:33:32.556Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-22T06:22:53.543Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Trade License Issuance",
"Business License Issuance",
"Commercial License Grant",
"Shop & Establishment License Issuance"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "(a) Through Bank (b) Mobile Banking (bKash) (c) Online (Debit/Credit Card)",
"slaText": "5 (Five) working days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "(a) Through Bank (b) Mobile Banking (bKash) (c) Online (Debit/Credit Card)",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5566,
"minTime": "4",
"maxTime": "5",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 549,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 553,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Acts",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1128,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Trade License Issuance under Sylhet City Corporation is a mandatory legal approval for conducting business activities. Without this license, no business can legally operate within Sylhet city, as it serves as proof of business legitimacy and tax compliance to the local authority.\n\nThe application process is simple and fully digital. Applications can be submitted online via https://tradelicence.scc.gov.bd\n, or offline at the License Branch (Room No. 202).\n\nRequired Documents:\n\nTwo recent color photographs of the applicant\nOne 4R-size photograph of the business premises\nCopy of ownership proof or rental agreement of the business premises\nCopy of the applicant’s National ID card or birth certificate\nAfter verification of the submitted documents, the license is issued within 5 working days.\n\nThe fee is determined based on the type and size of the business and can be checked on the official website. Payments can be made conveniently through bank transfer, mobile banking (bKash), or online using debit/credit cards.\n\nObtaining this license provides legal protection to business operators and enables them to access banking services, participate in tenders, and enjoy other official benefits seamlessly.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1131,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 437,
"attributes": {
"name": "Permission for taking machine as loan basis (Inter Zone, Intra Zone & DTA)",
"description": "Permission for taking machine as loan basis (Inter Zone, Intra Zone & DTA) is an official approval required for temporarily transferring machinery on a loan basis between EPZ units, zones, or from the Domestic Tariff Area (DTA). This permission ensures that the movement and usage of machinery comply with applicable regulatory and administrative requirements. Applicants must submit an application along with supporting documents such as invoice, agreement executed on non-judicial stamp as prescribed by the Government, and a dues clearance certificate if required. The approval process helps maintain transparency, accountability, and proper record-keeping of machinery movement. Upon obtaining permission within the stipulated timeline, the machinery can be lawfully transferred and utilized for the approved purpose without any applicable fees.",
"shortDescription": "Permission for taking machine as loan basis (Inter Zone, Intra Zone & DTA)\n",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T10:33:15.877Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T10:15:18.063Z",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 759,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Permission for taking machine as loan basis (Inter Zone, Intra Zone & DTA) is a mandatory administrative approval designed to regulate the temporary transfer and use of machinery among EPZ units, between different zones, or from the Domestic Tariff Area. The objective of this approval is to ensure proper monitoring, control, and compliance with existing rules governing machinery movement and utilization.\nTo obtain this permission, the applicant is required to submit a formal application along with relevant documents, including a valid invoice, a loan agreement executed on non-judicial stamp paper of government-prescribed value, and a dues clearance certificate where applicable. These documents are reviewed by the competent authority to verify ownership, purpose, and compliance status.\nThe standard processing time for this approval is 05 days, and no fee is applicable. Once approved, the machinery may be transferred and used on a loan basis in accordance with the approved terms and conditions.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 760,
"order": 2,

"id": 1094,
"attributes": {
"name": "BERC License",
"description": "BERC License is a mandatory authorization required for electricity generation, transmission, and distribution activities in Bangladesh. It is issued in accordance with the BERC Act, 2003 and the License Regulations, 2006. Conducting electricity business without a valid license is strictly prohibited. The licensing process ensures proper tariff regulation, safety compliance, and competitive practices in the electricity sector.",
"shortDescription": "BERC License is a mandatory authorization required for electricity generation, transmission, and distribution activities in Bangladesh",

{
"id": 165,
"attributes": {
"name": "NOC for STP Establishment",
"description": "Sewage treatment, or domestic wastewater treatment, is the process of removing contaminants from wastewater and household sewage, both runoff (effluents) and domestic. It includes physical, chemical, and biological processes to remove physical, chemical and biological contaminants. Its objective is to produce a waste stream (or treated effluent) and a solid waste or sludge suitable for discharge or reuse back into the environment.\n \n Once having Investment Project Registration at BHTPA OSS Portal, a Park Developer or an unit investor can apply for having a No objection Certificate (NoC) from BHTPA for establishing a STP, which is deemed necessary for the environment. Before establishing a STP the Park Developer or unit investor needs to consider, whether it is feasible or justified in terms of technical and physical point of view. \n \n However, an Investor can apply for No objection Certificate (NoC) for establishing a STP through the BHTPA OSS Portal once it is registered in the Portal and have been allocated a piece of Land.",
"shortDescription": "NOC for STP Establishment",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:33:26.397Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:11:23.949Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:33:27.216Z",
"order": 35,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Sewerage Plant NOC",
"Wastewater System Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],

"type": "Days"
},

"actAndRulesDetails": "One Stop Service Act, 2018 and One Stop Service (Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority) Regulations, 2019",

}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 129,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 130,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval",
"description": "The approval of the No Objection Certificate (NoC) for establishing a Sewage Treatment Plant (STP) ensures compliance with environmental, technical, and safety standards set by BHTPA.\n After obtaining Project Registration and Land Allotment, a Park Developer or Unit Investor can apply for the NoC through the BHTPA OSS Portal.\n BHTPA reviews the feasibility, environmental impact, and technical justification of the proposed STP before granting final approval.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 54,
"attributes": {
"name": "Import registration certificate",
"description": "Commercial Import Registration Certificate (IRC) is a mandatory authorization required for importing goods on a commercial basis in Bangladesh. It is issued by the Chief Controller of Imports and Exports (CCI&E). Applications can be submitted through the Online Licensing Management (OLM) portal at olm.ccie.gov.bd, and the service is generally processed within three working days.",
"shortDescription": "The Industrial IRC (First Adhoc) is a crucial, temporary import license issued by the Chief Controller of Imports & Exports (CCI&E).",
"applicationUrl": "https://olm.ccie.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-02T06:55:56.831Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T11:09:28.770Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-02T06:55:58.408Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Commercial Import License",
"Import Permit Certificate",
"Authorized Import Registration",
"Official Import Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Year",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "1 Year",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "The prescribed fee for the said service, as specified in Schedule–A, may be paid online in the form of an e-challan through the OLM system after submission of the application.",
"slaText": "3 working days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "irc",
"serviceType": "irc",
"fee": "The prescribed fee for the said service, as specified in Schedule–A, may be paid online in the form of an e-challan through the OLM system after submission of the application.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 4959,
"minTime": "2",
"maxTime": "3",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 416,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{

}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 868,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Commercial Import Registration Certificate (IRC) is a mandatory authorization required for any individual or business entity in Bangladesh to import goods for commercial purposes. It is issued under the authority of the Chief Controller of Imports & Exports (CCI&E) through the Online Licensing Module (OLM) portal.\n\nThe application process is entirely online. Applicants must complete the prescribed form on the OLM portal and upload color scanned copies of the required documents. Key documents include a treasury challan (covering the registration fee and 15% VAT), a valid trade license, e-TIN certificate, bank solvency certificate from a nominated bank, chamber or trade association membership certificate, National Identity Card, any additional licenses required for specialized businesses, partnership deed (for partnerships) or Certificate of Incorporation and Form XII (for limited companies), and the latest income tax return acknowledgment receipt.\n\nThe prescribed fees must be paid online through the portal in the form of an e-challan. Upon successful verification of documents, the IRC is generally issued within three working days. Commercial importation without a valid IRC is not legally permitted, and the certificate is subject to annual renewal.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 869,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"description": null
},
{

"description": null
},
{

"name": "Bank solvency certificate issued by the nominated bank;",
"description": null
},
{

"description": null
},
{

"description": null
},
{

},

"description": null

"description": null
}
]
}

{
"id": 384,
"attributes": {
"name": "Issuance of Visa Recommendation",
"description": "Issuance of Visa Recommendation is a service provided by BEPZA to facilitate the employment of foreign nationals within Export Processing Zones (EPZs). This recommendation allows investors to hire skilled foreign employees when suitable Bangladeshi candidates are not available. Applicants must submit an application stating the reason for appointing foreign staff, along with appointment letters, passports, educational and experience certificates, paper advertisements published in national newspapers, and a list of applicants. BEPZA reviews the documents to ensure compliance with regulations before issuing the visa recommendation. The process is designed to be swift, typically completed within one day, enabling investors to hire the required foreign personnel efficiently while maintaining regulatory oversight.",
"shortDescription": "Issuance of Visa",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T09:40:33.594Z",

{
"id": 1308,
"attributes": {
"name": "Microcredit NGO License",
"description": "The Microcredit NGO License is an authorization issued by the Microcredit Regulatory Authority (MRA) that grants NGO-MFIs legal permission to operate microfinance activities. It promotes transparency, accountability, and supports poverty alleviation efforts.",
"shortDescription": "The Microcredit NGO License is an authorization issued by the Microcredit Regulatory Authority (MRA)",
"applicationUrl": "https://mra.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-23T05:06:19.318Z",

],

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1272,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Microcredit NGO License is issued by the Microcredit Regulatory Authority (MRA), which oversees and regulates the activities of NGO-based microfinance institutions (NGO-MFIs) in Bangladesh. Under the Microcredit Regulatory Authority Act of 2006, obtaining this license is mandatory for operating microfinance activities. It ensures transparency, accountability, and promotes poverty alleviation and financial inclusion.\n\nApplications must be submitted using the MRA’s prescribed form along with the required supporting documents. The application form and detailed guidelines are available on the MRA website (www.mra.gov.bd\n\nThe processing time is generally completed within the period specified in the MRA’s published notifications. Fees are determined according to MRA regulations. This license plays a crucial role in the orderly development of the microfinance sector and in ensuring consumer protection.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

"id": 1273,
"order": 2,

{
"id": 1071,
"attributes": {
"name": "Remittance Approval",
"description": "Sonali Bank's Remittance Approval service handles both inward and outward foreign remittances in compliance with Bangladesh Bank rules. Inward focuses on wage earners'/NRB funds via global exchange houses, subsidiaries (USA/UK), and direct channels for instant credit or cash payout across 1200+ branches.\nOutward covers approved purposes like imports, travel, education, medical, or dividends. The bank offers swift processing through dedicated wage earners' branches, RMS software for quick disbursement, and modes like TT, DD, or SWIFT. This service ensures secure, regulatory-compliant transfers, encouraging formal channels with incentives, bonuses, and wide accessibility for expatriates, businesses, and individuals.",
"shortDescription": null,
"applicationUrl": null,
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-16T11:12:31.087Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-16T11:35:38.092Z",

"Remittance Authorization",
"Approval of Remittance Transaction",
"Remittance Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": "Inward: Instant-24 hours; Outward: 1-3 days for standard, longer if BB approval needed.",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Inward: Instant-24 hours; Outward: 1-3 days for standard, longer if BB approval needed.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Inward: Often free with incentives; Outward: BDT 500-1,500 + SWIFT/postage + VAT/correspondent charges as per SOC.",
"slaText": "Inward: Instant-24 hours; Outward: 1-3 days for standard, longer if BB approval needed.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Inward: Often free with incentives; Outward: BDT 500-1,500 + SWIFT/postage + VAT/correspondent charges as per SOC.",

"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 540,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Here is a concise 3–4 sentence government-style explanation:\n\nMaximum Retail Price (MRP) Approval is governed under the Drugs Act, 1940 and the Drugs (Control) Ordinance, 1982, which empower the DGDA to regulate the pricing of pharmaceutical products in Bangladesh. The process ensures that retail prices of medicines and medical products are fixed, transparent, and compliant with regulatory guidelines. DGDA evaluates product composition, production cost, and market standards before granting MRP approval. Any violation of approved MRP may result in regulatory action, including fines, suspension, or cancellation of approval.",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
