{
"id": 192,
"attributes": {
"name": "Recommendation for Exemption of Income Tax of Park Developer",
"description": "Once having Investment Project Registration at BHTPA OSS Portal, a Park Developer can apply for the Recommendations for Exemption of Income Tax from BHTPA for availing the incentive of exemption of income tax according to the S.R.O. No. 229-Law/Income Tax/2015, Date: 08 July 2015 of the government. The government has exempted Income tax of the Park Developers from the date the developer starts gaining income at Hi-Tech Parks as per the following: \n Rates: \n For the 1st to 10th years : 100%\n 11th year- : 70% \n 12th year : 30%\n Conditions:\n (1) The developer shall be a company as per Section (2), Sub-section (20) of the Income Tax Ordinance;\n (2) The developer shall seek Tax-payers Identification Number (TIN);\n (3) The developer shall record account as per section 35 and submit income tax return in time under section 75 before the income tax authority.",
"shortDescription": "Recommendation for Exemption of Income Tax of Park Developer",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:55:32.957Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:08:48.339Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:56:14.808Z",
"order": 30,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Tax Exemption Approval (Developer)",
"Income Tax Waiver for Park"
],
"ValidityTime": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,

"type": "Days"
},

"title": "About the Approval",

{
"id": 1352,
"attributes": {
"name": "Narcotics License",
"description": "Special license issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration for the export, storage, and wholesale of narcotic drugs (controlled substances). It ensures legal management of strictly controlled substances, prevents misuse, and allows commercial activities in compliance with national and international laws.",
"shortDescription": "Special license issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration for the export, storage, and wholesale of narcotic drugs",
"applicationUrl": "https://dnc.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-23T17:15:55.492Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-24T11:48:01.806Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-23T17:24:21.491Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Narcotics License",
"Controlled Substances License",
"Drug Handling License",
"License for Narcotic Management"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "License fee of Tk. 20,000/- payable to the Department’s office through a treasury challan under Economic Code 1610401-1142101 at Bangladesh Bank / Sonali Bank",
"slaText": "45 days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": "dnc",
"fee": "License fee of Tk. 20,000/- payable to the Department’s office through a treasury challan under Economic Code 1610401-1142101 at Bangladesh Bank / Sonali Bank",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,

},

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1402,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The license for the export, storage, and wholesale of narcotic drugs is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration and is strictly regulated under the Narcotics Control Act and relevant international conventions. Without this license, the export, storage, or wholesale of narcotic drugs is completely prohibited and considered a criminal offense.\nRequired documents for application include the prescribed application form, recommendation letter from the Directorate General of Drug Administration, updated trade license and copy of the drug manufacturing license, land deed or rental agreement, facility layout, export registration certificate, income tax certificate, fire service and environmental clearance, police verification report, list of equipment and employees, certificates of employed pharmacists/chemists, annexure of drug production, and recommendation letters from the relevant district and divisional offices.\nThe processing time is 45 days. The license fee is Tk. 20,000, payable through a treasury challan under Economic Code 1610401-1142101 at Bangladesh Bank or Sonali Bank. This license plays a crucial role in preventing drug misuse, protecting public health, and ensuring the lawful supply of medicines.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1403,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 2,
"attributes": {
"name": "IRC Recommendation New",
"description": "The IRC Recommendation (New) service provided by the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA) enables industrial organizations registered with BIDA to obtain official recommendations for importing raw materials, spare parts, or both necessary for their industrial operations. This recommendation is a prerequisite for applying for the Industrial Raw Materials Clearance (IRC) from relevant authorities, facilitating smooth importation while ensuring compliance with Bangladesh’s trade and industrial regulations. By issuing this recommendation, BIDA confirms the organization’s eligibility and validates that the requested materials are essential for production or maintenance of industrial machinery. Applicants must provide proper documentation, including the company’s BIDA registration certificate, import justification, technical specifications of raw materials or spare parts, and any other supporting documents. The service is conducted through BIDA’s One Stop Service (OSS) portal, streamlining the approval process, improving transparency, and reducing administrative delays. The IRC recommendation ensures that industrial units can maintain uninterrupted production, secure necessary components, and adhere to national industrial policies while importing essential materials legally.",
"shortDescription": "IRC Recommendation New",
"applicationUrl": null,
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-07-20T11:05:01.717Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-13T06:19:43.447Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-07-20T11:05:11.439Z",
"order": 8,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Import Registration Certificate New",
"IRC Application",
"Import License Recommendation"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Year",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "Validity",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Application Fee 250 TK",
"slaText": "10 Days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Application Fee 250 TK",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 1015,
"minTime": "5",
"maxTime": "10",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 92,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 92,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Bangladesh Investment Development Authority Act, 2016",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 92,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "After submission of the IRC Recommendation (New) application through the BIDA One Stop Service (OSS) portal, the concerned BIDA officer reviews all submitted documents, including the company’s registration certificate, technical specifications, import justification, and any supporting evidence. The evaluation ensures that the requested raw materials or spare parts are essential for the industrial organization’s production or machinery maintenance and comply with national industrial and trade regulations. Once verified, BIDA issues the IRC Recommendation, officially confirming the organization’s eligibility to import the specified materials. This recommendation serves as a supporting document for customs clearance or other regulatory approvals required for importing raw materials, spare parts, or both. The approval is recorded in BIDA’s system for compliance monitoring and ensures that industrial operations can continue smoothly with legally sanctioned imports.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 234,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "To apply for a BIDA IRC Recommendation, you must be a BIDA-registered manufacturing industry (not a commercial trader) with a verified factory location",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"id": 232,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "This approval certifies that BIDA has reviewed and formally approved the requested changes to the original work permit, ensuring that the permit remains valid and legally aligned with the updated employment or personal data of the expatriate.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 233,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Foreign nationals who wish to work in Bangladesh in organizations registered with the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA) are eligible to apply for a new Work Permit amend. This includes investors, experts, technical specialists, and senior officials employed in industrial, commercial, or service-oriented enterprises approved by BIDA. The sponsoring company or employer must initiate the application on behalf of the foreign employee through the BIDA One Stop Service (OSS) portal.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 93,
"title": "Required Document",
"tabMenuName": "Document",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

"order": 1,
"name": "Copy of board resolution regarding the amendment",
"description": "Copy of board resolution regarding the amendment"
},
{

"order": 2,
"name": "Reason for the amendment",
"description": "Reason for the amendment"
},
{
"id": 1703,
"order": 3,
"name": "Copy of latest visa/work permit issued by BIDA",
"description": "Copy of latest visa/work permit issued by BIDA"
},
{
"id": 1704,
"order": 4,
"name": "Documents supporting the amendment (e.g., updated passport, appointment letter, new job title or address)",
"description": "Documents supporting the amendment (e.g., updated passport, appointment letter, new job title or address)"
}
]
}
}
},
{
"id": 27,
"attributes": {
"name": "Work Permit Extension",
"description": "The Work Permit (Extension) service under the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA) allows foreign nationals already holding valid work permits to renew or extend their authorization to work in Bangladesh. This service ensures the continued legal employment of foreign experts, investors, and professionals in organizations that are duly registered and approved by BIDA. Through the extension process, companies can retain skilled foreign employees essential for ongoing industrial or business operations, maintaining consistency and productivity. Applicants must submit the original work permit, company recommendation letter, updated passport, renewed employment contract, and other required documents as proof of continued service and necessity. The extension application must be submitted online through the BIDA One Stop Service (OSS) portal before the expiry of the current permit. Upon verification and approval, BIDA issues an extended work permit with updated validity, which also supports visa renewal or extension by the Department of Immigration and Passports. This streamlined process ensures compliance with national labor and investment regulations while facilitating the smooth continuation of foreign-assisted projects in Bangladesh.",
"shortDescription": "Work Permit Extension",
"applicationUrl": "https://bidaquickserv.org/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-02T06:17:39.299Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-13T10:29:11.667Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-02T06:17:42.054Z",
"order": 5,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Renewal of Work Permit",
"Employment Tenure Extension"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Year",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "Validity",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Application fee 250 TK and Government fee 10000 + 15% vat",
"slaText": "Work Permit New (BIDA/ Foreign) 3 Days and Work Permit New (BIDA/ Commercial)16 Days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": "WPE",
"fee": "Application fee 250 TK and Government fee 10000 + 15% vat",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 1069,
"minTime": "10",
"maxTime": "16",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 175,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 174,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Bangladesh Investment Development Authority Act, 2016",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 87,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "The extended Work Permit issued by BIDA is typically valid for the duration approved during the extension process, which usually aligns with the employment contract and visa validity. The exact period may vary depending on the company’s requirements and BIDA’s assessment. Applicants are advised to apply for an extension before the current work permit expires to ensure uninterrupted legal employment in Bangladesh.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 88,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "After submission of the Work Permit Extension application After submission of the Work Permit Extension application through the BIDA One Stop Service (OSS) portal, the concerned officer reviews all submitted documents, including the current work permit, company recommendation letter, updated employment contract, and passport information. BIDA evaluates whether the foreign employee’s continued employment aligns with national labor regulations and the company’s approved operations. Upon verification and satisfaction that all criteria are met, BIDA grants approval and issues an extended Work Permit with a revised validity period. This approval allows the foreign national to continue working legally in Bangladesh and serves as an essential document for visa renewal or extension with the Department of Immigration and Passports. The approval is recorded in BIDA’s official database to ensure proper compliance and monitoring.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {

},

{
"id": 448,
"attributes": {
"name": "Permission/Extension for export on CM/CMP/ CMT basis",
"description": "Permission/Extension for export on CM/CMP/CMT basis is an official authorization required for exporting goods under Cut and Make (CM), Cut, Make and Pack (CMP), or Cut, Make and Trim (CMT) arrangements. This permission or its extension ensures that export activities are conducted in compliance with applicable regulations and approved contractual terms. Applicants must submit a formal application along with a valid manufacturing or processing agreement executed on non-judicial stamp paper of government-prescribed value, and a dues clearance certificate if required. The approval process facilitates regulated export operations while ensuring accountability, transparency, and proper compliance with institutional requirements. Upon approval, exporters may proceed with export activities within the stipulated timeframe without any applicable fees.",
"shortDescription": "Permission/Extension for export on CM/CMP/ CMT basis\n",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T10:38:43.289Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T10:16:39.197Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-28T10:38:46.550Z",
"order": 27,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"CM/CMP/CMT Export Approval",
"Export Permission on CM/CMP/CMT Basis",
"CM/CMP/CMT Export Permit & Extension",
"Approval for Export under CM/CMP/CMT Scheme"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,

"isRedirection": null,

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 302,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "Permission/Extension for export on CM/CMP/CMT basis is a mandatory regulatory approval designed to control and monitor export operations carried out under CM, CMP, or CMT contractual arrangements. This approval ensures that manufacturing, processing, and export activities align with approved agreements and relevant export policies.\nTo obtain this permission or extension, exporters are required to submit a formal application along with a manufacturing or processing agreement executed on non-judicial stamp paper of a value prescribed by the Government. Where applicable, a dues clearance certificate must also be provided to confirm compliance with financial and administrative obligations. The submitted documents are carefully reviewed by the competent authority to ensure authenticity and regulatory conformity.\nThe standard processing time for this service is 07 days, and no fee is applicable. Once approval is granted, exporters may continue or extend their export operations in accordance with the approved terms and conditions.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

{
"id": 248,
"attributes": {
"name": "Visa Recommendation",
"description": "This service allows investors and companies operating within BEZA‑declared economic zones to obtain a visa recommendation letter from BEZA, which supports their application for investor or expatriate visas in Bangladesh.",
"shortDescription": "This service allows investors and companies operating within BEZA‑declared economic zones to obtain a visa recommendation letter from BEZA,",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T09:57:00.744Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-22T14:25:06.490Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T09:57:01.536Z",
"order": 6,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Visa Recommendation Letter",
"Recommendation for Visa Issuance",
"Official Visa Recommendation",
"Endorsement for Visa Approval"
],
"ValidityTime": "One time per expatriate",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "One time per expatriate",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "500 BDT + 15% VAT",
"slaText": "Processing times vary depending on the respective Bangladesh Mission abroad.  - Applicants are advised to check with the specific Mission for indicative timelines.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",

{
"id": 88,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "1. Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010)\n 2. Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the “One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018” read with Section 11 of the “One Stop Service Act, 2018”",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 222,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The approval (visa‑recommendation letter) certifies that BEZA recognises the applicant’s investment or employment in a BEZA zone and endorses their request for a relevant visa (e.g., investor visa or expatriate visa). It helps enable legal residence or work in Bangladesh under the zone framework.",
"title": "About this approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 223,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "3.1. Foreign nationals/expatriates intending to:\n3.1.1. Invest or engage in business in an Economic Zone;\n3.1.2. Work pursuant to an agreement between the Government of Bangladesh and any development partner organization; or\n3.1.3. Accompany the principal visa holder as dependent family members,\nare required to obtain a Visa Recommendation from BEZA through the BEZA-OSSC",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 274,
"attributes": {
"name": "Security clearance related services - Security Clearance for Work Permit Extension",
"description": "Work Permit extensions may be granted for a maximum period of up to four (04) years, subject to the approval of the competent authority.\n - Expatriates and their employers are strongly advised to ensure the timely submission of extension applications in order to avoid any interruption or discontinuation of lawful employment.\n - Submission of valid tax compliance documents and Security Clearance is mandatory for the processing and approval of all Work Permit extension applications.\n - BEZA reserves the authority to request any additional documents, information, or clarifications deemed necessary during the course of the review and approval process.",
"shortDescription": "Security clearance related services - Security Clearance for Work Permit Extension",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T10:20:35.289Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-18T05:30:00.795Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T10:20:36.941Z",
"order": 26,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Work Permit Extension Security Check",
"Renewal Security Clearance",
"Extension Background Verification"
],
"ValidityTime": "Work Permit extensions may be granted for a maximum period of up to four (04) years, subject to the approval of the competent authority.M20",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Work Permit extensions may be granted for a maximum period of up to four (04) years, subject to the approval of the competent authority.M20",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "BDT 10,000 per year + 15% VAT  - Applicable bank charges + 15% VAT on bank charges",
"slaText": "Nine (09) working days, subject to submission of a complete application with all required documents",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,

"fee": "BDT 10,000 per year + 15% VAT  - Applicable bank charges + 15% VAT on bank charges",

"actAndRules": {
"id": 102,
"title": "Act And Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Act And Rules",

"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 101,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "1. Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010)\n 2. Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the “One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018” read with Section 11 of the “One Stop Service Act, 2018”\n 3. GFET Guideline 2018",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 247,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Step-1: Submission of Application\n The applicant—either the employer/company or the concerned expatriate—shall submit the Work Permit Extension application online through the BEZA One Stop Service (OSS) Portal (https://oss.beza.gov.bd). The application must be accompanied by all required supporting documents and submitted at least 90 (ninety) days prior to the expiry of the existing Work Permit.\n \n Step-2: Preliminary Review by BEZA-OSS\n Upon receipt of the application, BEZA-OSS conducts an initial review to verify the completeness of the submission and ensure compliance with the prescribed requirements, rules, and regulations.\n \n Step-3: Forwarding to the Work Permit Standing Committee\n In the event that the application is deemed complete and compliant, BEZA-OSS forwards the case to the Work Permit Standing Committee for its formal examination and decision.\n \n Step-4: Approval and Issuance of the Renewed Permit\n Upon approval by the Work Permit Standing Committee, BEZA-OSS proceeds with the issuance of the renewed Work Permit Certificate, duly reflecting the extended validity period.\n \n Step-5: Delivery of the Renewed Certificate\n The renewed Work Permit Certificate shall be made available to the applicant through the following means:\n - Via registered email address of the applicant; and\n - Direct download from the BEZA-OSS Portal",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 248,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Foreign nationals employed in companies established within the jurisdiction of the Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA) are required to hold a valid Work Permit issued by BEZA. To continue their employment beyond the validity period of the existing permit, expatriates must apply for an Extension of Work Permit through the BEZA One Stop Service (OSS) Portal.",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 1180,
"attributes": {
"name": "Marketing Authorization (Product Registration)",
"description": "Marketing Authorization (Product Registration) is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA), which evaluates the quality, safety, and efficacy of new or existing medicines and grants legal permission for their manufacture, import, and marketing in Bangladesh. This authorization is essential for safeguarding public health.",
"shortDescription": "Marketing Authorization (Product Registration) is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA)",
"applicationUrl": "https://dgdagov.info/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-21T11:11:37.382Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-23T20:34:55.603Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-21T11:22:58.325Z",
"order": 6,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Product Registration Approval",
"Market Authorization Certificate",
"Regulatory Product Clearance",
"Product Marketing Permit"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Free of Cost",
"slaText": "Processing Time: 15 working days from the receipt of complete application.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Free of Cost",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,

"maxTime": "15",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 492,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 496,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "The Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) Certificate in Bangladesh is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) under the authority of the Drugs Act, 1940, the Drugs (Control) Ordinance, 1982, and the Drugs Rules, 1945. Compliance with national GMP guidelines aligned with WHO GMP standards is mandatory for pharmaceutical manufacturing facilities. GMP compliance is also a prerequisite for product approval under the Registration of Drugs Rules, 2006. Any violation may result in regulatory action, including suspension or cancellation of licenses.",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1018,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Marketing Authorization or Product Registration is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) and is a mandatory approval for the marketing of Allopathic, Unani, Ayurvedic, Homeopathic medicines, and cosmetics in Bangladesh in accordance with the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 and relevant rules and regulations. Without this registration, the manufacture, import, or sale of any medicine or cosmetic product is legally prohibited. The process involves a detailed evaluation of the product’s chemical composition, clinical trial data, stability, safety, and efficacy.\nThe required documents include the prescribed application form (in CTD format for Allopathic products), product formula, manufacturing process, analytical methods, stability study reports, clinical or bioequivalence data (where applicable), labeling and packaging designs, GMP certificate (for imported products), Free Sale Certificate, and manufacturer’s authorization letter. Applications can be submitted online through the ADLRS portal.\nUpon receipt of a complete application, the processing time is approximately 15 working days. This service is provided free of charge. The approval helps prevent counterfeit or substandard products and ensures public health protection and safe supply of medicines and cosmetics.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1019,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content coming Soon",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": null
}
},
{
"id": 1045,
"attributes": {
"name": "BSTI Certification Mark",
"description": "The BSTI Certification Marks License (CM License) service, provided by the Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution (BSTI), ensures product quality and grants permission for production and marketing in accordance with Bangladesh Standards (BDS). It is mandatory to protect consumer interests and maintain the quality standards of products. (108 words)",
"shortDescription": "The BSTI Certification Marks License (CM License) service",
"applicationUrl": "https://bsti.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-02T09:15:21.095Z",

{
"id": 1130,
"attributes": {
"name": "Indenting License",
"description": "Export Registration Certificate (Indenting Services) is a specialized certificate required for carrying out indenting business, which involves importing foreign goods and supplying them to local buyers. It is issued by the Chief Controller of Imports & Exports (CCI&E). Applications can be submitted through the Online Licensing Module (OLM) portal (olm.ccie.gov.bd), and the service is generally provided within 3 working days.",
"shortDescription": "Export Registration Certificate (Indenting Services) is a specialized certificate required for carrying out indenting business, ",
"applicationUrl": "https://olm.ccie.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-19T11:22:13.163Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-20T05:47:39.100Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-19T11:22:15.535Z",
"order": 3,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Indenting Trade Permit",
"Indenting Business License",
"Authorized Indenting Certificate",
"Official Indenting Approval"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "The prescribed fee for the aforementioned service, as described in Appendix-C, can be paid online through the OLM system in the form of an e-Challan after submitting the application.",
"slaText": "3 working days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save For Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "The prescribed fee for the aforementioned service, as described in Appendix-C, can be paid online through the OLM system in the form of an e-Challan after submitting the application.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5103,
"minTime": "2",
"maxTime": "3",
"type": "Days"
},

},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 876,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Export Registration Certificate (Indenting Services) is a specialized permit required for conducting indenting trade, where indentors import goods from foreign suppliers and supply them to local buyers. It is issued under the authority of the Chief Controller of Imports & Exports (CCI&E) through the Online Licensing Module (OLM) portal.\n\nThe application process is entirely online. Applicants must complete the prescribed form on the OLM portal and upload color scanned copies of the required documents. Key documents include: Treasury challan (covering registration fee and 15% VAT), updated Trade License, e-TIN certificate, certification from the designated bank, updated membership certificate of the Bangladesh Indenting Agents Association, national ID cards of all partners including the applicant, registered partnership deed, acknowledgment receipt of the latest income tax return submission, and in the case of a foreign company’s branch office, Certificate of Filing and approval from BIDA.\n\nThe prescribed fee must be submitted online through the e-Challan system on the portal. After document verification, the certificate is generally issued within 3 working days. This certificate is mandatory for legally operating an indenting business in Bangladesh and is renewable annually.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 877,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 1310,
"attributes": {
"name": "Merchant Bank License",
"description": "A Merchant Bank License is an authorization issued by the Bangladesh Securities and Exchange Commission (BSEC). It allows companies to provide issue management, underwriting, portfolio management, and other investment related services. It is regulated under the Merchant Banker and Portfolio Manager Rules, 1996.\n\nThe applicant must be a company or a statutory body with a minimum paid up capital of BDT 250 million and at least 50 percent net worth. Eligibility checks ensure that there is no loan default, no criminal record, and no involvement in securities market violations.\n\nThe process is completed within 45 days, and the applicant must submit the prescribed documents along with the required fees.",
"shortDescription": "A Merchant Bank License is an authorization issued by the Bangladesh Securities and Exchange Commission (BSEC)",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.sec.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-23T05:18:43.675Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-23T05:36:03.606Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-23T05:22:03.119Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Merchant Banking License",

"Merchant Bank Operation Permit",
"Capital Market Merchant Bank License"
],

"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Merchant Bank license approval process is administered by the Bangladesh Securities and Exchange Commission (BSEC), which verifies the applicant company’s eligibility, financial stability, and regulatory compliance. First, the applicant must submit Form K along with an application fee of BDT 100,000.\n\nEligibility criteria include:\nRegistration as a company, paid up capital of BDT 250 million, minimum 50 percent net worth, adequate office space, experienced staff, appointment of a compliance officer, and no loan default or criminal record of the directors.\n\nRequired documents checklist:\nTrade license, TIN certificate, RJSC certified Memorandum and Articles of Association, Certificate of Incorporation, Commencement of Business Certificate for public limited companies, Forms XV and XII, board resolution, organizational chart, biodata of directors and CEO, financial statements, bankers and auditors certificates, CIB undertaking, affidavits as per Rule 5 Gha, office layout, details of key personnel, and the compliance officer appointment letter.\n\nAdditional documents: credit rating report and business plan.\n\nBSEC reviews the application and provides approval within 45 days. After approval, the applicant must pay a registration fee of BDT 1,000,000 and an annual fee of BDT 200,000 through pay order, bank draft, or EFT. The process ensures regulatory compliance and maintains transparency in the securities market.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

{
"id": 173,
"attributes": {
"name": "Visa Recommendation Postponement",
"description": "A unit investor can apply for visa recommendation in favor of a foreign national willing to visit Bangladesh relating to invest or exploring Business or employment. Upon receiving the visa recommendation, the foreign national has to visit the concerned Bangladesh Mission and apply for visa. The foreign national (Incumbent) has to present the visa recommendation and other necessary papers to the concerned office. It is to be noted that a visa recommendation from BHTPA does not guarantee issuing of visa. Issuing of visa is the sole prerogative of the concerned Bangladesh Mission. However, after issuing a visa recommendation letter, BHTPA can postpone the visa recommendation at any time as requested by the Company/Unit Investor or being otherwise convinced to do the same without showing any reason.\n",
"shortDescription": "Visa Recommendation Postponement",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:40:45.811Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-15T14:06:48.994Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:40:46.679Z",
"order": 10,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Visa Endorsement Delay",
"Deferred Visa Recommendation"
],
"ValidityTime": "N/A\n",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "N/A",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Free (as per BHTPA Fee Schedule);",
"slaText": "N/A",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "vrp",
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Free (as per BHTPA Fee Schedule);",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,

"type": "Days"
},

"actAndRulesDetails": "One Stop Service Act, 2018 and One Stop Service (Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority) Regulations, 2019",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 141,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 465,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval ",
"description": "The approval of Visa Recommendation by BHTPA enables a unit investor to invite a foreign national for investment, business exploration, or employment purposes.\n BHTPA reviews the application and, upon satisfaction, issues a Visa Recommendation Letter to support the visa process through the concerned Bangladesh Mission.\n However, the final decision to issue the visa rests entirely with the Mission, and BHTPA reserves the right to postpone or withdraw the recommendation at any time without explanation.",
"title": "About the Approval ",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

}
]
}
}

{
"id": 436,
"attributes": {
"name": "Issuance of Dyeing/ Production Certificate",
"description": "Issuance of Dyeing/ Production Certificate is a service provided by BEPZA that enables companies within EPZs to officially certify their production or dyeing activities. Investors must submit an application along with copies of the full set of export permits with bills of export or delivery challans, import permits with bills of entry, and a consumption statement, all duly certified by Customs. BEPZA reviews the documents to verify compliance with regulatory requirements and production standards. Upon approval, the dyeing or production certificate is issued, providing official recognition of the company’s manufacturing activities. This service ensures proper documentation, transparency, and regulatory compliance, supporting smooth export and operational processes.",
"shortDescription": "Issuance of Dyeing/ Production Certificate\n",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T10:32:49.834Z",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 289,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "The Issuance of Dyeing/ Production Certificate is a formal approval process administered by BEPZA for companies operating within Export Processing Zones. To obtain this certificate, companies must submit an application requesting issuance of the dyeing or production certificate along with supporting documents. These include copies of the full set of export permits with bills of export or delivery challans certified by Customs, copies of the full set of import permits with bills of entry certified by Customs, and a consumption statement of raw materials also duly certified. BEPZA reviews these documents to ensure that production and dyeing activities comply with regulatory standards and accurately reflect the materials consumed and products produced. Once verified, the certificate is issued, officially confirming the company’s production or dyeing activities. This process promotes transparency, proper record-keeping, and adherence to EPZ regulations, facilitating compliance with export and operational requirements. The typical processing timeline for this service is three working days.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

{
"id": 18,
"attributes": {
"name": "Office Permission New",
"description": "The Office Permission (New) approval is issued by BIDA to authorize a company, branch, or representative office to establish and operate an administrative or liaison office in Bangladesh. This approval is required for organizations that wish to maintain a local presence to coordinate business operations, engage with clients or stakeholders, and facilitate communication with government authorities. The new office permission ensures that the organization can legally operate in the country while complying with BIDA’s regulatory framework. The application for a new office permission involves submitting necessary documents, including company registration details, proof of address, and authorized personnel information, to enable BIDA to verify the legitimacy and purpose of the proposed office. By granting this approval, BIDA facilitates a smooth entry and operational setup for investors and organizations, supporting transparency, legal compliance, and effective coordination within Bangladesh. The approval underscores BIDA’s commitment to providing an investor-friendly environment, enabling companies to establish a functional office presence that aligns with their business objectives and contributes to the overall ease of doing business in the country.",
"shortDescription": "Office Permission New",
"applicationUrl": "https://bidaquickserv.org/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-07-29T07:28:58.248Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-13T12:06:26.554Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-07-29T07:29:00.249Z",
"order": 12,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"New Office Approval",
"Office Space Permission",
"Commercial Office Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": "3 years \n",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "3 years",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Application Fee 250 Tk and Government Fee 25000+15% Vat",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 83,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Any foreign company seeking to establish a branch, liaison, or representative office in Bangladesh is eligible to apply for a new office permission. The applicant must be a legally registered company in its home country (for foreign entities) or in Bangladesh (for local entities) and must be in good standing with regulatory authorities. The proposed office should be intended solely for administrative, liaison, or coordination purposes and cannot conduct direct commercial or manufacturing activities.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 84,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "This approval is issued by BIDA to officially authorize the establishment and operation of a branch, liaison, or representative office in Bangladesh. It confirms that the applicant organization is legally permitted to maintain a local presence solely for administrative, liaison, or coordination purposes. The approval is granted after verifying the company’s registration, submitted documents, and intended office functions, ensuring compliance with BIDA regulations. By granting this permission, BIDA enables the organization to effectively coordinate with clients, stakeholders, and government authorities while maintaining lawful operations within the country.\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 379,
"attributes": {
"name": "Issuance of Work Permit",
"description": "Issuance of Work Permit is a service provided by BEPZA to authorize foreign nationals and other employees to work legally within Export Processing Zones (EPZs). Employers must submit a complete application package, including the prescribed Work Permit form, passports, visa recommendation letters, appointment letters, educational and experience certificates, paper advertisements, and applicant lists. All documents must be submitted in seven sets to ensure proper verification. The Work Permit Standing Committee reviews applications monthly, and upon approval, the permit allows individuals to commence employment in EPZs. This process ensures compliance with labor regulations, facilitates smooth workforce management, and promotes timely commencement of project activities.",
"shortDescription": "Issuance of Work Permit",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T09:29:11.705Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T09:47:31.099Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-28T09:29:13.237Z",
"order": 11,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Employment Permit",
"Foreign Worker Authorization",
"Work Authorization",
"Expatriate Permit"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Issue fee as Prescribed by the Authority (In Cash)",
"slaText": "Within 07 days after work permit standing committee meeting in every month",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": "WP",
"fee": "Issue fee as Prescribed by the Authority (In Cash)",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 6259,
"minTime": "5",
"maxTime": "7",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 303,

"actAndRulesDetails": null,
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 282,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "The Issuance of Work Permit is a formal approval process conducted by BEPZA to grant legal authorization for individuals to work within EPZ-based industries. Applicants must submit a comprehensive application along with the prescribed Work Permit form, original payment receipt, passport copies with visa pages, appointment letters, visa recommendation letters, paper advertisements, applicant lists, and educational and experience certificates as per the advertised positions. Seven sets of all documents (A-Z) are required to facilitate thorough verification. The Work Permit Standing Committee evaluates all submissions during its monthly meeting to ensure compliance with EPZ labor regulations and operational guidelines. Upon approval, the Work Permit grants the applicant the legal right to work, safeguarding both the employee and employer, and ensuring proper workforce management. This service is crucial for timely recruitment, regulatory compliance, and smooth operation of industries within EPZs. The typical processing timeline is within seven days after the Work Permit Standing Committee meeting each month.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

"id": 174,
"attributes": {
"name": "Visa on Arrival Recommendation",
"description": "A unit investor can apply for Visa on Arrival Recommendation in favor of a foreign national willing to visit Bangladesh relating to invest or exploring Business or employment. Upon receiving the Visa on Arrival Recommendation from BHTPA, the foreign national (Incumbent) can submit it along with other necessary papers at the Visa On Arrival Counter of the expected Port of Entry. It is to be noted that a visa on arrival recommendation from BHTPA does not guarantee issuing of visa. Issuing of visa is the sole prerogative of the concerned Bangladesh Mission.",
"shortDescription": "Visa on Arrival Recommendation",

{
"id": 153,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "he approval of Visa on Arrival Recommendation by BHTPA enables a unit investor to support a foreign national intending to visit Bangladesh for investment, business exploration, or employment purposes.\n BHTPA evaluates the application and, upon approval, issues a Visa on Arrival Recommendation Letter.\n However, the final decision to grant the visa rests entirely with the immigration authority at the Port of Entry or the concerned Bangladesh Mission.\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}

{
"id": 252,
"attributes": {
"name": "Building Permit",
"description": "Before starting the construction, investor requires to submit some detail drawing & design to BEZA for approval. Destail drawing & design means the complete architectural, structural, EMP drawings. The detail drawing & design approval is known as building permit. Investor needs to submit the application through BEZA-OSS online portal.",
"shortDescription": "Before starting the construction, investor requires to submit some detail drawing & design to BEZA for approval.",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,

"order": 9,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Construction Permit",
"Building Approval",
"Development Permission",
"Construction Authorization"
],
"ValidityTime": "The Building Construction Permit shall be valid for 12 (twelve) months (construction at least up-to plinth level must be done within this period) from the date of issue of such permit.",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "The Building Construction Permit shall be valid for 12 (twelve) months (construction at least up-to plinth level must be done within this period) from the date of issue of such permit.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,

{
"id": 447,
"attributes": {
"name": "Recommendation for Security Clearance",
"description": "Recommendation for Security Clearance is a service provided by BEPZA to ensure that employees, particularly foreign nationals working within Export Processing Zones (EPZs), meet all security and regulatory requirements. Investors or employers must submit an application along with a copy of the Work Permit and its supporting documents. BEPZA reviews the submission to verify compliance with security protocols and EPZ regulations. Upon approval, a recommendation is issued, enabling the employee to obtain formal security clearance. This process ensures workplace safety, protects sensitive industrial operations, and maintains regulatory oversight. Typically, the clearance recommendation is issued within ten days following the monthly Work Permit Standing Committee meeting.\n",
"shortDescription": "Recommendation for Security Clearance",
"applicationUrl": "https://www.bepza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-28T10:38:05.308Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T09:47:58.493Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-28T10:38:09.689Z",
"order": 12,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Security Clearance Recommendation",
"MoHA Reference Letter",
"Background Check Support"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": null,
"slaText": null,
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": null,
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],

"id": 4007,

"maxTime": "10",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,

"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 677,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Recommendation for Security Clearance is a formal approval process administered by BEPZA to confirm that employees, especially foreign personnel, comply with security requirements within EPZ-based industries. Employers or investors must submit an application along with a copy of the approved Work Permit and all associated documents. BEPZA evaluates the submissions to ensure that the employee poses no security risk and that all EPZ regulations are observed. Following the review, BEPZA issues a security clearance recommendation, which is a prerequisite for the employee to work legally within the EPZ. This service safeguards both employees and company assets while maintaining a secure operational environment. The typical processing timeline for the recommendation is within ten days after the Work Permit Standing Committee meeting each month. It ensures timely and efficient management of workforce security compliance, supporting the smooth functioning of EPZ projects.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 678,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": null,
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

}
]

{
"id": 175,
"attributes": {
"name": "Family VISA Recommendation",
"description": "A unit investor can apply for family visa recommendation in favor of a foreign national who is working in any park under Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority as an Investor having PI Visa or as an Employee having E Visa. Upon receiving the visa recommendation, the family members have to visit the concerned Bangladesh Mission and have to apply for particular family visa. The recommended family member(s) has to present the visa recommendation letter and other necessary papers to the concerned office. It is to be noted that a family visa recommendation from BHTPA does not guarantee issuing of visa. Issuing of visa is the sole prerogative of the concerned Bangladesh Mission.",
"shortDescription": "Family VISA Recommendation",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:42:49.132Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-16T04:20:46.389Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:42:50.090Z",
"order": 12,
"locale": "en",

"Family Entry Endorsement"
],

"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.",

{
"id": 470,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval ",
"description": "The approval of Family Visa Recommendation by BHTPA allows a unit investor to request visa support for the family members of a foreign national working in a Hi-Tech Park under PI or E Visa.\n BHTPA verifies the applicant’s employment or investment status and, upon satisfaction, issues a Family Visa Recommendation Letter.\n However, the final approval and issuance of the visa depend solely on the concerned Bangladesh Mission, based on their review and verification.",
"title": "About the Approval ",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 577,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Narcotic Raw Materials Approval is issued in accordance with the Narcotics Control Act, 2018 and the Narcotics Control Rules, 2019, regulating the import, storage, handling, and lawful use of narcotic and controlled raw materials in Bangladesh. Where pharmaceutical manufacturing is involved, compliance with the Drugs Act, 1940 and relevant drug regulations is also mandatory. Import permissions are further governed by the prevailing Import Policy Order of the Government of Bangladesh. The approval is administered by the Department of Narcotics Control (DNC) in coordination with the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) to ensure regulatory compliance, public safety, and controlled utilization.",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},

"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Export License (Form-10A) is issued by the Chief Controller of Imports and Exports (CCI&E) under the Import and Export Control Act, 1950. It is mandatory for exporting goods, including pharmaceuticals and regulated products, from Bangladesh. The license ensures compliance with export regulations, customs requirements, and national trade laws. Form-10A helps facilitate legal, documented, and regulated international trade.",

{
"id": 1023,
"attributes": {
"name": "Factory License",
"description": "The issuance of a Factory/Establishment/Shop License is a mandatory requirement under the Labour Laws for operating a factory or commercial establishment. The license is issued by the Department of Inspection for Factories and Establishments under the Ministry of Labour and Employment. The service is generally completed within 45 working days, subject to payment of the prescribed fees and applicable VAT.",
"shortDescription": "The issuance of a Factory/Establishment/Shop License is a mandatory requirement under the Labour Laws for operating a factory.",
"applicationUrl": "https://dife.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-12-09T06:37:59.690Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-20T11:22:32.496Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-02T09:53:59.593Z",
"order": 3,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Industrial License",
"Factory Operation License",
"Manufacturing Establishment License",
"Factory Registration Certificate"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Pay the license fee (as per Schedule‑7, Bangladesh Labour Rules 2015) via account 1‑3‑143‑0000‑1854, government code, or e-payment, along with 15% VAT.",
"slaText": "45 (Forty-five) working days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": "fl",
"serviceType": "fl",
"fee": "Pay the license fee (as per Schedule‑7, Bangladesh Labour Rules 2015) via account 1‑3‑143‑0000‑1854, government code, or e-payment, along with 15% VAT.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5165,
"minTime": "40",
"maxTime": "45",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {

"title": "Acts and Rules",

"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 454,

}

},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 932,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The issuance of a Factory/Establishment/Shop License is a mandatory service under the Bangladesh Labour Act, 2006 and the Labour Rules, 2015. No factory or commercial establishment may be lawfully operated without this license. The license is issued by the Department of Inspection for Factories and Establishments (DIFE) and ensures compliance with legal standards related to workers’ safety, welfare, and labour rights.\n\nThe principal documents required for application include a copy of the Trade License; lease agreement or land record (Khatiyan); National Identity Card or passport of the Owner/Managing Director (passport in case of foreign nationals); electricity demand note; Memorandum of Articles or Partnership Deed; approved Factory Layout Plan; building plan approved by the local authority; treasury challan; list of workers/employees; Fire License; Environmental Clearance (where applicable); Boiler License (where applicable); and other relevant supporting documents.\n\nThe license fee must be deposited under the prescribed code as per Schedule-7 of the Labour Rules or through electronic payment systems (such as Ekpay), along with payment of 15% VAT on the applicable fee. Following verification of documents and, where necessary, inspection, the license is generally issued within 45 working days. The license is typically valid for one year and is renewable.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

{
"id": 1051,
"attributes": {
"name": "Land Use Clearance",
"description": "The Land Use Clearance (LUC) service is provided by the Capital Development Authority (RAJUK) to grant approval for the proposed use of land for industrial, commercial, residential, or other projects within the Dhaka metropolitan area. Applications must be submitted online using Form 101 along with the required documents. Key documents include five copies of the design in ammonia print, land ownership deed, khatian (land record), voter ID card, TIN certificate or passport copy, and other relevant documents. The processing time is 30 working days. Fees: Form fee Tk. 1,000; application fee Tk. 5,000 + VAT Tk. 750; and Welfare Fund Tk. 20, all of which must be paid online.",
"shortDescription": "The Land Use Clearance (LUC) service is provided by the Capital Development Authority (RAJUK)",
"applicationUrl": "https://cda.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-02T09:33:31.286Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-21T17:57:17.356Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-02T09:33:33.274Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Land Use Approval",
"Land Utilization Clearance",
"Land Use Authorization",
"Land Development Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "The fee for the application form is Tk. 1,000. The application and full submission fee is Tk. 5,000 + VAT Tk. 750, and Welfare Fund fee Tk. 20. All fees must be paid online.",
"slaText": "30 (thirty) days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": "luc",
"serviceType": "luc",
"fee": "The fee for the application form is Tk. 1,000. The application and full submission fee is Tk. 5,000 + VAT Tk. 750, and Welfare Fund fee Tk. 20. All fees must be paid online.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5481,
"minTime": "25",
"maxTime": "30",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 508,

"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",

},

{
"id": 512,

},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1050,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Land Use Clearance (LUC) service is administered under the Capital Development Authority (RAJUK). It approves the proposed land use plan for industrial, commercial, residential, or other projects within the regulated areas of Dhaka Metropolitan Area, ensuring compliance with urban planning and zoning regulations.\n\nTo apply, the applicant must submit Form 101 online along with the required documents, including five signed copies of the design in ammonia print (showing location map, layout map, and site marked on the mouza map), copies of the registered land deed and khatian, succession certificate and partition deed for ancestral property, voter ID card, TIN certificate or passport copy, and a copy of the latest income tax return. Proof of online fee payment must also be attached.\n\nUpon submission of a complete and accurate application, the processing time is up to 30 working days. Fees are as follows: Form fee Tk. 1,000, application fee Tk. 5,000 + 15% VAT Tk. 750, and Welfare Fund Tk. 20. All fees must be paid through online payment.\n\nImplementation of any project without this clearance is not legally permitted, and it is a prerequisite for obtaining subsequent building construction approval.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1053,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"id": 489,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{
"id": 3843,
"order": 1,
"name": "Online completed application form (Form 101) along with a copy of the challan for application fee, form fee, and Welfare Fund including VAT.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3844,
"order": 2,
"name": "Five (5) copies of the design in ammonia print, signed by the applicant, showing at the specified scale: ° Location map and layout map ° Proposed site marked on the RS/BS (and PS, if applicable) mouza map",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3845,
"order": 3,
"name": "Copy of registered deed and khatian of the proposed land.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3846,
"order": 4,
"name": "In the case of ancestral property, succession certificate and registered partition deed.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3847,
"order": 5,
"name": "Copy of the voter ID card.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3848,
"order": 6,
"name": "TIN certificate or passport copy with visa, along with a copy of the latest income tax return.",
"description": null
}
]
}
}

{
"id": 132,
"attributes": {
"name": "Building Construction Design Approval",
"description": "After having the Land Allotment Letter, the unit investor shall at first submit the Land Use Plan (Showing position of Building(s), Access & Internal Road, Green Area, Setback line, Gate & Gate House etc.) along with Utility Connection Plan (Electricity, Water, Sewage, Rainwater, Fence etc.) to BHTPA for clearance. Then the unit investor shall submit the Master Plan, Architectural Design and Drawing, Soil Test Report within 3 (three) months of signing the Land lease agreement to BHTPA for having approval from the competent authority.",
"shortDescription": "Building Construction Design Approval",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",

{
"id": 151,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The approval process ensures that the investor’s proposed land development follows BHTPA’s technical and environmental standards.\n After receiving the Land Allotment Letter, the investor must submit a Land Use and Utility Connection Plan for initial clearance.\n Within 3 months of signing the Land Lease Agreement, the investor must submit the Master Plan, Architectural Design, Drawings, and Soil Test Report for final approval by the competent authority.",

}

{
"id": 26,
"attributes": {
"name": "Work Permit New",
"description": "The Work Permit (New) service under the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA) enables foreign nationals to obtain official permission to work in Bangladesh in organizations that are duly registered with BIDA. This permit is essential for foreign investors, experts, technicians, and employees who intend to engage in industrial, commercial, or technical activities within approved companies or projects. Through this service, BIDA ensures that the employment of foreign personnel aligns with national investment and labor policies, maintaining a balance between local and foreign expertise in the workforce.",
"shortDescription": "Work Permit New",
"applicationUrl": "/investor/create-application",
"isActive": false,
"createdAt": "2025-08-02T06:16:48.377Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-24T13:07:39.646Z",
"publishedAt": null,
"order": 0,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Employment Permit",
"Foreign Worker License",
"Work Authorization"
],
"ValidityTime": "1 Year",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "1 Year",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Application fee 250 TK and Government fee 10000 + 15% vat",
"slaText": "Work Permit New (BIDA/ Foreign) 3 working Days, Work Permit New (BIDA/ Commercial) 16 Days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "wpnbhtpa",
"serviceType": "WP",
"fee": "Application fee 250 TK and Government fee 10000 + 15% vat",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 1083,
"minTime": "10",
"maxTime": "16",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 80,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 80,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Bangladesh Investment Development Authority Act, 2016",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 416,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "Once the application for a new Work Permit is submitted through the BIDA One Stop Service (OSS) portal, it is reviewed by the Foreign Investment and Registration Section of BIDA. The evaluation process includes verifying the applicant’s company registration, the authenticity of the foreign employee’s credentials, and the justification for hiring foreign personnel in accordance with national policies. If all submitted documents and information meet the required standards, BIDA grants approval and issues an official Work Permit in favor of the foreign national. This approval authorizes the individual to work legally in Bangladesh under the sponsoring organization. The approved Work Permit also serves as a supporting document for obtaining or extending the employment visa from the Department of Immigration and Passports or relevant embassies. The final permit is recorded in BIDA’s official database for future reference and compliance monitoring.",
"title": "About the approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 417,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Foreign nationals who wish to work in Bangladesh in organizations registered with the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA) are eligible to apply for a new Work Permit. This includes investors, experts, technical specialists, and senior officials employed in industrial, commercial, or service-oriented enterprises approved by BIDA. The sponsoring company or employer must initiate the application on behalf of the foreign employee through the BIDA One Stop Service (OSS) portal.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 83,
"title": "Documents Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{
"id": 1634,
"order": 1,
"name": "Registration letter of industrial project with BIDA ",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1635,
"order": 2,
"name": "Memorandum & Articles of Association of the company duly signed by shareholders along with Certificate of Incorporation (In case of limited company) ",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1636,
"order": 3,
"name": "Copy of passport of the Investor/Employee/Expatriate with E-Visa page and arrival seal should be submitted.",
"description": null

{
"id": 1021,
"attributes": {
"name": "Work Permit",
"description": "A BIDA work permit is an official authorization for a foreign national to work in Bangladesh, typically initially for one year, issued by the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA) after an inter-ministerial committee review. The application is submitted by the employer through the BIDA One-Stop Service (OSS) portal, and requires various documents like company registration, board resolutions, passport copies, and academic certificates. The process includes security clearance from the Ministry of Home Affairs and can be extended based on merit.",
"shortDescription": "BIDA work permit is an official authorization for a foreign national to work in Bangladesh, typically initially for one year, issued.",
"applicationUrl": "/investor/create-application",
"isActive": true,

{
"id": 1165,
"attributes": {
"name": "Land use clearance",
"description": "Land Use Clearance is an official government approval required to use agricultural or other land for industrial or commercial purposes. It is issued by the Ministry of Land or the concerned District Commissioner’s Office. Upon submission of the required documents along with a fee of BDT 1,000, the clearance is generally issued within 15 days.",
"shortDescription": "Land Use Clearance is an official government approval required to use agricultural or other land for industrial or commercial purposes.",
"applicationUrl": "https://rajuk.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-21T05:15:57.122Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-21T17:36:27.190Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-21T05:16:03.459Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Land Use Approval",
"Land Allocation Clearance",
"Site Utilization Approval",
"Land Development Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Deposit BDT 1,000 (One Thousand Taka only) in the designated bank and submit the duly completed Form No. 101.",
"slaText": "15 (Fifteen) days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Deposit BDT 1,000 (One Thousand Taka only) in the designated bank and submit the duly completed Form No. 101.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5259,
"minTime": "10",
"maxTime": "15",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 462,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 466,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Acts",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 956,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Land Use Clearance is a mandatory government authorization under the Land Reforms Ordinance and related rules, required for using agricultural land for industrial, commercial, or other non-agricultural purposes. Without this clearance, changing the land classification to establish an industrial facility is legally prohibited. The service is generally provided by the District Commissioner’s Office or under the Ministry of Land.\n\nTo apply, Form No. 101 must be completed and submitted with the required documents. The main documents include: attested copy of the proposed land’s title deed, certified copy of the Power of Attorney (where applicable), RS mutation record, updated land tax (Khajna) receipt, proposal for mutation and land subdivision, DCR, approval/allotment letter from the ministry in case of abandoned land, Metropolitan Survey record, applicable maps (RS, MS/City Survey), location map, three (3) copies of the site plan (ammonia print on CS Mouza map), and the original receipt of the prescribed fee.\n\nThe fee of BDT 1,000 must be deposited in the designated bank and submitted along with the receipt. After verification of documents, the clearance is generally issued within 15 days. This clearance is essential for obtaining other permissions for industrial establishment, such as BIDA registration and Environmental Clearance.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 957,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"description": "A route permit is an authorization issued by BRTA that allows a passenger motor vehicle, stage carriage, to operate on a specified route. It is available as a new issue, renewal, or duplicate. It ensures vehicle legality, safety compliance, and payment of applicable taxes.",

{
"id": 1194,
"attributes": {
"name": "Trade license issuance",
"description": "The service of issuing a trade license is provided by Dhaka South City Corporation (DSCC) to authorize business entities to conduct legal commercial activities. This service is regulated under the City Corporation Act and the Standard Tax Schedule, 2016.\n\nApplicants must submit a prescribed form costing BDT 50, along with supporting documents such as rental agreement/holding tax receipt, NID/birth certificate, photographs, and other relevant documents. For joint-stock companies, an RJSC certificate is also required.\n\nIn general, the license is issued within 3 working days.",
"shortDescription": "The service of issuing a trade license is provided by Dhaka South City Corporation (DSCC) to authorize business",
"applicationUrl": "https://dscc.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-21T18:47:11.654Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-22T04:40:37.456Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-21T19:38:44.864Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Trade License Issuance",
"Business License Issuance",
"Commercial License Grant",
"Shop and Establishment License Issuance"
],
"ValidityTime": "Chief Revenue Officer – 30 working days\nChief Executive Officer – 20 working days\nHonorable Mayor – 60 working days",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Chief Revenue Officer – 30 working days\nChief Executive Officer – 20 working days\nHonorable Mayor – 60 working days",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "According to the type of business specified in the City Corporation Standard Tax Schedule, 2016 (www.dscc.gov.bd ).",
"slaText": "General Trade License: 03 (three) working days. Other Trade Licenses: Issued within 03 (three) working days after obtaining the required approvals from Fire Service, Health Department, and Department of Environment, where applicable.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": "tl",
"fee": "According to the type of business specified in the City Corporation Standard Tax Schedule, 2016 (www.dscc.gov.bd ).",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5507,
"minTime": "2",
"maxTime": "3",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": null,
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1065,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The trade license approval is managed by Dhaka South City Corporation (DSCC), authorizing businesses to legally operate.\n\nApplication Requirements:\n\nPrescribed application form costing BDT 50.\n\nIf rented: certified rental agreement/receipt photocopy; if owned: updated tax receipt.\n\nCertified copy of National ID/Birth Certificate/Passport.\n\nMobile number and email (if available).\n\nThree certified photographs.\n\nFor joint-stock businesses: Memorandum of Article and Incorporation Certificate from RJSC.\n\nProcess:\nDSCC verifies the business location, ownership, and authenticity of documents.\n\nStandard trade licenses are issued within 3 working days.\n\nFor factories, industrial units, hospitals, clinics, banks, insurance companies, etc., approval from Fire Service, Health Department, and Department of Environment is required; issuance takes 3 working days after all clearances.\n\nFees:\nDetermined based on business type according to the City Corporation Standard Tax Schedule, 2016 (see www.dscc.gov.bd\n).\n\nThe process is fast, transparent, and ensures local revenue collection and business regulation. For more details, contact DSCC website or regional office.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
