{
"id": 1176,
"attributes": {
"name": "Boiler registration",
"description": "Boiler Registration is a government service that involves verifying the safety and technical standards of boilers used in industrial establishments and issuing a Registration Certificate accordingly. This service is provided by the Office of the Chief Boiler Inspector.\nUpon submission of a complete application, the process is generally completed within 18 (eighteen) working days. The prescribed registration fee, including VAT, is payable based on the boiler’s heating surface area.",
"shortDescription": "Boiler Registration is a government service that involves verifying the safety and technical standards of boilers.",
"applicationUrl": "https://boiler.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-21T10:42:40.329Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-22T11:06:18.513Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-21T10:42:45.472Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Boiler Registration Certificate",
"Industrial Boiler Registration",
"Registered Boiler Permit",
"Boiler Approval Certificate"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "By paying the prescribed fee (including VAT) as determined under the relevant code based on the heating surface.",
"slaText": "Within eighteen (18) working days from the date of receipt of the application.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": "br",
"fee": "By paying the prescribed fee (including VAT) as determined under the relevant code based on the heating surface.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5393,
"minTime": "15",
"maxTime": "18",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 486,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 490,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Acts",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1002,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Boiler Registration is a mandatory statutory service under the Bangladesh Boiler Act, 1923 and the applicable Boiler Rules. It ensures the safe installation and operation of boilers in industrial establishments. Operation of a boiler without valid registration is prohibited by law and significantly increases the risk of accidents. The service is provided by the Office of the Chief Inspector of Boilers.\n\nThe principal documents required for application include cross-sectional construction drawings of the boiler and its components (prepared to the appropriate scale), and strength and rating calculations of the pressure-bearing parts, where the rating refers to the boiler’s heating surface area. Any additional information required under the prescribed codes must also be submitted.\n\nThe registration fee is payable according to the heating surface area of the boiler, as specified in the relevant code, inclusive of VAT. After verification of documents—and inspection and testing where required—the Registration Certificate is issued within 18 (eighteen) working days from the date of receipt of the application. The registration is generally valid for a specified period and is subject to renewal and/or periodic inspection. Failure to obtain registration may result in penalties or legal action.\n",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1003,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 471,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"requiredDocumnetLIst": [
{
"id": 3820,
"order": 1,
"name": "Cross-sectional construction drawings of the boiler and boiler components, prepared in accordance with the prescribed code and to the appropriate scale;",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 3821,
"order": 2,
"name": "Calculations of the strength and rating of the pressure-bearing parts; Explanation: The term “rating” refers to the heating surface of the boiler.",
"description": null
}
]
}
}
},

{
"id": 549,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "A Wholesale Drug License is issued by the DGDA under the Drugs Act, 1940, and related rules to regulate the purchase, storage, distribution, and sale of pharmaceutical products in bulk. This license ensures that wholesalers comply with good storage practices, proper record-keeping, and safety standards. Only licensed wholesalers are legally permitted to distribute medicines to retailers, hospitals, or other authorized entities. Violation of the license conditions may lead to suspension, cancellation, or legal action under the applicable law.",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]

{
"id": 166,
"attributes": {
"name": "NOC for CETP Establishment",
"description": "Common Effluent Treatment Plants or (CETPs) are used by leading companies in the pharmaceutical and chemical industry to purify water and remove any toxic and non-toxic materials or chemicals from it. These plants are used by all companies for environment protection. During the manufacturing process of drugs, varied effluents and contaminants are produced. The effluent treatment plants are used in the removal of high amount of organics, debris, dirt, grit, pollution, toxic, non-toxic materials, polymers etc. from drugs and other medicated stuff. The CETP plants use evaporation and drying methods, and other auxiliary techniques such as centrifuging, filtration, incineration for chemical processing and effluent treatment. The treatment of effluents is essential to prevent pollution of the receiving water. The effluent water treatment plants are installed to reduce the possibility of pollution; biodegradable organics if left unsolved, the levels of contamination in the process of purification could damage bacterial treatment beds and lead to pollution of controlled waters. The CETPs can be established in the industrial sectors like Pharmaceuticals, Chemicals and Leather industry and tanneries.\n",
"shortDescription": "NOC for CETP Establishment",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:33:57.336Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:11:49.126Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:33:58.255Z",
"order": 36,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"CETP NOC",
"Effluent Treatment Plant Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 1689,
"minTime": "1",
"maxTime": "2",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 39,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 39,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "One Stop Service Act, 2018 and One Stop Service (Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority) Regulations, 2019",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 131,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply\n",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 132,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The approval of the No Objection Certificate (NoC) for establishing a Common Effluent Treatment Plant (CETP) ensures that the proposed facility complies with BHTPA’s environmental, technical, and safety standards.\n After obtaining Project Registration and Land Allotment, a Park Developer can apply for the NoC through the BHTPA OSS Portal.\n BHTPA evaluates the technical feasibility, environmental justification, and compliance of the CETP project before granting final approval.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 42,
"title": "Required Documents",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{
"id": 653,
"order": 1,
"name": "Copy of Feasibility Study (if any)",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 654,
"order": 2,
"name": "Copy of Layout Plan of Installation including Connecting Plan",
"description": null
},
{

"description": null
}
]
}

{
"id": 167,
"attributes": {
"name": "Clearance for Use of Building",
"description": "Once having Investment Project Registration at BHTPA OSS Portal, a unit investor can apply for Land Allotment in accordance to the proposed plan within 15 (Fifteen) days of issuance of the Project Registration Certificate. However, actual allotted Land may not match with the area requested in the Project Registration application. After having the Land Allotment Letter, the unit investor shall at first submit the Land Use Plan (Showing position of Building(s), Access & Internal Road, Green Area, Setback line, Gate & Gate House etc.) along with Utility Connection Plan (Electricity, Water, Sewage, Rainwater, Fence etc.) to BHTPA for clearance. Then the unit investor shall submit the Master Plan, Architectural Design and Drawing, Soil Test Report within 3 (three) months of signing the Land lease agreement to BHTPA for having approval from the competent authority. After having design approval from the competent authority, the company can start construction of the building as per the construction schedule. After the completion of construction of building the company shall apply to BHTPA for having clearance for the use of the Building. BHTPA shall check the readiness of the Building and shall issue a clearance letter upon satisfaction of the readiness of the building. \n \n However, an investor may apply for Clearance for the use of the Building to BHTPA through BHTPA OSS Portal once it is registered in the Portal.",
"shortDescription": "Clearance for Use of Building",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:34:36.635Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:12:08.925Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:34:37.583Z",
"order": 37,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Occupancy Certificate",
"Use Permit",
"Building Utilization Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,

"serviceType": "cub",
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 133,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 134,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval ",
"description": "The approval of Building Use Clearance ensures that the constructed facility meets BHTPA’s design, safety, and operational standards.\n After completing construction, the investor must apply to BHTPA for clearance to use the building.\n BHTPA inspects the site to verify readiness and compliance, then issues a Clearance Letter, allowing the investor to officially begin operations.\n This application can be submitted conveniently through the BHTPA OSS Portal once the investor is registered.\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"actAndRulesDetails": "Biological Drug Manufacturing License is issued by the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) under the Drugs Act, 1940 and the Drugs (Control) Ordinance, 1982, as well as the Drugs Rules, 1945. {
"id": 1275,
"attributes": {
"name": "User licence for Ionising Radiation Generating Equipment",
"description": "Under the BAER Act, 2012 and the NSRC Rules, 1997, a Class-C licence is the authorization granted by the Bangladesh Atomic Energy Regulatory Authority (BAERA) for activities involving ionising radiation-generating equipment, provided appropriate safety controls are maintained.\n This licence permits entities to manufacture, trade in, produce, process, purchase, own, possess, transfer, handle, sell and store irradiating apparatus, such as diagnostic X-ray, CT-scan machines etc., subject to regulatory conditions. licencees must ensure radiation protection measures, trained personnel, approved shielding, safe operating procedures, record-keeping, and compliance with dose limits for workers and the public.\n The Class-C licence is issued after regulatory review, safety assessment, and inspection, and remains valid only if conditions are continuously met. BAERA retains the authority to suspend or cancel the licence in case of non-compliance, ensuring protection of human health, property, and the environment.",
"shortDescription": "Under the BAER Act, 2012 and the NSRC Rules, 1997, a Class-C licence is the authorization granted",
"applicationUrl": "https://baera.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-22T11:41:08.107Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-22T11:45:23.018Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-22T11:45:23.011Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Ionising Radiation Equipment User License",
"Radiation Equipment Operation Permit",
"User License for Radiation Generating Devices",
"Ionising Radiation Equipment Authorization"
],
"ValidityTime": "a) New Licence: 1 year;\nb) Renewal of Licence: Depends on application, mostly 1-3 years.",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "a) New Licence: 1 year;\nb) Renewal of Licence: Depends on application, mostly 1-3 years.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "According to Scheduel of NSRC Rules, 1997.",
"slaText": "a) New Licence: Within approximately 90 working days of application, b) Renewal of Licence: Within approximately 60 working days of application",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "According to Scheduel of NSRC Rules, 1997.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5646,
"minTime": "60",
"maxTime": "90",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 596,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 600,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Acts",
"actAndRulesDetails": "a) Bangladesh Atomic Energy Regulatory Act, 2012\n b) Nuclear Safety and Radiation Control Rules, 1997\n c) National Policy for the Management of Radioactive Waste and Spent Nuclear Fuel-2019\n d) National Nuclear and Radiological Emergency Preparedness and Response Plan (NNREPRP)-2020",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1222,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The approval process for a Class-C licence for ionising radiation-generating equipment is conducted by the BAERA under the BAER Act, 2012 and NSRC Rules, 1997. Applicants must submit a prescribed application by online platform (IDSDP) with technical specifications, radiation safety assessment, layout and shielding design, and details of trained personnel. BAERA reviews the documents, conducts regulatory inspection if required, and verifies compliance with radiation protection standards. Upon satisfactory evaluation, the Class-C licence is granted with specific conditions; non-compliance may delay or deny approval. The approval process for a Class-E licence to import or export radiation sources is administered by the BAERA under the BAER Act, 2012 and NSRC Rules, 1997. Applicants must submit a prescribed application by online platform (IDSDP) with institutes valid trade licence,",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1223,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "A valid trade license holder and DGHS-registered institution, featuring a dedicated Radiation Control Officer (RCO) proficient in radiation management",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 88,
"attributes": {
"name": "Boiler Registration Renewal",
"description": "Boiler Operation Certificate Renewal is the service of renewing the Boiler Operation Certificate after its expiry for boilers used in industrial establishments. This service is provided by the Office of the Chief Inspector of Boilers. After submission of the application, the renewal is generally completed within 18 working days, with the prescribed fee (including VAT) payable according to the boiler’s heating surface.",
"shortDescription": "Boiler Operation Certificate Renewal is the service of renewing the Boiler Operation Certificate",
"applicationUrl": "/forms/boilar_reg_renewal",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-02T08:14:52.694Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-03-12T09:17:02.176Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-02T08:14:54.301Z",
"order": 2,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Boiler Registration Renewal",
"Renewal of Boiler Certificate",
"Boiler License Renewal",
"Industrial Boiler Registration Renewal"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Service fee and payment procedure based on the heating surface: By paying the prescribed fee (including VAT) as determined according to the heating surface and submitting the original copy of the treasury challan.",
"slaText": "Within 18 (eighteen) working days from the date of submission of the application.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "br",
"serviceType": "br",
"fee": "Service fee and payment procedure based on the heating surface: By paying the prescribed fee (including VAT) as determined according to the heating surface and submitting the original copy of the treasury challan.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],

"id": 5419,

"type": "Days"
},

},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1008,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Boiler Operation Certificate Renewal is a mandatory process under the Bangladesh Boiler Act, 1923 and the relevant rules. A Boiler Operation Certificate is generally issued for a fixed validity period, and operating a boiler without timely renewal after expiry is legally prohibited and poses safety risks. The renewal service is provided by the Office of the Chief Inspector of Boilers to ensure the safe operation of boilers and prevent accidents.\n\nThe key documents required for renewal include the latest Boiler Operation Certificate, Boiler Operator’s License, Water Test Report, relevant documents as prescribed under Rule 24, proof of fee payment (original challan copy), and business-related documents. All required documents must be submitted by the applicant organization.\n\nThe renewal fee is determined based on the boiler’s heating surface and must be paid inclusive of VAT, with the original challan submitted. After verification of documents and, where necessary, inspection and testing, the renewal certificate is issued within 18 working days from the date of application. Failure to renew within the prescribed time may result in penalties or legal complications.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1009,
"order": 2,

"id": 1312,
"attributes": {
"name": "Vehicle Fitness Certificate",
"description": "This service issues a vehicle fitness certificate by BRTA at the time of motor vehicle registration. It ensures the roadworthiness of the vehicle. BRTA issues a fitness certificate with a five year validity for private cars, jeeps, and microbuses. It issues a fitness certificate with a one year validity for all other vehicles.",

{
"id": 1279,
"attributes": {
"name": "licence for Import or Export of Radiation Source",
"description": "Under the BAER Act, 2012 and the NSRC Rules, 1997, a Class-E licence is issued by the Bangladesh Atomic Energy Regulatory Authority (BAERA) to authorize the export or import of radioactive material, nuclear material, prescribed substances, and their associated waste. The licence ensures that such transfers comply with national regulations, international safety standards, safeguards, and security requirements. licencees must obtain prior approval, ensure proper packaging, labeling, transport safety, documentation, and waste management arrangements. The activity is subject to regulatory review and inspection, and non-compliance may result in suspension or cancellation of the licence.",
"shortDescription": "Under the BAER Act, 2012 and the NSRC Rules, 1997, a Class-E licence",
"applicationUrl": "https://baera.gov.bd/",

BAERA evaluates compliance with safety, security, safeguards, and international obligations. Upon satisfactory review, the Class-E licence is issued with specific conditions; non-compliance may result in refusal or cancellation.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

}

{
"id": 193,
"attributes": {
"name": "Project Registration Amendment",
"description": "To invest in BHTPA, obtaining a Project Registration is must. The Project Registration is the process of accepting the proposed project as an investment under Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA). However, the Investor/the company is allowed to apply for the Amendment of the Project Registration once registered including changes of the amount of investment, ownership or relocation of the project. In case of Project Registration Amendment, if the amount of investment increased, additional fees as per the BHTPA Fee Schedule shall be payable by the company.\n",
"shortDescription": "Project Registration Amendment",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:58:05.981Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:13:35.252Z",

],

"id": 177,

"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 178,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval",
"description": "To invest in any Hi-Tech Park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA), obtaining a Project Registration is mandatory.\n \n Project Registration is the official process through which BHTPA accepts and recognizes a proposed project as a valid investment within its jurisdiction. This registration enables the investor/company to avail various incentives, facilities, and approvals offered by the government.\n \n However, once a project is registered, the Investor or Company may later apply for an Amendment of the Project Registration in cases such as:\n \n Change in the amount of investment,\n \n Change in ownership structure, or\n \n Relocation of the project.\n \n In the event that the investment amount increases, the company must pay additional fees as per the BHTPA Fee Schedule corresponding to the increased investment.\n\nChange in ownership structure, or\n\nRelocation of the project.\n\nIn the event that the investment amount increases, the company must pay additional fees as per the BHTPA Fee Schedule corresponding to the increased investment.\"",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 1281,
"attributes": {
"name": "Permit or NOC for Import or Export of Any Radiation Source",
"description": "Under the BAER Act, 2012 and the NSRC Rules, 1997, a Permit or No Objection Certificate (NOC) is required from the Bangladesh Atomic Energy Regulatory Authority (BAERA) for the import or export of any radiation source or relavent goods under the HSCODES assigned to BAERA`s jurisdiction. The Permit/NOC confirms that the proposed transfer complies with radiation safety, security, safeguards, and waste management requirements, and aligns with national laws and international obligations. It specifies the type, activity, quantity, purpose, and conditions of transfer. Import or export without a valid Permit/NOC is prohibited, and BAERA may suspend or revoke approval for non-compliance.",
"shortDescription": "Under the BAER Act, 2012 and the NSRC Rules, 1997, a Permit or No Objection Certificate (NOC)",
"applicationUrl": "https://baera.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-22T12:11:00.558Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-22T12:36:20.779Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-22T12:13:38.182Z",
"order": 3,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Permit or NOC for Import/Export of Radiation Source",
"Authorization for Radiation Source Trade",
"No Objection Certificate for Radiation Source Transfer",
"Radiation Source Import/Export Clearance"
],
"ValidityTime": "Depends on the validity of Class-E licence, mostly 3-6 months.",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Depends on the validity of Class-E licence, mostly 3-6 months.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "According to Scheduel of NSRC Rules, 1997.",
"slaText": "Within 30 working days of application,",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "According to Scheduel of NSRC Rules, 1997.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5668,
"minTime": "25",
"maxTime": "30",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 599,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 603,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Acts",
"actAndRulesDetails": "a) Bangladesh Atomic Energy Regulatory Act, 2012\n b) Nuclear Safety and Radiation Control Rules, 1997\n c) National Policy for the Management of Radioactive Waste and Spent Nuclear Fuel-2019\n d) National Nuclear and Radiological Emergency Preparedness and Response Plan (NNREPRP)-2020",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1228,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The approval process for a Permit or NOC to import or export radiation sources or related items is carried out by the BAERA under the BAER Act, 2012 and NSRC Rules, 1997. Applicants must submit a formal application by online platform (Bangladesh Single Window, BSW) with details of the radiation source or item, activity, quantity, purpose, transport mode, return aggrement, proforma invoice, LC, safety measures, and authorised end used. BAERA reviews regulatory compliance and may consult relevant agencies. Upon satisfactory evaluation, the Permit/NOC is issued with specific conditions",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1229,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Authorized institutes who has valid Import/Export Licence (Class E)",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 1,
"attributes": {
"name": "BIDA Registration",
"description": "BIDA registration is a mandatory process for most industrial and some commercial projects in Bangladesh, requiring businesses to register with the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA) to legally operate and access government benefits. ",
"shortDescription": "BIDA Registration",
"applicationUrl": "/service/1",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-07-10T11:18:01.468Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-22T13:11:52.226Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-10-22T16:32:05.800Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Company Registration with BIDA",
"Investment Registration, BIDA Enrollment",
"Industrial Registration"
],
"ValidityTime": "The BIDA Registration remains valid for the lifetime of the project, subject to compliance with applicable investment laws and any periodic reporting requirements. In case of project expansion or major changes, the investor must update the registration information with BIDA.",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "The BIDA Registration remains valid for the lifetime of the project, subject to compliance with applicable investment laws and any periodic reporting requirements. In case of project expansion or major changes, the investor must update the registration information with BIDA.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": true,
"applicationFeeText": "Local Investment Projects: Usually between BDT 5,000 to BDT 10,000, Foreign Investment Projects: Usually between USD 100 to USD 300 (or equivalent in BDT), Exact fees are determined as per BIDA’s official fee schedule at the time of submission.",
"slaText": "Completed within 7 to 10 working days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": "br",
"fee": "Local Investment Projects: Usually between BDT 5,000 to BDT 10,000, Foreign Investment Projects: Usually between USD 100 to USD 300 (or equivalent in BDT), Exact fees are determined as per BIDA’s official fee schedule at the time of submission.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 1297,
"minTime": "7",
"maxTime": "10",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 2,

"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 2,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "The BIDA Registration process is governed under the following legislative framework: Bangladesh Investment Development Authority Act, 2016 (Act No. 36 of 2016) \nIndustrial Policy of Bangladesh (latest version) Foreign Private Investment (Promotion and Protection) Act, 1980 Companies Act, 1994 Environment Conservation Act, 1995 (for industrial projects) Relevant rules and circulars issued by BIDA from time to time\" with \"Bangladesh Investment Development Authority Act, 2016\n",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA) acts as the central investment promotion and facilitation agency under the Prime Minister’s Office.\n BIDA Registration serves as the primary business approval for establishing an industrial unit or service enterprise in Bangladesh. The registration confirms that the business meets national investment guidelines and allows the investor to access various government services such as import permits, utilities, land acquisition, and other statutory clearances.\nIt is a prerequisite for both local entrepreneurs and foreign investors intending to start or expand a business in Bangladesh under the country’s investment laws and policies.",
"title": "About the approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": {
"id": 161,

"updatedAt": "2025-10-19T15:11:48.540Z"
}
}
}
},
{
"id": 2,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "The following entities are eligible to apply for BIDA Registration: Local entrepreneurs establishing a new industrial or service-oriented project. Foreign investors or joint ventures intending to invest in Bangladesh. Existing companies planning to expand or diversify their operations. Partnership firms or limited liability companies intending to operate under industrial or service sectors recognized by BIDA.",
"title": "Who can Apply",

{
"id": 172,
"attributes": {
"name": "Visa Assistance",
"description": "A foreign national willing to explore investment opportunity under Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority can apply for visa assistance directly from BHTPA. The incumbent foreign national has to submit the visa assistance request by herself/himself to BHTPA. Upon receiving the visa recommendation from BHTPA, the foreign national (Incumbent) has to visit the concerned Bangladesh Mission and may apply for visa. The foreign national has to present the visa recommendation and other necessary papers to the concerned office. It is to be noted that a visa recommendation from BHTPA does not guarantee issuing of visa. Issuing of visa is the sole prerogative of the concerned Bangladesh Mission.\n",
"shortDescription": "Visa Assistance",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:40:14.848Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T07:48:47.852Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T08:40:15.629Z",
"order": 9,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Visa Processing Support",
"Immigration Help",
"Visa Facilitation"
],
"ValidityTime": "as per as approval authority",

"validityText": "as per as approval authority",

"slaText": "as per as aproval authority",

"fee": "Free (as per BHTPA Fee Schedule);",

"id": 139,

"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",

"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 140,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "\"The approval of Visa Assistance by BHTPA supports a foreign national seeking to explore investment opportunities within Hi-Tech Parks in Bangladesh.\nAfter reviewing the applicant’s request and relevant documents, BHTPA issues a Visa Recommendation Letter to facilitate the visa process.\nHowever, the final approval and issuance of the visa rest solely with the concerned Bangladesh Mission, based on their assessment and verification.\"\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}

{
"id": 197,
"attributes": {
"name": "Space Allotment Amendment",
"description": "Once having Investment Project Registration at BHTPA OSS Portal, a unit investor can apply for Space Allotment in accordance to the proposed plan within 15 (Fifteen) days of issuance of the Project Registration Certificate. However, actual allotted Space may not match with the area requested in the Project Registration application. After having the Space Allotment Letter, the unit investor may apply for the Space Allotment Amendment at BHTPA requesting desired changes in the space allotment within the Park.",
"shortDescription": "Space Allotment Amendment",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,

"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 68,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "One Stop Service Act, 2018 and One Stop Service (Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority) Regulations, 2019",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 185,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 186,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval",
"description": "Once an Investor Company obtains the Investment Project Registration Certificate through the BHTPA OSS Portal, the company becomes eligible to apply for Space Allotment within the designated Hi-Tech Park.\n \n The application for space allotment must be submitted within 15 (fifteen) days of issuance of the Project Registration Certificate. The BHTPA reviews the request based on availability, project type, and investment proposal.\n \n It is to be noted that the actual allotted space may differ from the requested area due to land/space availability, park planning, or infrastructure constraints.\n \n After receiving the Space Allotment Letter, if the investor wishes to modify or relocate within the park, they may apply for a Space Allotment Amendment through the OSS Portal.\n \n All such space allotment and amendment requests are subject to approval by BHTPA, which ensures compliance with the Park’s Master Plan, investment priorities, and allocation policy.\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 71,
"title": "Required Documents",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"requiredDocumnetLIst": [
{
"id": 1504,
"order": 1,
"name": "Application Online through OSS Portal in prescribed Form;",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 1503,
"order": 2,
"name": "Space Allotment Letter",
"description": null
}
]
}
}
},

{
"id": 1363,
"attributes": {
"name": "Film Censor Certificate",
"description": "Certificate Issuance for Film Censorship\nFilm certification is a service provided by BFCB, which reviews domestic and foreign films and grants permission for public exhibition.\nIt is regulated under the Censorship of Films Rules, 1977 and the Certification Act, 2023. The film’s content is examined for law and order, religious sensitivities, obscenity, and other considerations before issuing the certificate.\nThe process ensures the social responsibility of films and protection of the audience.",
"shortDescription": "Film certification is a service provided by BFCB, which reviews domestic and foreign films and grants permission for public exhibition.",
"applicationUrl": "https://bfcb.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-23T19:05:36.803Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-23T19:21:31.820Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-23T19:13:44.942Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Film Censor Certificate",
"Movie Censorship Certificate",
"Cinematic Content Approval",
"Film Classification Certificate"
],
"ValidityTime": "30 working days",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "30 working days",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Varies by film length and type (examination fee, screening fee); check the latest fee calculator at bfcb.gov.bd or contact the office.",
"slaText": "As per Rule 14 of the Bangladesh Censorship of Films Rules, 1977, the prescribed examination and screening fees are available on the website – www.bfcb.gov.bd",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Varies by film length and type (examination fee, screening fee); check the latest fee calculator at bfcb.gov.bd or contact the office.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5980,
"minTime": null,
"maxTime": null,
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 699,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{
"id": 703,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Acts",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Content Coming Soon",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1426,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Process\nThe process is initiated online via BFCB (application.bfcb.gov.bd) or offline. The applicant (producer/importer) submits the application using the prescribed form along with the film print/DVD.\nThe board reviews the film, recommends any cuts or modifications, and issues the certificate. In case of objections, an appeal can be made to the Appeal Committee.\nAn NOC is required for foreign films.\nThe process ensures law and order, religious sensitivity, and protection of social values. Detailed forms and guidelines are available at bfcb.gov.bd.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

{
"id": 1355,
"attributes": {
"name": "Approval for structures on shoreline/river, river use, and any dredging",
"description": "Service for Obtaining Permission/Clearance from BIWTA. This service provides permission or clearance from BIWTA for the construction and use of jetties along riversides for commercial navigation, power plants, or various industrial establishments. It ensures legal authorization for riverbank use and is renewable annually.",
"shortDescription": "Service for Obtaining Permission/Clearance from BIWTA. This service provides permission or clearance from BIWTA",
"applicationUrl": "https://biwta.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-23T17:52:19.442Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-24T12:15:50.456Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-23T17:54:27.074Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Approval for Shoreline/River Structures and Use",
"Permission for Riverbank Construction and Dredging",
"Authorization for River Use and Structural Activities",
"Clearance for Shoreline Development and Dredging"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "For new permissions/clearances, the annual fee is collected in advance, and subsequently, the clearance must be renewed annually by paying the advance fee.",
"slaText": "21 working days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": "biwta",
"fee": "For new permissions/clearances, the annual fee is collected in advance, and subsequently, the clearance must be renewed annually by paying the advance fee.",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5940,
"minTime": "20",
"maxTime": "21",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 691,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 695,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Acts",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1410,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Bangladesh Inland Water Transport Authority (BIWTA) issues this clearance to grant permission for commercial navigation, establishment of power plants, or construction and use of jetties along riversides.\n\nThis authorization provides legal validity for construction and commercial activities on the foreshore and adjacent river areas, ensuring navigation safety and environmental protection.\n\nRequired documents for the application include foreshore map, mouza map, hydrographic chart, sketch map, construction plan, applicant’s photograph, notarized copy of National ID, and tax certificate. Applications can be submitted at BIWTA’s headquarters (Motijheel, Dhaka) or at any river port office under its jurisdiction.\n\nThe processing time is 21 working days. For new permissions, an annual fee must be paid in advance, and the clearance must be renewed annually by paying the advance fee. This process plays a key role in proper riverway use and preventing misuse.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1411,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "Content Coming Soon\n",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"id": 646,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},

{

},

{

},
{

"order": 5,

"description": null
},
{
"id": 4179,

"name": "Applicant’s photograph and notarized copy of National ID",
"description": null
},
{

"description": null
},
{

"order": 8,
"name": "Submission locations:",
"description": null
},
{

"description": null
},
{

{
"id": 1361,
"attributes": {
"name": "Online News Portal registration",
"description": "The Online News Portal Registration service is administered under the Press Information Department (PID) and provides official registration to operate an online news portal in Bangladesh. Applications must be submitted to the authority using the prescribed form along with the payment of the registration fee, renewal fee, and applicable surcharge. Detailed information and the application form are available on the website www.pressinform.gov.bd\n. The processing time is 30 working days. Fees: Registration fee Tk. 10,000; renewal fee Tk. 5,000; and late renewal surcharge Tk. 3,000 (for the first month) or Tk. 5,000 (for more than one month).",
"shortDescription": "The Online News Portal Registration service is administered under the Press Information Department",
"applicationUrl": "https://pressinform.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-23T18:39:38.698Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-23T19:02:12.565Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-23T18:41:31.491Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Online News Portal Registration",
"Digital News Platform Registration",
"Internet News Website Registration",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1422,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The Online News Portal Registration service is managed by the Press Information Department (PID) under the Ministry of Information and Broadcasting. This registration is mandatory for operating online-based news media in Bangladesh and is regulated under the National Online Media Policy. Registration helps prevent yellow journalism, ensures eligibility for government benefits, and provides legal recognition.\nFor approval, applicants must complete the prescribed form and submit it to the authority along with the required supporting documents, affidavit/undertaking, and proof of fee payment through a challan code. Detailed guidelines and the application form can be downloaded from www.pressinform.gov.bd\nThe processing time is 30 working days. Registration fee is Tk. 10,000, payable to the government treasury via challan. Renewal fee is Tk. 5,000. Late renewal attracts a surcharge of Tk. 3,000 for the first month and Tk. 5,000 if delayed beyond one month.\nThis registration ensures the accountability of online media and supports the improvement of journalistic standards. Registered portals are also eligible for government advertisements and other benefits.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{

"order": 2,

"description": "Content Coming Soon",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}

{
"id": 21,
"attributes": {
"name": "Visa Recommendation",
"description": "This service involves BIDA issuing a recommendation letter for the PI (Private Investor) visa category which foreign investors in Bangladesh must obtain before applying for the visa. The recommendation confirms that the investor is eligible under BIDA’s investment regulations.\n ",
"shortDescription": "Visa Recommendation",
"applicationUrl": "/investor/create-application",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-07-29T07:31:18.653Z",

"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Investor Visa Endorsement",
"Employment Visa Recommendation"
],
"ValidityTime": "Annual renewal is required, subject to BIDA's review and security clearance. Maximum validity is 5 years.",

"validityText": "Annual renewal is required, subject to BIDA's review and security clearance. Maximum validity is 5 years.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "BDT 5,000 per individual/year",
"slaText": "5 Days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 195,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The recommendation certifies that the investor (or entity) has met BIDA’s investment conditions (such as registration, remittance of funds, etc.) and is eligible for the PI visa under Bangladesh’s visa policy. Its purpose is to provide the Bangladesh diplomatic/immigration authorities with BIDA’s endorsement, thereby enabling the investor to apply for the PI visa and legally reside/invest in Bangladesh.\n ",
"title": "About this approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 196,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "The Visa Recommendation service is intended for foreign investors, expatriate employees, and authorized representatives of companies, branch offices, or liaison/representative offices registered with the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA). Applicants can apply to obtain a visa recommendation from BIDA to work or invest in Bangladesh, based on their role, investment, or company affiliation.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 169,
"attributes": {
"name": "Visa Recommendation",
"description": "\"A unit investor can apply for visa recommendation in favor of a foreign national. Upon\n receiving the visa recommendation, the foreign national has to visit the concerned\n Bangladesh Mission and apply for visa. The foreign national (Incumbent) has to present\n the visa recommendation and other necessary papers to the concerned office. It is to be\n noted that a visa recommendation from BHTPA does not guarantee issuing of visa.\n Issuing of visa is the sole prerogative of the concerned Bangladesh Mission.\n\"",
"shortDescription": "Visa Recommendation",
"applicationUrl": "/investor/create-application",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T08:37:45.656Z",

"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",

{
"id": 136,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About the Approval ",
"description": "The approval of Visa Recommendation by BHTPA allows a unit investor to sponsor a foreign national for business or employment purposes.\n After reviewing the application and supporting documents, BHTPA issues a Visa Recommendation Letter to facilitate the visa process.\n However, the final approval and issuance of the visa remain under the authority of the concerned Bangladesh Mission, based on their assessment and verification.\n",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}

"attributes": {
"name": "Construction permit",
"description": "If a new building/structure is to be constructed.\nIf modifications are to be made to an existing building/structure.\nIf additions are to be made to an existing building/structure.",

"ValidityTime": "The Construction Approval is valid for 3 years.\nConstruction must be completed at least up to the plinth level within this period.\nIf the deadline is exceeded, a new approval must be obtained.",

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 966,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "If all drawings are submitted together, approval or rejection will be issued based on the committee’s recommendation.\n\nIf only the architectural drawing is submitted first, written notification will be issued within 30 days.\n\nAlong with the notification, the applicant will be requested to submit the remaining drawings within 180 days.\n\nIf the architectural and structural drawings are inconsistent, the Building Construction Committee will notify the applicant to submit the required corrections within 180 days.\n\nFailure to submit the remaining drawings within 180 days will result in automatic cancellation of the application.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

"attributes": {

"description": "Space Allotment is the process of assigning or leasing a specific area within a government or private industrial zone for business use. In Bangladesh Hi-Tech Parks, it allows companies to set up offices, factories, or IT facilities. The allotment is approved by the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) based on project proposals and eligibility.",

{
"id": 1167,
"attributes": {
"name": "Project Profile & Site Clearance Approval",
"description": "Project Profile and Site Clearance Approval is a regulatory service provided by the Department of Environment (DoE), through which the environmental suitability of the proposed site for industrial or commercial projects is assessed and a preliminary clearance is issued. This approval ensures environmental protection and facilitates the lawful implementation of the project.",
"shortDescription": "Project Profile and Site Clearance Approval is a regulatory service provided by the Department of Environment (DoE)",
"applicationUrl": "https://doe.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-21T05:28:04.492Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-24T07:23:43.888Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-21T05:49:29.504Z",
"order": 2,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Project Profile Approval & Site Environmental Clearance",
"Preliminary Environmental Clearance for Project Site",
"Project Site Suitability Assessment & Clearance",
"Initial Project Environmental Approval"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply  ",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Free of Cost",
"slaText": "Processing Time: 120 working days from receipt of complete application.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": "ppsc",
"fee": "Free of Cost",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 5999,
"minTime": "100",
"maxTime": "120",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 465,
"title": "Acts And Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts And Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 469,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "The Project Profile & Site Clearance Approval is a regulatory service provided by the Department of Environment (DoE) under the Bangladesh Environmental Conservation Act, 1995 and the Environmental Conservation Rules, 1997. Projects are assessed for environmental suitability following the EIA/IEE Guidelines, ensuring compliance with ecological and public health standards. This approval is mandatory for industrial or commercial projects, including those in BHTPA and BEPZA zones, before site development or operation. It facilitates lawful project implementation while safeguarding the environment.",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 962,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Project Profile and Site Clearance Approval is a regulatory service provided by the Department of Environment (DoE) under the Environmental Conservation Act, serving as a preliminary environmental clearance for new industrial or commercial projects. Commencing construction or operations on the project site without this approval is legally prohibited. The approval assesses the environmental impact of the proposed project location and paves the way for a full Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) and subsequent Environmental Clearance.\nRequired documents include the detailed Project Profile, site map and location description, ownership deed or lease agreement, Feasibility Study Report (if applicable), description of proposed project activities, potential environmental impact report, and other relevant supporting documents (requirements may vary depending on project type). Applications can be submitted online through the DoE portal or the BIDA One-Stop Service (OSS).",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 963,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply ",
"description": "content coming soon ",
"title": "Who can Apply ",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": null
}
},

{
"id": 1322,
"attributes": {
"name": "Shipping Operator License",
"description": "Shipping Agent License Issuance Service, provided by the Bangladesh Shipping Corporation or the relevant authority.\nIt grants legal authorization to provide cargo handling, clearing, and other shipping-related services, and is issued after verifying business capability.",
"shortDescription": "Shipping Agent License Issuance Service, provided by the Bangladesh Shipping Corporation or the relevant authority.",
"applicationUrl": "https://dos.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1320,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Shipping Agent License is required to operate as a ship agent in Bangladesh seaports and is generally issued under the Bangladesh Shipping Corporation or the Chattogram/Mongla Port Authority. Without this license, no organization is allowed to provide cargo loading and unloading, customs clearance, crew management, or other shipping-related services.\n\nThe documents required for application include the application form, updated trade license, TIN certificate, bank solvency certificate, and the company’s Memorandum of Association. These documents are used to verify the legal existence, financial capacity, and business legitimacy of the organization.\n\nThe processing time is 15 working days. The license fee is BDT 10,000. This license plays an important role in ensuring the orderly operation of the shipping sector, port security, and the protection of foreign trade interests.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},

{
"id": 199,
"attributes": {
"name": "Land Use Plan Amendment",
"description": "Once having Investment Project Registration at BHTPA OSS Portal, a unit investor can apply for Land Allotment in accordance to the proposed plan within 15 (Fifteen) days of issuance of the Project Registration Certificate. However, actual allotted Land may not match with the area requested in the Project Registration application. After having the Land Allotment Letter, the unit investor shall at first submit the Land Use Plan (Showing position of Building(s), Access & Internal Road, Green Area, Setback line, Gate & Gate House etc.) along with Utility Connection Plan (Electricity, Water, Sewage, Rainwater, Fence etc.) to BHTPA for clearance within 3 (Three) months. After having the Land Use Plan Approval Certificate from BHTPA, the unit investor may apply to the BHTPA Authority requesting for amendment in the Land Use Plan as necessary before the approval of the Detail Architectural Design for construction of Building.\n",
"shortDescription": "Land Use Plan Amendment",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T09:05:04.250Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:15:58.565Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T09:05:05.159Z",
"order": 45,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Update Land Use Plan",
"Modify Site Layout"
],
"ValidityTime": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration\n",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": "Valid till the validity of Project Registration",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,

"serviceType": "lupa",
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,

"type": "Days"

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 189,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.\n",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 190,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About ",
"description": "Once a Unit Investor obtains Investment Project Registration through the BHTPA OSS Portal, they are eligible to apply for Land Allotment within the designated Hi-Tech Park.\n The application for land allotment must be submitted within 15 (fifteen) days of issuance of the Project Registration Certificate.\n BHTPA evaluates the proposal based on project requirements, investment scale, and land availability. The actual allotted land area may differ from the area requested in the Project Registration application due to site and planning constraints.\n After receiving the Land Allotment Letter, the Unit Investor must submit the following to BHTPA for clearance within 3 (three) months",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

]

"id": 439,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About  the Approval ",
"description": "The approval of the Land Use Plan by BHTPA ensures that the investor’s proposed site layout and utility setup comply with park guidelines.\n After receiving the Land Allotment Letter, the investor must submit the Land Use Plan and Utility Connection Plan within 3 months for review.\n BHTPA evaluates the design, safety, and environmental aspects before granting final approval for project development.",

{
"id": 1038,
"attributes": {
"name": "Copyright Registration",
"description": "The Copyright Office issues registration for creative works such as literature, music, artwork, software, etc. Applications can be submitted online (www.bcoecopyright.gov.bd or offline, and the office verifies them and issues a certificate after 30 days. Registration is not mandatory, but it serves as proof of ownership. Citizen Charter vision: Promotion of creative works\nMission: Protection of intellectual property rights",
"shortDescription": "The Copyright Office issues registration for creative works such as literature, music, artwork, software, etc.",
"applicationUrl": "https://copyrightoffice.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-02T08:02:44.574Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-26T05:42:19.364Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-02T08:04:05.174Z",
"order": 1,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Copyright Registration",
"Copyright Certificate",
"Intellectual Property Copyright Registration",
"Copyright Filing Authorization"
],
"ValidityTime": null,
"applicationButtonText": "Apply",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "BDT 1,000 (registration fee); Code: 1‑3437‑0000‑1841 (Bangladesh Bank / Sonali Bank treasury challan or online payment)",
"slaText": "Submit hard copy within 15 days of online application • Verification after a 30-day waiting period • If everything is in order, certificate issued within 60 working days",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": false,
"shortName": "cr",
"serviceType": "cp",
"fee": "BDT 1,000 (registration fee); Code: 1‑3437‑0000‑1841 (Bangladesh Bank / Sonali Bank treasury challan or online payment)",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 6299,
"minTime": "50",
"maxTime": "60",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 671,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 675,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Acts",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Content Coming Soon",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1370,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The application process begins by submitting online via the E-Copyright portal or in hard copy. For online applications, the hard copy and supporting documents must be submitted within 15 days.\nAs per Copyright Rules, 2006, Sub-rule 4(4), after a 30-day waiting period, the office conducts verification and examination for approval. If everything is in order, a signed certificate is issued to the applicant or their representative. If any objections arise, a hearing is conducted.\nThis process ensures the protection of intellectual property rights for creators.\nFocal point: Copyright Registrar\nPhone: 02-223314815\nEmail: registrar@copyrightoffice.gov.bd",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 1371,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can apply",
"description": "The work must be original and creative\n• No pending cases or objections\n• Applicant is the author, owner, institution, or authorized representative\n• Proof of Bangladeshi citizenship (if required)",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],
"serviceRequiredDocument": {
"id": 626,
"title": "Document Required",
"tabMenuName": "Documents",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"requiredDocumnetLIst": [
{
"id": 4107,
"order": 1,
"name": "Two (2) copies of the creative work.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 4108,
"order": 2,
"name": "For software works, a utility explanation; for artwork, an artistic description; for musical works, a list of songs signed by the applicant, including lyricist, composer, and singer names (maximum 12 songs per application).",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 4109,
"order": 3,
"name": "Fee payment: Treasury challan of BDT 1,000 under code 10 3437-0000-1841 with a photocopy of the original, or payment through the E-Copyright system using the specified code.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 4110,
"order": 4,
"name": "Declaration of originality: A notarized statement on cartes paper or typed, confirming that the work is original, no court case is pending, and all information provided is accurate.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 4111,
"order": 5,
"name": "If ownership is transferred, a copyright transfer deed must be notarized on a BDT 300 non-judicial stamp and registered with the Bangladesh Copyright Office.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 4112,
"order": 6,
"name": "Proof of Bangladeshi citizenship: Photocopy of National ID or passport.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 4113,
"order": 7,
"name": "One passport-size photograph.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 4114,
"order": 8,
"name": "Memorandum of the company (first page and relevant pages showing shareholder ownership), updated trade license, TIN certificate copy, and acknowledgment of the latest income tax return submission.",
"description": null
},
{
"id": 4115,
"order": 9,
"name": "If the institution is the employer, a copy of the appointment letter issued to the creator by the institution",
"description": null
}
]
}
}
},

{
"id": 1365,
"attributes": {
"name": "Factory Layout Plan Approval",
"description": "Factory Layout Plan Approval Service – Provided by the Department of Environment (DoE), this service evaluates the environmental suitability, safety measures, and pollution control systems of an industrial facility’s layout plan. It issues clearance to ensure sustainable production practices.",
"shortDescription": "Factory Layout Plan Approval Service – Provided by the Department of Environment (DoE),",
"applicationUrl": "https://dgdagov.info/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2026-01-23T20:04:14.741Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-23T20:10:06.786Z",
"publishedAt": "2026-01-23T20:04:45.633Z",
"order": 3,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Factory Layout Approval Certificate",
"Approval of Factory Layout Plan",
"Factory Floor Plan Approval",
"Industrial Layout Approval"
],

"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 1430,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "Factory Layout Plan Approval is issued by the Department of Environment (DoE) and ensures the environmental compliance of an industrial facility under the Environmental Conservation Act, 1995 and its related rules. It evaluates the factory’s internal layout, equipment placement, waste management, and pollution control systems. Without this approval, production activities in the factory are legally prohibited.\nRequired Documents:\nDetailed Factory Layout Plan, showing equipment, production lines, ETP/STP, waste storage, and other relevant locations\nProject Profile\nProcess Flow Diagram\nDescription of pollution control measures\nCopy of Site Clearance Certificate\nOther relevant documents\nApplications can be submitted online through the DoE Environmental Clearance Portal or the BIDA One-Stop Service (OSS).\nProcessing Time: 120 working days from receipt of complete application.\nFee: This service is provided completely free of charge.\nThis approval supports environmental protection, ensures worker safety, and promotes sustainable industrial development while providing legal validity for project implementation.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{

"order": 2,

}
}

"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 584,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "Non-Biological (Allopathic) Drug Manufacturing License is issued by the DGDA under the Drugs Act, 1940, Drugs (Control) Ordinance, 1982, and Drugs Rules, 1945. It is mandatory for manufacturing allopathic medicines such as tablets, syrups, injections, and capsules. The license ensures compliance with GMP, quality control, labeling, and safety standards. Only licensed manufacturers are legally allowed to produce these medicines, and violations may lead to suspension, cancellation, or legal action.",

"data": null
}
}

{
"id": 229,
"attributes": {
"name": "Import Permit - Import Permit for Generator",
"description": "EZ unit investors must obtain an Import Permit from BEZA whenever they need to bring raw materials, machinery, equipment, or other goods from abroad or from the Domestic Tariff Area into the Economic Zone. This permit is required to ensure legal compliance with BEZA and customs regulations and is a prerequisite for customs clearance through the Bangladesh Single Window (BSW) system.",
"shortDescription": "EZ unit investors must obtain an Import Permit from BEZA whenever they need to bring raw materials, machinery, equipment,",
"applicationUrl": "https://oss.beza.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T09:37:49.274Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-24T04:45:27.174Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T09:37:50.796Z",
"order": 15,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Generator Import Permit",
"Import Authorization for Generator",
"Permit for Importing Generator",
"Approval for Generator Import"
],
"ValidityTime": "30 days from the issue date till utilization.",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": "30 days from the issue date till utilization.",
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Documents",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "BDT 500 (Application Fee) + 15% VAT   Bank Charge+ 15% VAT on Bank Charge",
"slaText": "One (01) working day, provided that all required documents and information are correctly submitted and no shortfalls are identified.",
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": "ip",
"serviceType": "gp",
"fee": "BDT 500 (Application Fee) + 15% VAT   Bank Charge+ 15% VAT on Bank Charge",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],
"processingTime": {
"id": 3271,
"minTime": "0",
"maxTime": "1",
"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,
"actAndRules": {
"id": 30,
"title": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuName": "Acts and Rules",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 30,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "1. Bangladesh Economic Zones Act, 2010 (Act No. 42 of 2010)\n  2. Sub-Rule (2)(a) of Rule 3 of the “One Stop Service (Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority) Rules, 2018” read with Section 11 of the “One Stop Service Act, 2018”",
"actAndRulesFile": {
"data": null
}
}
]
},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 114,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Pre-Conditions for Applicants: \n  - The applicant company must obtain Investment Clearance and a Trade License from the BEZA-OSS portal.\n  - The company must obtain a Business Identification Number (BIN) and complete registration in the BSW system prior to applying for an Import Permit and simultaneously update BIN information in BEZA-OSS Portal. \n  - The company is required to provide periodic updates on investment and employment data through the BEZA-OSS portal. Failure to provide such data will result in ineligibility to apply for both Import Permits and Export Permits.\n  - For importing construction materials, Finish schedule and specific quantity of the materials required to be assessed and subsequently approved by the Building Construction and Occupancy Committee, BEZA.\n  Remarks:\n  - EZ Unit Investor and EZ Developer do not required IRC/ERC License from Office of the Chief Controller of Imports and Exports (CCIE).\n  - EZ Unit Investor and EZ Developer are highly encouraged to consult with BEZA-OSSC before importing capital machinery, construction materials etc. \n  - Any misinformation and invalid documents in the application may be terminated.\n  - The working days shall be counted from the day of the complete and final submission of the SOP [complete information and attached documents].\n  - A shortfall message shall be sent to the applicant in case of an incomplete submission. If the applicant does not respond in due course, the submitted application shall be discarded.\n  - BEZA-OSS reserves the right to request additional documents or clarifications where necessary.",
"title": "Who can Apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 610,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "The objective of this process & approval is to facilitate the smooth and compliant related to import and export of goods for unit investors operating within Bangladesh Economic Zones. Through a structured and transparent procedure, BEZA ensures that only duly registered and qualified companies are granted the Import Permit required for customs clearance.\n  \n  Brief Synopsis of the process of approval: \n  STEP-1: Application Submission\n  Applicant submits application online through Bangladesh Single Window (BSW) at bswnbr.gov.bd along with required documents.\n  \n  STEP-2: Automated Scrutiny\n  BSW Risk Management System (RMS) performs automated checks and Application and documents are forwarded to BEZA One Stop Service (OSS) Portal.\n  \n  STEP-3: Decision and Issuance\n  BEZA-OSS reviews documents and information\n  ✅ If in order → Import Permit issued.\n  ❌ If discrepancies (HS code mismatch, quantity, missing docs) → Shortfall Notice sent for correction.\n  \n  STEP-4: Forward to Customs\n  Upon approval, BEZA-OSS portal automatically forwards the permit to the BSW system for customs clearance processing.\n  \n  Pre-Conditions for Applicants: \n  - The applicant company must obtain Investment Clearance and a Trade License from the BEZA-OSS portal.\n  - The company must obtain a Business Identification Number (BIN) and complete registration in the BSW system prior to applying for an Import Permit and simultaneously update BIN information in BEZA-OSS Portal. \n  - The company is required to provide periodic updates on investment and employment data through the BEZA-OSS portal. Failure to provide such data will result in ineligibility to apply for both Import Permits and Export Permits.\n  - For importing construction materials, Finish schedule and specific quantity of the materials required to be assessed and subsequently approved by the Building Construction and Occupancy Committee, BEZA.",
"title": "About The Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

{
"id": 200,
"attributes": {
"name": "Visa on Arrival Amendment",
"description": "A foreign national willing to explore investment opportunity under Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority can apply for visa on arrival assistance directly from BHTPA, where there is no office of the Bangladesh Consulate in that country or in case where there is no sufficient time to have Visa prior visiting Bangladesh. The incumbent foreign national has to submit the visa on arrival assistance request by herself/himself to BHTPA through the BHTPA OSS Portal. Before receiving the visa on arrival recommendation from BHTPA, the foreign national (Incumbent) can amend his application if necessary. The VISA On Arrival Amendment application will allow the applicant to change required information previously furnished in the application. Upon receiving the visa on arrival recommendation from BHTPA, the foreign national (Incumbent) can submit it along with other necessary papers at the Visa On Arrival Counter of the expected Port of Entry. It is to be noted that a visa recommendation from BHTPA does not guarantee issuing of visa. Issuing of visa is the sole prerogative of the concerned Bangladesh Mission",
"shortDescription": "Visa on Arrival Amendment",
"applicationUrl": "https://ossbhtpa.gov.bd/",
"isActive": true,
"createdAt": "2025-08-04T09:05:35.681Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-25T08:16:18.982Z",
"publishedAt": "2025-08-04T09:05:36.592Z",
"order": 46,
"locale": "en",
"synonyms": [
"Change Visa on Arrival Information",
"Update Endorsement"
],
"ValidityTime": "\n",
"applicationButtonText": "Apply ",
"validityText": null,
"requiredDocumentText": "Required Document",
"isRedirection": null,
"applicationFeeText": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"slaText": null,
"saveforLaterButtonText": "Save for Later",
"isProvidedByBanglaBiz": null,
"shortName": null,
"serviceType": null,
"fee": "Tk. 500/- or $7",
"redirectApplicationUrl": null,
"requiredDocuments": [],

"type": "Days"
},
"metadata": null,

"actAndRulesList": [
{
"id": 107,
"order": 1,
"actAndRulesType": "Act",
"actAndRulesDetails": "One Stop Service Act, 2018 and One Stop Service (Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority) Regulations, 2019",
"actAndRulesFile": {

},
"serviceDetailsMenuList": [
{
"id": 261,
"order": 1,
"tabMenuName": "About",
"description": "A foreign national interested in exploring investment opportunities under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) can apply for Visa on Arrival (VOA) Assistance directly through the BHTPA OSS Portal. This facility is particularly applicable in cases where:\nThere is no Bangladesh Consulate Office in the applicant’s country of residence, or\nThere is insufficient time to obtain a visa prior to visiting Bangladesh.\nBefore the Visa on Arrival Recommendation is issued by BHTPA, the applicant may apply for a Visa on Arrival Amendment if any information in the original application requires modification.\n The Visa on Arrival Amendment allows the foreign national to:\n \n Edit or correct information already submitted,\n \n Update details such as passport information, travel purpose, or entry port (if necessary), and\n \nEnsure that all submitted data is accurate and complete prior to approval.\nOnce the amended application is reviewed and approved, BHTPA issues the Visa on Arrival Recommendation Letter.\nAfter receiving the recommendation, the foreign national must:\nPresent the recommendation letter and other required documents at the Visa on Arrival Counter of the designated Port of Entry in Bangladesh; and\nApply for the visa at the port authority as per immigration rules.\n \n It must be noted that:\n \nA Visa on Arrival Recommendation from BHTPA does not guarantee the issuance of a visa.\n \nThe final authority for granting or rejecting a visa lies solely with the concerned Bangladesh Mission or Immigration Authority at the Port of Entry.",
"title": "About the Approval",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
},
{
"id": 262,
"order": 2,
"tabMenuName": "Who can Apply",
"description": "Applicable for any business entity that has invested in hi-tech activities within any park under the Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority (BHTPA) and intends to operate its business there.",
"title": "Who can apply",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
}
}
],

"tabMenuName": "Document",
"tabMenuIcon": {
"data": null
},
